authors_text: Jie You,Jae-Won Chung,Mosharaf Chowdhury
title: Zeus: Understanding and Optimizing GPU Energy Consumption of DNN Training
title_zh: Zeus：理解和优化 DNN 训练的 GPU 能耗
abstract: Training deep neural networks (DNNs) is becoming increasingly more resource- and energy-intensive every year. Unfortunately, existing works primarily focus on optimizing DNN training for faster completion, often without considering the impact on energy efficiency. In this paper, we observe that common practices to improve training performance can often lead to inefficient energy usage. More importantly, we demonstrate that there is a tradeoff between energy consumption and performance optimization. To this end, we propose Zeus, an optimization framework to navigate this tradeoff by automatically finding optimal job- and GPU-level configurations for recurring DNN training jobs. Zeus uses an online exploration-exploitation approach in conjunction with just-in-time energy profiling, averting the need for expensive offline measurements, while adapting to data drifts over time. Our evaluation shows that Zeus can improve the energy efficiency of DNN training by 15.3%-75.8% for diverse workloads.
summary: Training deep neural networks (DNNs) is becoming increasingly more resource- and energy-intensive every year. Unfortunately, existing works primarily focus on optimizing DNN training for faster completion, often without considering the impact on energy efficiency. In this paper, we observe that common practices to improve training performance can often lead to inefficient energy usage. More importantly, we demonstrate that there is a tradeoff between energy consumption and performance optimization. To this end, we propose Zeus, an optimization framework to navigate this tradeoff by automatically finding optimal job- and GPU-level configurations for recurring DNN training jobs. Zeus uses an online exploration-exploitation approach in conjunction with just-in-time energy profiling, averting the need for expensive offline measurements, while adapting to data drifts over time. Our evaluation shows that Zeus can improve the energy efficiency of DNN training by 15.3%-75.8% for diverse workloads.
abstract_zh: 训练深度神经网络 (DNN) 每年变得越来越消耗资源和能源。不幸的是，现有的工作主要集中在优化 DNN 训练以更快地完成，通常没有考虑对能源效率的影响。在本文中，我们观察到提高训练表现的常见做法往往会导致能源使用效率低下。更重要的是，我们证明了能源消耗和性能优化之间存在权衡。为此，我们提出了 Zeus，这是一个优化框架，通过自动为重复的 DNN 训练作业找到最佳的作业和 GPU 级配置来实现这种权衡。 Zeus 将在线探索开发方法与即时能量分析相结合，避免了昂贵的离线测量的需要，同时适应数据随时间的变化。我们的评估表明，对于不同的工作负载，Zeus 可以将 DNN 训练的能源效率提高 15.3%-75.8%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Zeus框架，通过优化GPU配置提升深度神经网络（DNN）训练的能源效率。
AI.motivation: 现有研究主要关注加速DNN训练，但忽视能源效率，且性能优化与能耗之间存在权衡关系。
AI.method: 采用在线探索-利用策略结合实时能耗分析，动态调整GPU配置，无需离线测量且适应数据变化。
AI.result: 在多种工作负载下，Zeus将DNN训练能耗效率提升15.3%-75.8%。
AI.conclusion: Zeus通过自动配置优化有效平衡了训练性能与能耗，为实际应用提供了高效能的解决方案。

authors_text: Junjie Li,Zilei Wang,Yuan Gao,Xiaoming Hu
title: Exploring High-quality Target Domain Information for Unsupervised Domain Adaptive Semantic Segmentation
title_zh: 探索无监督域自适应语义分割的高质量目标域信息
abstract: In unsupervised domain adaptive (UDA) semantic segmentation, the distillation based methods are currently dominant in performance. However, the distillation technique requires complicate multi-stage process and many training tricks. In this paper, we propose a simple yet effective method that can achieve competitive performance to the advanced distillation methods. Our core idea is to fully explore the target-domain information from the views of boundaries and features. First, we propose a novel mix-up strategy to generate high-quality target-domain boundaries with ground-truth labels. Different from the source-domain boundaries in previous works, we select the high-confidence target-domain areas and then paste them to the source-domain images. Such a strategy can generate the object boundaries in target domain (edge of target-domain object areas) with the correct labels. Consequently, the boundary information of target domain can be effectively captured by learning on the mixed-up samples. Second, we design a multi-level contrastive loss to improve the representation of target-domain data, including pixel-level and prototype-level contrastive learning. By combining two proposed methods, more discriminative features can be extracted and hard object boundaries can be better addressed for the target domain. The experimental results on two commonly adopted benchmarks (\textit{i.e.}, GTA5 $\rightarrow$ Cityscapes and SYNTHIA $\rightarrow$ Cityscapes) show that our method achieves competitive performance to complicated distillation methods. Notably, for the SYNTHIA$\rightarrow$ Cityscapes scenario, our method achieves the state-of-the-art performance with $57.8\%$ mIoU and $64.6\%$ mIoU on 16 classes and 13 classes. Code is available at https://github.com/ljjcoder/EHTDI.
summary: In unsupervised domain adaptive (UDA) semantic segmentation, the distillation based methods are currently dominant in performance. However, the distillation technique requires complicate multi-stage process and many training tricks. In this paper, we propose a simple yet effective method that can achieve competitive performance to the advanced distillation methods. Our core idea is to fully explore the target-domain information from the views of boundaries and features. First, we propose a novel mix-up strategy to generate high-quality target-domain boundaries with ground-truth labels. Different from the source-domain boundaries in previous works, we select the high-confidence target-domain areas and then paste them to the source-domain images. Such a strategy can generate the object boundaries in target domain (edge of target-domain object areas) with the correct labels. Consequently, the boundary information of target domain can be effectively captured by learning on the mixed-up samples. Second, we design a multi-level contrastive loss to improve the representation of target-domain data, including pixel-level and prototype-level contrastive learning. By combining two proposed methods, more discriminative features can be extracted and hard object boundaries can be better addressed for the target domain. The experimental results on two commonly adopted benchmarks (\textit{i.e.}, GTA5 $\rightarrow$ Cityscapes and SYNTHIA $\rightarrow$ Cityscapes) show that our method achieves competitive performance to complicated distillation methods. Notably, for the SYNTHIA$\rightarrow$ Cityscapes scenario, our method achieves the state-of-the-art performance with $57.8\%$ mIoU and $64.6\%$ mIoU on 16 classes and 13 classes. Code is available at https://github.com/ljjcoder/EHTDI.
abstract_zh: 在无监督域自适应（UDA）语义分割中，基于蒸馏的方法目前在性能上占主导地位。然而，蒸馏技术需要复杂的多阶段过程和许多训练技巧。在本文中，我们提出了一种简单而有效的方法，可以实现与先进蒸馏方法竞争的性能。我们的核心思想是从边界和特征的角度充分挖掘目标域信息。首先，我们提出了一种新颖的混合策略，以生成带有真实标签的高质量目标域边界。与以前的工作中的源域边界不同，我们选择高置信度的目标域区域，然后将它们粘贴到源域图像中。这种策略可以生成具有正确标签的目标域中的对象边界（目标域对象区域的边缘）。因此，通过对混合样本的学习可以有效地捕获目标域的边界信息。其次，我们设计了多级对比损失来改善目标域数据的表示，包括像素级和原型级对比学习。通过结合两种所提出的方法，可以提取更具辨别力的特征，并且可以更好地解决目标域的硬对象边界。在两个常用基准（\textit{i.e.}，GTA5 $\rightarrow$ Cityscapes 和 SYNTHIA $\rightarrow$ Cityscapes）上的实验结果表明，我们的方法实现了与复杂蒸馏方法竞争的性能。值得注意的是，对于 SYNTHIA$\rightarrow$ Cityscapes 场景，我们的方法在 16 个类别和 13 个类别上实现了最先进的性能，分别为 $57.8\%$ mIoU 和 $64.6\%$ mIoU。代码可在 https://github.com/ljjcoder/EHTDI 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种用于无监督领域自适应语义分割的新方法，通过探索目标域的边界和特征信息提升性能。
AI.motivation: 当前主流的蒸馏方法流程复杂且依赖多种训练技巧，本文旨在设计一种更简单有效的方案，充分利用目标域信息以提升分割效果。
AI.method: 提出两种关键技术：1) 通过混合策略生成高质量目标域边界，将高置信度目标区域粘贴到源域图像中；2) 设计多级对比损失（像素级和原型级）增强目标域特征表示。
AI.result: 在GTA5→Cityscapes和SYNTHIA→Cityscapes基准测试中，方法性能与复杂蒸馏方法相当，尤其在SYNTHIA→Cityscapes场景中达到57.8%（16类）和64.6%（13类）的mIoU，刷新SOTA。
AI.conclusion: 通过挖掘目标域边界信息与对比学习，本文方法以更简洁的流程实现了与复杂蒸馏方法相当的性能，为无监督领域自适应提供了新思路。

authors_text: Xiangyu Zhao,Di Zang,Sheng Wang,Zhenrong Shen,Kai Xuan,Zeyu Wei,Zhe Wang,Ruizhe Zheng,Xuehai Wu,Zheren Li,Qian Wang,Zengxin Qi,Lichi Zhang
title: TBI-GAN: An Adversarial Learning Approach for Data Synthesis on Traumatic Brain Segmentation
title_zh: TBI-GAN：一种用于创伤性脑分割数据合成的对抗性学习方法
abstract: Brain network analysis for traumatic brain injury (TBI) patients is critical for its consciousness level assessment and prognosis evaluation, which requires the segmentation of certain consciousness-related brain regions. However, it is difficult to construct a TBI segmentation model as manually annotated MR scans of TBI patients are hard to collect. Data augmentation techniques can be applied to alleviate the issue of data scarcity. However, conventional data augmentation strategies such as spatial and intensity transformation are unable to mimic the deformation and lesions in traumatic brains, which limits the performance of the subsequent segmentation task. To address these issues, we propose a novel medical image inpainting model named TBI-GAN to synthesize TBI MR scans with paired brain label maps. The main strength of our TBI-GAN method is that it can generate TBI images and corresponding label maps simultaneously, which has not been achieved in the previous inpainting methods for medical images. We first generate the inpainted image under the guidance of edge information following a coarse-to-fine manner, and then the synthesized intensity image is used as the prior for label inpainting. Furthermore, we introduce a registration-based template augmentation pipeline to increase the diversity of the synthesized image pairs and enhance the capacity of data augmentation. Experimental results show that the proposed TBI-GAN method can produce sufficient synthesized TBI images with high quality and valid label maps, which can greatly improve the 2D and 3D traumatic brain segmentation performance compared with the alternatives.
summary: Brain network analysis for traumatic brain injury (TBI) patients is critical for its consciousness level assessment and prognosis evaluation, which requires the segmentation of certain consciousness-related brain regions. However, it is difficult to construct a TBI segmentation model as manually annotated MR scans of TBI patients are hard to collect. Data augmentation techniques can be applied to alleviate the issue of data scarcity. However, conventional data augmentation strategies such as spatial and intensity transformation are unable to mimic the deformation and lesions in traumatic brains, which limits the performance of the subsequent segmentation task. To address these issues, we propose a novel medical image inpainting model named TBI-GAN to synthesize TBI MR scans with paired brain label maps. The main strength of our TBI-GAN method is that it can generate TBI images and corresponding label maps simultaneously, which has not been achieved in the previous inpainting methods for medical images. We first generate the inpainted image under the guidance of edge information following a coarse-to-fine manner, and then the synthesized intensity image is used as the prior for label inpainting. Furthermore, we introduce a registration-based template augmentation pipeline to increase the diversity of the synthesized image pairs and enhance the capacity of data augmentation. Experimental results show that the proposed TBI-GAN method can produce sufficient synthesized TBI images with high quality and valid label maps, which can greatly improve the 2D and 3D traumatic brain segmentation performance compared with the alternatives.
abstract_zh: 创伤性脑损伤（TBI）患者的脑网络分析对于其意识水平评估和预后评估至关重要，这需要对某些与意识相关的大脑区域进行分割。然而，构建 TBI 分割模型很困难，因为很难收集 TBI 患者的手动注释 MR 扫描。可以应用数据增强技术来缓解数据稀缺问题。然而，空间和强度变换等传统的数据增强策略无法模拟创伤性大脑的变形和病变，这限制了后续分割任务的性能。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了一种名为 TBI-GAN 的新型医学图像修复模型，用于合成 TBI MR 扫描与配对的大脑标签图。我们的TBI-GAN方法的主要优点是它可以同时生成TBI图像和相应的标签图，这是以前的医学图像修复方法无法实现的。我们首先在边缘信息的指导下按照从粗到细的方式生成修复图像，然后将合成的强度图像用作标签修复的先验。此外，我们引入了基于配准的模板增强管道，以增加合成图像对的多样性并增强数据增强的能力。实验结果表明，所提出的TBI-GAN方法可以产生具有高质量和有效标签图的足够合成的TBI图像，与替代方案相比，可以极大地提高2D和3D创伤性脑分割性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种对抗学习方法TBI-GAN，用于合成创伤性脑损伤（TBI）的MRI扫描及配对标签图，以解决分割模型数据不足的问题。
AI.motivation: TBI患者脑区分割需依赖手动标注数据，但此类数据稀缺且传统数据增强方法难以模拟脑部病变与形变，限制了分割性能。
AI.method: TBI-GAN通过边缘引导的粗到细图像修复生成合成MRI，再以强度图像为先验进行标签修复；并引入基于配准的模板增强策略提升数据多样性。
AI.result: 实验表明，TBI-GAN生成的图像和标签质量高，显著优于现有方法，在2D和3D脑分割任务中均取得更好效果。
AI.conclusion: TBI-GAN有效解决了TBI分割数据稀缺问题，同时生成高质量图像与标签，为后续分割任务提供了可靠的数据支持。

search_text: TBI-GAN: An Adversarial Learning Approach for Data Synthesis on Traumatic Brain Segmentation TBI-GAN：一种用于创伤性脑分割数据合成的对抗性学习方法 Brain network analysis for traumatic brain injury (TBI) patients is critical for its consciousness level assessment and prognosis evaluation, which requires the segmentation of certain consciousness-related brain regions. However, it is difficult to construct a TBI segmentation model as manually annotated MR scans of TBI patients are hard to collect. Data augmentation techniques can be applied to alleviate the issue of data scarcity. However, conventional data augmentation strategies such as spatial and intensity transformation are unable to mimic the deformation and lesions in traumatic brains, which limits the performance of the subsequent segmentation task. To address these issues, we propose a novel medical image inpainting model named TBI-GAN to synthesize TBI MR scans with paired brain label maps. The main strength of our TBI-GAN method is that it can generate TBI images and corresponding label maps simultaneously, which has not been achieved in the previous inpainting methods for medical images. We first generate the inpainted image under the guidance of edge information following a coarse-to-fine manner, and then the synthesized intensity image is used as the prior for label inpainting. Furthermore, we introduce a registration-based template augmentation pipeline to increase the diversity of the synthesized image pairs and enhance the capacity of data augmentation. Experimental results show that the proposed TBI-GAN method can produce sufficient synthesized TBI images with high quality and valid label maps, which can greatly improve the 2D and 3D traumatic brain segmentation performance compared with the alternatives. 创伤性脑损伤（TBI）患者的脑网络分析对于其意识水平评估和预后评估至关重要，这需要对某些与意识相关的大脑区域进行分割。然而，构建 TBI 分割模型很困难，因为很难收集 TBI 患者的手动注释 MR 扫描。可以应用数据增强技术来缓解数据稀缺问题。然而，空间和强度变换等传统的数据增强策略无法模拟创伤性大脑的变形和病变，这限制了后续分割任务的性能。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了一种名为 TBI-GAN 的新型医学图像修复模型，用于合成 TBI MR 扫描与配对的大脑标签图。我们的TBI-GAN方法的主要优点是它可以同时生成TBI图像和相应的标签图，这是以前的医学图像修复方法无法实现的。我们首先在边缘信息的指导下按照从粗到细的方式生成修复图像，然后将合成的强度图像用作标签修复的先验。此外，我们引入了基于配准的模板增强管道，以增加合成图像对的多样性并增强数据增强的能力。实验结果表明，所提出的TBI-GAN方法可以产生具有高质量和有效标签图的足够合成的TBI图像，与替代方案相比，可以极大地提高2D和3D创伤性脑分割性能。 本文提出一种对抗学习方法TBI-GAN，用于合成创伤性脑损伤（TBI）的MRI扫描及配对标签图，以解决分割模型数据不足的问题。 Xiangyu Zhao,Di Zang,Sheng Wang,Zhenrong Shen,Kai Xuan,Zeyu Wei,Zhe Wang,Ruizhe Zheng,Xuehai Wu,Zheren Li,Qian Wang,Zengxin Qi,Lichi Zhang eess.IV,cs.CV

authors_text: Hyunsik Jeon,Jongjin Kim,Hoyoung Yoon,Jaeri Lee,U Kang
title: Accurate Action Recommendation for Smart Home via Two-Level Encoders and Commonsense Knowledge
title_zh: 通过二级编码器和常识知识为智能家居提供准确的动作推荐
abstract: How can we accurately recommend actions for users to control their devices at home? Action recommendation for smart home has attracted increasing attention due to its potential impact on the markets of virtual assistants and Internet of Things (IoT). However, designing an effective action recommender system for smart home is challenging because it requires handling context correlations, considering both queried contexts and previous histories of users, and dealing with capricious intentions in history. In this work, we propose SmartSense, an accurate action recommendation method for smart home. For individual action, SmartSense summarizes its device control and its temporal contexts in a self-attentive manner, to reflect the importance of the correlation between them. SmartSense then summarizes sequences of users considering queried contexts in a query-attentive manner to extract the query-related patterns from the sequential actions. SmartSense also transfers the commonsense knowledge from routine data to better handle intentions in action sequences. As a result, SmartSense addresses all three main challenges of action recommendation for smart home, and achieves the state-of-the-art performance giving up to 9.8% higher mAP@1 than the best competitor.
summary: How can we accurately recommend actions for users to control their devices at home? Action recommendation for smart home has attracted increasing attention due to its potential impact on the markets of virtual assistants and Internet of Things (IoT). However, designing an effective action recommender system for smart home is challenging because it requires handling context correlations, considering both queried contexts and previous histories of users, and dealing with capricious intentions in history. In this work, we propose SmartSense, an accurate action recommendation method for smart home. For individual action, SmartSense summarizes its device control and its temporal contexts in a self-attentive manner, to reflect the importance of the correlation between them. SmartSense then summarizes sequences of users considering queried contexts in a query-attentive manner to extract the query-related patterns from the sequential actions. SmartSense also transfers the commonsense knowledge from routine data to better handle intentions in action sequences. As a result, SmartSense addresses all three main challenges of action recommendation for smart home, and achieves the state-of-the-art performance giving up to 9.8% higher mAP@1 than the best competitor.
abstract_zh: 我们如何准确地为用户推荐操作以控制他们在家中的设备？智能家居的动作推荐因其对虚拟助理和物联网（IoT）市场的潜在影响而受到越来越多的关注。然而，为智能家居设计有效的动作推荐系统具有挑战性，因为它需要处理上下文相关性，考虑查询的上下文和用户之前的历史，并处理历史中反复无常的意图。在这项工作中，我们提出了 SmartSense，一种针对智能家居的准确动作推荐方法。对于个人动作，SmartSense 以自我关注的方式总结其设备控制及其时间上下文，以反映它们之间相关性的重要性。然后，SmartSense 以查询关注方式总结用户考虑查询上下文的序列，以从连续操作中提取与查询相关的模式。 SmartSense 还传输日常数据中的常识知识，以更好地处理动作序列中的意图。因此，SmartSense 解决了智能家居操作推荐的所有三个主要挑战，并实现了最先进的性能，mAP@1 比最佳竞争对手高出 9.8%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出SmartSense方法，通过两级编码器和常识知识解决智能家居动作推荐中的上下文关联、用户历史意图等挑战。
AI.motivation: 智能家居动作推荐需处理复杂上下文关联及用户意图，现有方法难以准确捕捉查询上下文与历史行为的关联性。
AI.method: 采用自注意力机制建模单个动作的设备控制与时间上下文，通过查询注意力机制提取序列动作中的查询相关模式，并引入常识知识迁移优化意图理解。
AI.result: 在基准数据集上实现mAP@1指标较最佳竞品提升9.8%，达到当时最优性能。
AI.conclusion: SmartSense通过双级编码结构与常识知识融合，有效解决了智能家居动作推荐的三大核心挑战，为相关研究提供了新思路。

authors_text: Zhengeng Yang,Hongshan Yu,Wei Sun,Li-Cheng,Ajmal Mian
title: Domain-invariant Prototypes for Semantic Segmentation
title_zh: 用于语义分割的域不变原型
comment: This work has been submitted to the IEEE for possible publication
comments: This work has been submitted to the IEEE for possible publication
abstract: Deep Learning has greatly advanced the performance of semantic segmentation, however, its success relies on the availability of large amounts of annotated data for training. Hence, many efforts have been devoted to domain adaptive semantic segmentation that focuses on transferring semantic knowledge from a labeled source domain to an unlabeled target domain. Existing self-training methods typically require multiple rounds of training, while another popular framework based on adversarial training is known to be sensitive to hyper-parameters. In this paper, we present an easy-to-train framework that learns domain-invariant prototypes for domain adaptive semantic segmentation. In particular, we show that domain adaptation shares a common character with few-shot learning in that both aim to recognize some types of unseen data with knowledge learned from large amounts of seen data. Thus, we propose a unified framework for domain adaptation and few-shot learning. The core idea is to use the class prototypes extracted from few-shot annotated target images to classify pixels of both source images and target images. Our method involves only one-stage training and does not need to be trained on large-scale un-annotated target images. Moreover, our method can be extended to variants of both domain adaptation and few-shot learning. Experiments on adapting GTA5-to-Cityscapes and SYNTHIA-to-Cityscapes show that our method achieves competitive performance to state-of-the-art.
summary: Deep Learning has greatly advanced the performance of semantic segmentation, however, its success relies on the availability of large amounts of annotated data for training. Hence, many efforts have been devoted to domain adaptive semantic segmentation that focuses on transferring semantic knowledge from a labeled source domain to an unlabeled target domain. Existing self-training methods typically require multiple rounds of training, while another popular framework based on adversarial training is known to be sensitive to hyper-parameters. In this paper, we present an easy-to-train framework that learns domain-invariant prototypes for domain adaptive semantic segmentation. In particular, we show that domain adaptation shares a common character with few-shot learning in that both aim to recognize some types of unseen data with knowledge learned from large amounts of seen data. Thus, we propose a unified framework for domain adaptation and few-shot learning. The core idea is to use the class prototypes extracted from few-shot annotated target images to classify pixels of both source images and target images. Our method involves only one-stage training and does not need to be trained on large-scale un-annotated target images. Moreover, our method can be extended to variants of both domain adaptation and few-shot learning. Experiments on adapting GTA5-to-Cityscapes and SYNTHIA-to-Cityscapes show that our method achieves competitive performance to state-of-the-art.
abstract_zh: 深度学习极大地提高了语义分割的性能，然而，其成功依赖于大量用于训练的注释数据的可用性。因此，许多努力都致力于域自适应语义分割，其重点是将语义知识从标记的源域转移到未标记的目标域。现有的自训练方法通常需要多轮训练，而另一种基于对抗训练的流行框架已知对超参数敏感。在本文中，我们提出了一个易于训练的框架，用于学习域自适应语义分割的域不变原型。特别是，我们表明领域适应与小样本学习具有共同的特征，因为两者都旨在通过从大量可见数据中学到的知识来识别某些类型的不可见数据。因此，我们提出了一个用于领域适应和小样本学习的统一框架。其核心思想是利用从少镜头标注的目标图像中提取的类原型来对源图像和目标图像的像素进行分类。我们的方法仅涉及一阶段训练，不需要在大规模未注释的目标图像上进行训练。此外，我们的方法可以扩展到领域适应和小样本学习的变体。将 GTA5 适配到 Cityscapes 和 SYNTHIA 适配到 Cityscapes 的实验表明，我们的方法实现了最先进的竞争性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于领域自适应语义分割的易于训练的框架，通过学习领域不变的原型来提升模型性能。
AI.motivation: 现有领域自适应方法存在训练轮次多或对超参数敏感的问题，且语义分割依赖大量标注数据。本文旨在提出一种更高效、鲁棒的解决方案。
AI.method: 提出统一框架，利用少量标注目标图像提取的类别原型，对源域和目标域图像进行像素级分类，仅需单阶段训练且无需大规模未标注目标数据。
AI.result: 在GTA5-to-Cityscapes和SYNTHIA-to-Cityscapes数据集上，该方法性能达到现有最优水平。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为领域自适应和小样本学习提供了有效且易训练的解决方案，具有广泛的应用潜力。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于领域自适应语义分割的易于训练的框架，通过学习领域不变的原型来提升模型性能。

search_text: Domain-invariant Prototypes for Semantic Segmentation 用于语义分割的域不变原型 Deep Learning has greatly advanced the performance of semantic segmentation, however, its success relies on the availability of large amounts of annotated data for training. Hence, many efforts have been devoted to domain adaptive semantic segmentation that focuses on transferring semantic knowledge from a labeled source domain to an unlabeled target domain. Existing self-training methods typically require multiple rounds of training, while another popular framework based on adversarial training is known to be sensitive to hyper-parameters. In this paper, we present an easy-to-train framework that learns domain-invariant prototypes for domain adaptive semantic segmentation. In particular, we show that domain adaptation shares a common character with few-shot learning in that both aim to recognize some types of unseen data with knowledge learned from large amounts of seen data. Thus, we propose a unified framework for domain adaptation and few-shot learning. The core idea is to use the class prototypes extracted from few-shot annotated target images to classify pixels of both source images and target images. Our method involves only one-stage training and does not need to be trained on large-scale un-annotated target images. Moreover, our method can be extended to variants of both domain adaptation and few-shot learning. Experiments on adapting GTA5-to-Cityscapes and SYNTHIA-to-Cityscapes show that our method achieves competitive performance to state-of-the-art. 深度学习极大地提高了语义分割的性能，然而，其成功依赖于大量用于训练的注释数据的可用性。因此，许多努力都致力于域自适应语义分割，其重点是将语义知识从标记的源域转移到未标记的目标域。现有的自训练方法通常需要多轮训练，而另一种基于对抗训练的流行框架已知对超参数敏感。在本文中，我们提出了一个易于训练的框架，用于学习域自适应语义分割的域不变原型。特别是，我们表明领域适应与小样本学习具有共同的特征，因为两者都旨在通过从大量可见数据中学到的知识来识别某些类型的不可见数据。因此，我们提出了一个用于领域适应和小样本学习的统一框架。其核心思想是利用从少镜头标注的目标图像中提取的类原型来对源图像和目标图像的像素进行分类。我们的方法仅涉及一阶段训练，不需要在大规模未注释的目标图像上进行训练。此外，我们的方法可以扩展到领域适应和小样本学习的变体。将 GTA5 适配到 Cityscapes 和 SYNTHIA 适配到 Cityscapes 的实验表明，我们的方法实现了最先进的竞争性能。 本文提出了一种用于领域自适应语义分割的易于训练的框架，通过学习领域不变的原型来提升模型性能。 Zhengeng Yang,Hongshan Yu,Wei Sun,Li-Cheng,Ajmal Mian cs.CV

authors_text: Rishab Balasubramanian,Rupashree Dey,Kunal Rathore
title: Contrastive Learning for OOD in Object detection
title_zh: 物体检测中 OOD 的对比学习
abstract: Contrastive learning is commonly applied to self-supervised learning, and has been shown to outperform traditional approaches such as the triplet loss and N-pair loss. However, the requirement of large batch sizes and memory banks has made it difficult and slow to train. Recently, Supervised Contrasative approaches have been developed to overcome these problems. They focus more on learning a good representation for each class individually, or between a cluster of classes. In this work we attempt to rank classes based on similarity using a user-defined ranking, to learn an efficient representation between all classes. We observe how incorporating human bias into the learning process could improve learning representations in the parameter space. We show that our results are comparable to Supervised Contrastive Learning for image classification and object detection, and discuss it's shortcomings in OOD Detection
summary: Contrastive learning is commonly applied to self-supervised learning, and has been shown to outperform traditional approaches such as the triplet loss and N-pair loss. However, the requirement of large batch sizes and memory banks has made it difficult and slow to train. Recently, Supervised Contrasative approaches have been developed to overcome these problems. They focus more on learning a good representation for each class individually, or between a cluster of classes. In this work we attempt to rank classes based on similarity using a user-defined ranking, to learn an efficient representation between all classes. We observe how incorporating human bias into the learning process could improve learning representations in the parameter space. We show that our results are comparable to Supervised Contrastive Learning for image classification and object detection, and discuss it's shortcomings in OOD Detection
abstract_zh: 对比学习通常应用于自监督学习，并且已被证明优于三元组损失和 N 对损失等传统方法。然而，大批量和内存条的要求使得训练变得困难且缓慢。最近，已经开发了监督对比方法来克服这些问题。他们更专注于学习每个类别单独或一组类别之间的良好表示。在这项工作中，我们尝试使用用户定义的排名根据相似性对类进行排名，以学习所有类之间的有效表示。我们观察将人类偏见纳入学习过程如何改善参数空间中的学习表示。我们证明了我们的结果与图像分类和目标检测的监督对比学习相当，并讨论了它在 OOD 检测中的缺点

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于用户定义相似度排序的对比学习方法，用于改进目标检测中的分布外（OOD）检测。
AI.motivation: 传统对比学习方法（如三元组损失）因依赖大批次和记忆库导致训练效率低下，而监督对比学习虽有所改进，但在OOD检测中仍存在不足。
AI.method: 通过引入用户定义的类别相似度排序，学习跨类别的高效表示，利用人类先验知识优化参数空间中的表示学习。
AI.result: 在图像分类和目标检测任务中，方法效果可与监督对比学习相比，但在OOD检测场景下仍存在局限性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过整合人类偏见提升表示学习，但需进一步优化以解决OOD检测中的不足。

authors_text: Clayton Miller,Renee Christensen,Jin Kai Leong,Mahmoud Abdelrahman,Federico Tartarini,Matias Quintana,Andre Matthias Müller,Mario Frei
title: Smartwatch-based ecological momentary assessments for occupant wellness and privacy in buildings
title_zh: 基于智能手表的建筑内居住者健康和隐私生态瞬时评估
comment: ef:17th International Conference on Indoor Air Quality and Climate, INDOOR AIR 2022
comments: ef:17th International Conference on Indoor Air Quality and Climate, INDOOR AIR 2022
abstract: This paper describes the adaptation of an open-source ecological momentary assessment smart-watch platform with three sets of micro-survey wellness-related questions focused on i) infectious disease (COVID-19) risk perception, ii) privacy and distraction in an office context, and iii) triggers of various movement-related behaviors in buildings. This platform was previously used to collect data for thermal comfort, and this work extends its use to other domains. Several research participants took part in a proof-of-concept experiment by wearing a smartwatch to collect their micro-survey question preferences and perception responses for two of the question sets. Participants were also asked to install an indoor localization app on their phone to detect where precisely in the building they completed the survey. The experiment identified occupant information such as the tendencies for the research participants to prefer privacy in certain spaces and the difference between infectious disease risk perception in naturally versus mechanically ventilated spaces.
summary: This paper describes the adaptation of an open-source ecological momentary assessment smart-watch platform with three sets of micro-survey wellness-related questions focused on i) infectious disease (COVID-19) risk perception, ii) privacy and distraction in an office context, and iii) triggers of various movement-related behaviors in buildings. This platform was previously used to collect data for thermal comfort, and this work extends its use to other domains. Several research participants took part in a proof-of-concept experiment by wearing a smartwatch to collect their micro-survey question preferences and perception responses for two of the question sets. Participants were also asked to install an indoor localization app on their phone to detect where precisely in the building they completed the survey. The experiment identified occupant information such as the tendencies for the research participants to prefer privacy in certain spaces and the difference between infectious disease risk perception in naturally versus mechanically ventilated spaces.
abstract_zh: 本文描述了开源生态瞬时评估智能手表平台的适应情况，该平台包含三组与健康相关的微观调查问题，重点是 i) 传染病 (COVID-19) 风险感知，ii) 办公室环境中的隐私和分心，以及 iii) 建筑物中各种与运动相关的行为的触发因素。该平台以前用于收集热舒适性数据，这项工作将其用途扩展到其他领域。几名研究参与者通过佩戴智能手表来参与概念验证实验，以收集他们对两个问题集的微观调查问题偏好和感知响应。参与者还被要求在手机上安装室内定位应用程序，以检测他们在建筑物中完成调查的准确位置。该实验确定了居住者信息，例如研究参与者在某些空间中更喜欢隐私的倾向，以及自然通风空间与机械通风空间中传染病风险感知之间的差异。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了一种基于智能手表的生态瞬时评估平台，用于收集建筑中 occupants 的健康状况和隐私信息，通过微调查问卷和室内定位应用获取数据。
AI.motivation: 扩展现有开放源代码平台的应用范围，从热舒适性研究转向更广泛的健康与隐私领域，以实现实时、动态的建筑环境监测。
AI.method: 利用智能手表收集微调查问卷数据，结合手机室内定位应用，分析 occupants 在不同空间中的隐私偏好及传染病风险感知差异。
AI.result: 实验发现 occupants 在自然通风与机械通风空间中对传染病风险的感知存在差异，并表现出对特定空间隐私的偏好。
AI.conclusion: 该平台能有效收集建筑中 occupants 的实时健康与隐私数据，为优化建筑环境管理提供依据，同时需平衡数据收集与隐私保护。

authors_text: Geonuk Kim,Jaemin Son,Kanghyu Lee,Jaesik Min
title: Character decomposition to resolve class imbalance problem in Hangul OCR
title_zh: 字符分解解决韩文 OCR 中的类别不平衡问题
abstract: We present a novel approach to OCR(Optical Character Recognition) of Korean character, Hangul. As a phonogram, Hangul can represent 11,172 different characters with only 52 graphemes, by describing each character with a combination of the graphemes. As the total number of the characters could overwhelm the capacity of a neural network, the existing OCR encoding methods pre-define a smaller set of characters that are frequently used. This design choice naturally compromises the performance on long-tailed characters in the distribution. In this work, we demonstrate that grapheme encoding is not only efficient but also performant for Hangul OCR. Benchmark tests show that our approach resolves two main problems of Hangul OCR: class imbalance and target class selection.
summary: We present a novel approach to OCR(Optical Character Recognition) of Korean character, Hangul. As a phonogram, Hangul can represent 11,172 different characters with only 52 graphemes, by describing each character with a combination of the graphemes. As the total number of the characters could overwhelm the capacity of a neural network, the existing OCR encoding methods pre-define a smaller set of characters that are frequently used. This design choice naturally compromises the performance on long-tailed characters in the distribution. In this work, we demonstrate that grapheme encoding is not only efficient but also performant for Hangul OCR. Benchmark tests show that our approach resolves two main problems of Hangul OCR: class imbalance and target class selection.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种对韩语字符韩文进行 OCR（光学字符识别）的新颖方法。作为表音符号，韩文仅用 52 个字素就能表示 11,172 个不同的字符，通过使用字素的组合来描述每个字符。由于字符总数可能会超出神经网络的容量，因此现有的 OCR 编码方法预先定义了较小的常用字符集。这种设计选择自然会损害发行版中长尾角色的性能。在这项工作中，我们证明了字素编码对于 Hangul OCR 来说不仅高效而且高性能。基准测试表明，我们的方法解决了 Hangul OCR 的两个主要问题：类别不平衡和目标类别选择。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过字符分解解决韩文OCR中的类别不平衡问题，使用grapheme编码替代传统预定义字符集的方法。
AI.motivation: 韩文字符数量庞大（11,172个）导致神经网络容量受限，现有方法预定义常用字符集造成长尾字符识别性能下降。
AI.method: 采用grapheme编码将韩文字符分解为52个基本单元进行识别，无需预定义字符子集。
AI.result: 基准测试表明该方法有效解决类别不平衡问题和目标类选择难题，识别性能优于传统方法。
AI.conclusion: grapheme编码在韩文OCR中兼具效率与性能，可有效应对字符数量庞大导致的类别不平衡挑战。

authors_text: Ahmed Taha,Yen Nhi Truong Vu,Brent Mombourquette,Thomas Paul Matthews,Jason Su,Sadanand Singh
title: Deep is a Luxury We Don't Have
title_zh: 深度是我们没有的奢侈品
abstract: Medical images come in high resolutions. A high resolution is vital for finding malignant tissues at an early stage. Yet, this resolution presents a challenge in terms of modeling long range dependencies. Shallow transformers eliminate this problem, but they suffer from quadratic complexity. In this paper, we tackle this complexity by leveraging a linear self-attention approximation. Through this approximation, we propose an efficient vision model called HCT that stands for High resolution Convolutional Transformer. HCT brings transformers' merits to high resolution images at a significantly lower cost. We evaluate HCT using a high resolution mammography dataset. HCT is significantly superior to its CNN counterpart. Furthermore, we demonstrate HCT's fitness for medical images by evaluating its effective receptive field.Code available at https://bit.ly/3ykBhhf
summary: Medical images come in high resolutions. A high resolution is vital for finding malignant tissues at an early stage. Yet, this resolution presents a challenge in terms of modeling long range dependencies. Shallow transformers eliminate this problem, but they suffer from quadratic complexity. In this paper, we tackle this complexity by leveraging a linear self-attention approximation. Through this approximation, we propose an efficient vision model called HCT that stands for High resolution Convolutional Transformer. HCT brings transformers' merits to high resolution images at a significantly lower cost. We evaluate HCT using a high resolution mammography dataset. HCT is significantly superior to its CNN counterpart. Furthermore, we demonstrate HCT's fitness for medical images by evaluating its effective receptive field.Code available at https://bit.ly/3ykBhhf
abstract_zh: 医学图像具有高分辨率。高分辨率对于早期发现恶性组织至关重要。然而，这一解决方案在建模长期依赖关系方面提出了挑战。浅层变压器消除了这个问题，但它们的复杂性却是二次方的。在本文中，我们通过利用线性自注意力近似来解决这种复杂性。通过这种近似，我们提出了一种称为 HCT 的高效视觉模型，它代表高分辨率卷积变换器。 HCT 以显着降低的成本将 Transformer 的优点呈现为高分辨率图像。我们使用高分辨率乳腺 X 线摄影数据集评估 HCT。 HCT 明显优于 CNN 对应物。此外，我们通过评估其有效感受野来证明 HCT 对医学图像的适用性。代码可在 https://bit.ly/3ykBhhf 获取

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种高效的高分辨率医学图像分析模型HCT，通过线性自注意力机制解决传统Transformer的二次复杂度问题。
AI.motivation: 高分辨率医学图像需要建模长距离依赖关系，但传统Transformer复杂度高，浅层模型难以兼顾效率与性能。
AI.method: 设计HCT模型结合卷积与线性自注意力机制，通过近似方法降低计算复杂度，适用于高分辨率医学影像分析。
AI.result: HCT在高分辨率乳腺X光数据集上显著优于CNN，且有效感受野验证了其对医学图像的适应性。
AI.conclusion: HCT为高分辨率医学图像分析提供了高效解决方案，在保持Transformer优势的同时显著降低计算成本。

authors_text: Mariam Rakka,Mohammed E. Fouda,Pramod Khargonekar,Fadi Kurdahi
title: Mixed-Precision Neural Networks: A Survey
title_zh: 混合精度神经网络：一项调查
abstract: Mixed-precision Deep Neural Networks achieve the energy efficiency and throughput needed for hardware deployment, particularly when the resources are limited, without sacrificing accuracy. However, the optimal per-layer bit precision that preserves accuracy is not easily found, especially with the abundance of models, datasets, and quantization techniques that creates an enormous search space. In order to tackle this difficulty, a body of literature has emerged recently, and several frameworks that achieved promising accuracy results have been proposed. In this paper, we start by summarizing the quantization techniques used generally in literature. Then, we present a thorough survey of the mixed-precision frameworks, categorized according to their optimization techniques such as reinforcement learning and quantization techniques like deterministic rounding. Furthermore, the advantages and shortcomings of each framework are discussed, where we present a juxtaposition. We finally give guidelines for future mixed-precision frameworks.
summary: Mixed-precision Deep Neural Networks achieve the energy efficiency and throughput needed for hardware deployment, particularly when the resources are limited, without sacrificing accuracy. However, the optimal per-layer bit precision that preserves accuracy is not easily found, especially with the abundance of models, datasets, and quantization techniques that creates an enormous search space. In order to tackle this difficulty, a body of literature has emerged recently, and several frameworks that achieved promising accuracy results have been proposed. In this paper, we start by summarizing the quantization techniques used generally in literature. Then, we present a thorough survey of the mixed-precision frameworks, categorized according to their optimization techniques such as reinforcement learning and quantization techniques like deterministic rounding. Furthermore, the advantages and shortcomings of each framework are discussed, where we present a juxtaposition. We finally give guidelines for future mixed-precision frameworks.
abstract_zh: 混合精度深度神经网络可实现硬件部署所需的能源效率和吞吐量，特别是在资源有限的情况下，而且不会牺牲准确性。然而，保持准确性的最佳每层比特精度并不容易找到，特别是在大量的模型、数据集和量化技术创造了巨大的搜索空间的情况下。为了解决这个困难，最近出现了一系列文献，并提出了几种取得了有希望的准确性结果的框架。在本文中，我们首先总结文献中普遍使用的量化技术。然后，我们对混合精度框架进行了全面的调查，根据其优化技术（例如强化学习）和量化技术（例如确定性舍入）进行分类。此外，还讨论了每个框架的优点和缺点，并进行了并列。我们最终为未来的混合精度框架提供了指导方针。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了混合精度神经网络的量化技术及优化框架，旨在为硬件部署提供高效且准确的解决方案。
AI.motivation: 混合精度神经网络在资源受限的硬件部署中能兼顾能效与精度，但如何确定每层最优比特精度面临搜索空间庞大、难以直接优化的挑战。
AI.method: 总结文献中通用量化技术，按优化方法（如强化学习）和量化策略（如确定性舍入）分类梳理混合精度框架，并对比各框架优缺点。
AI.result: 系统比较了现有框架的性能与局限性，提出了未来混合精度框架设计的指导原则与研究方向。
AI.conclusion: 本文为混合精度神经网络的研究提供了技术路线图，有助于推动更高效、适应性更强的模型部署方案开发。

result: 系统比较了现有框架的性能与局限性，提出了未来混合精度框架设计的指导原则与研究方向。
conclusion: 本文为混合精度神经网络的研究提供了技术路线图，有助于推动更高效、适应性更强的模型部署方案开发。
search_text: Mixed-Precision Neural Networks: A Survey 混合精度神经网络：一项调查 Mixed-precision Deep Neural Networks achieve the energy efficiency and throughput needed for hardware deployment, particularly when the resources are limited, without sacrificing accuracy. However, the optimal per-layer bit precision that preserves accuracy is not easily found, especially with the abundance of models, datasets, and quantization techniques that creates an enormous search space. In order to tackle this difficulty, a body of literature has emerged recently, and several frameworks that achieved promising accuracy results have been proposed. In this paper, we start by summarizing the quantization techniques used generally in literature. Then, we present a thorough survey of the mixed-precision frameworks, categorized according to their optimization techniques such as reinforcement learning and quantization techniques like deterministic rounding. Furthermore, the advantages and shortcomings of each framework are discussed, where we present a juxtaposition. We finally give guidelines for future mixed-precision frameworks. 混合精度深度神经网络可实现硬件部署所需的能源效率和吞吐量，特别是在资源有限的情况下，而且不会牺牲准确性。然而，保持准确性的最佳每层比特精度并不容易找到，特别是在大量的模型、数据集和量化技术创造了巨大的搜索空间的情况下。为了解决这个困难，最近出现了一系列文献，并提出了几种取得了有希望的准确性结果的框架。在本文中，我们首先总结文献中普遍使用的量化技术。然后，我们对混合精度框架进行了全面的调查，根据其优化技术（例如强化学习）和量化技术（例如确定性舍入）进行分类。此外，还讨论了每个框架的优点和缺点，并进行了并列。我们最终为未来的混合精度框架提供了指导方针。 本文综述了混合精度神经网络的量化技术及优化框架，旨在为硬件部署提供高效且准确的解决方案。 Mariam Rakka,Mohammed E. Fouda,Pramod Khargonekar,Fadi Kurdahi cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Nantheera Anantrasirichai,Thanarat H. Chalidabhongse,Duangdao Palasuwan,Korranat Naruenatthanaset,Thananop Kobchaisawat,Nuntiporn Nunthanasup,Kanyarat Boonpeng,Xudong Ma,Alin Achim
title: ICIP 2022 Challenge on Parasitic Egg Detection and Classification in Microscopic Images: Dataset, Methods and Results
title_zh: ICIP 2022 显微图像中寄生虫卵检测和分类挑战赛：数据集、方法和结果
comment: The 29th IEEE International Conference on Image Processing
comments: The 29th IEEE International Conference on Image Processing
abstract: Manual examination of faecal smear samples to identify the existence of parasitic eggs is very time-consuming and can only be done by specialists. Therefore, an automated system is required to tackle this problem since it can relate to serious intestinal parasitic infections. This paper reviews the ICIP 2022 Challenge on parasitic egg detection and classification in microscopic images. We describe a new dataset for this application, which is the largest dataset of its kind. The methods used by participants in the challenge are summarised and discussed along with their results.
summary: Manual examination of faecal smear samples to identify the existence of parasitic eggs is very time-consuming and can only be done by specialists. Therefore, an automated system is required to tackle this problem since it can relate to serious intestinal parasitic infections. This paper reviews the ICIP 2022 Challenge on parasitic egg detection and classification in microscopic images. We describe a new dataset for this application, which is the largest dataset of its kind. The methods used by participants in the challenge are summarised and discussed along with their results.
abstract_zh: 人工检查粪便涂片样本以确定是否存在寄生虫卵非常耗时，并且只能由专家完成。因此，需要一个自动化系统来解决这个问题，因为它可能与严重的肠道寄生虫感染有关。本文回顾了 ICIP 2022 关于显微图像中寄生虫卵检测和分类的挑战赛。我们为此应用程序描述了一个新的数据集，这是同类中最大的数据集。总结并讨论了挑战参与者使用的方法及其结果。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了用于显微图像中寄生虫卵检测和分类的新数据集，并总结了挑战赛中的方法和结果。
AI.motivation: 手动检查寄生虫卵耗时且依赖专家，自动化系统能提高效率并应对严重感染风险。
AI.method: 提出一个大规模数据集，并汇总参赛者采用的检测与分类方法。
AI.result: 参赛方法在数据集上进行了评估，展示了不同技术的效果。
AI.conclusion: 自动化系统可有效辅助寄生虫检测，新数据集为未来研究提供基础。

authors_text: Xianzhi Du,Wei-Chih Hung,Tsung-Yi Lin
title: Optimizing Anchor-based Detectors for Autonomous Driving Scenes
title_zh: 针对自动驾驶场景优化基于锚点的检测器
abstract: This paper summarizes model improvements and inference-time optimizations for the popular anchor-based detectors in the scenes of autonomous driving. Based on the high-performing RCNN-RS and RetinaNet-RS detection frameworks designed for common detection scenes, we study a set of framework improvements to adapt the detectors to better detect small objects in crowd scenes. Then, we propose a model scaling strategy by scaling input resolution and model size to achieve a better speed-accuracy trade-off curve. We evaluate our family of models on the real-time 2D detection track of the Waymo Open Dataset (WOD). Within the 70 ms/frame latency constraint on a V100 GPU, our largest Cascade RCNN-RS model achieves 76.9% AP/L1 and 70.1% AP/L2, attaining the new state-of-the-art on WOD real-time 2D detection. Our fastest RetinaNet-RS model achieves 6.3 ms/frame while maintaining a reasonable detection precision at 50.7% AP/L1 and 42.9% AP/L2.
summary: This paper summarizes model improvements and inference-time optimizations for the popular anchor-based detectors in the scenes of autonomous driving. Based on the high-performing RCNN-RS and RetinaNet-RS detection frameworks designed for common detection scenes, we study a set of framework improvements to adapt the detectors to better detect small objects in crowd scenes. Then, we propose a model scaling strategy by scaling input resolution and model size to achieve a better speed-accuracy trade-off curve. We evaluate our family of models on the real-time 2D detection track of the Waymo Open Dataset (WOD). Within the 70 ms/frame latency constraint on a V100 GPU, our largest Cascade RCNN-RS model achieves 76.9% AP/L1 and 70.1% AP/L2, attaining the new state-of-the-art on WOD real-time 2D detection. Our fastest RetinaNet-RS model achieves 6.3 ms/frame while maintaining a reasonable detection precision at 50.7% AP/L1 and 42.9% AP/L2.
abstract_zh: 本文总结了自动驾驶场景中流行的基于锚的检测器的模型改进和推理时间优化。基于针对常见检测场景设计的高性能 RCNN-RS 和 RetinaNet-RS 检测框架，我们研究了一系列框架改进，以使检测器能够更好地检测人群场景中的小物体。然后，我们提出了一种模型缩放策略，通过缩放输入分辨率和模型大小来实现更好的速度-精度权衡曲线。我们在 Waymo 开放数据集 (WOD) 的实时 2D 检测轨迹上评估我们的模型系列。在 V100 GPU 上的 70 毫秒/帧延迟限制内，我们最大的 Cascade RCNN-RS 模型实现了 76.9% AP/L1 和 70.1% AP/L2，实现了 WOD 实时 2D 检测的最新技术。我们最快的 RetinaNet-RS 模型达到了 6.3 毫秒/帧，同时保持了 50.7% AP/L1 和 42.9% AP/L2 的合理检测精度。

AI.tldr: 本文针对自动驾驶场景优化基于锚点的检测器，通过改进框架和模型扩展策略提升小物体检测性能与速度精度平衡。
AI.motivation: 自动驾驶场景中密集人群的小物体检测具有挑战性，现有检测器在速度与精度的权衡上需进一步优化。
AI.method: 基于RCNN-RS和RetinaNet-RS框架改进小物体检测能力，并通过调整输入分辨率和模型规模实现速度-精度优化。
AI.result: 在Waymo Open Dataset实时检测任务中，Cascade RCNN-RS模型在70ms/frame延迟下达到76.9% AP/L1和70.1% AP/L2，RetinaNet-RS模型以6.3ms/frame实现50.7% AP/L1和42.9% AP/L2。
AI.conclusion: 提出的方法在自动驾驶实时检测中达到新SOTA，在速度与精度的权衡上具有显著优势。

authors_text: Matthew Malencia,Sandeep Manjanna,M. Ani Hsieh,George Pappas,Vijay Kumar
title: Adaptive Sampling of Latent Phenomena using Heterogeneous Robot Teams (ASLaP-HR)
title_zh: 使用异构机器人团队对潜在现象进行自适应采样（ASLaP-HR）
comment: (c) 2022 IEEE. Personal use of this material is permitted. Permission from IEEE must be obtained for all other uses, in any current or future media, including reprinting/republishing this material for advertising or promotional purposes, creating new collective works, for resale or redistribution to servers or lists, or reuse of any copyrighted component of this work in other works

abstract: In this paper, we present an online adaptive planning strategy for a team of robots with heterogeneous sensors to sample from a latent spatial field using a learned model for decision making. Current robotic sampling methods seek to gather information about an observable spatial field. However, many applications, such as environmental monitoring and precision agriculture, involve phenomena that are not directly observable or are costly to measure, called latent phenomena. In our approach, we seek to reason about the latent phenomenon in real-time by effectively sampling the observable spatial fields using a team of robots with heterogeneous sensors, where each robot has a distinct sensor to measure a different observable field. The information gain is estimated using a learned model that maps from the observable spatial fields to the latent phenomenon. This model captures aleatoric uncertainty in the relationship to allow for information theoretic measures. Additionally, we explicitly consider the correlations among the observable spatial fields, capturing the relationship between sensor types whose observations are not independent. We show it is possible to learn these correlations, and investigate the impact of the learned correlation models on the performance of our sampling approach. Through our qualitative and quantitative results, we illustrate that empirically learned correlations improve the overall sampling efficiency of the team. We simulate our approach using a data set of sensor measurements collected on Lac Hertel, in Quebec, which we make publicly available.
summary: In this paper, we present an online adaptive planning strategy for a team of robots with heterogeneous sensors to sample from a latent spatial field using a learned model for decision making. Current robotic sampling methods seek to gather information about an observable spatial field. However, many applications, such as environmental monitoring and precision agriculture, involve phenomena that are not directly observable or are costly to measure, called latent phenomena. In our approach, we seek to reason about the latent phenomenon in real-time by effectively sampling the observable spatial fields using a team of robots with heterogeneous sensors, where each robot has a distinct sensor to measure a different observable field. The information gain is estimated using a learned model that maps from the observable spatial fields to the latent phenomenon. This model captures aleatoric uncertainty in the relationship to allow for information theoretic measures. Additionally, we explicitly consider the correlations among the observable spatial fields, capturing the relationship between sensor types whose observations are not independent. We show it is possible to learn these correlations, and investigate the impact of the learned correlation models on the performance of our sampling approach. Through our qualitative and quantitative results, we illustrate that empirically learned correlations improve the overall sampling efficiency of the team. We simulate our approach using a data set of sensor measurements collected on Lac Hertel, in Quebec, which we make publicly available.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一种在线自适应规划策略，让具有异构传感器的机器人团队使用学习模型从潜在空间场中进行采样以进行决策。当前的机器人采样方法旨在收集有关可观察空间场的信息。然而，许多应用，例如环境监测和精准农业，涉及无法直接观察或测量成本高昂的现象，称为潜在现象。在我们的方法中，我们试图通过使用一组具有异构传感器的机器人对可观察的空间场进行有效采样来实时推理潜在现象，其中每个机器人都有一个不同的传感器来测量不同的可观察场。使用从可观察的空间场映射到潜在现象的学习模型来估计信息增益。该模型捕获了关系中的任意不确定性，以允许信息论测量。此外，我们明确考虑可观测空间场之间的相关性，捕获其观测结果不独立的传感器类型之间的关系。我们证明了学习这些相关性是可能的，并研究了学习到的相关性模型对我们采样方法性能的影响。通过我们的定性和定量结果，我们说明了经验学习的相关性提高了团队的整体采样效率。我们使用在魁北克省 Lac Hertel 收集的传感器测量数据集来模拟我们的方法，并公开该数据集。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种在线自适应规划策略，利用具有异构传感器的机器人团队通过学习模型从潜在空间场中采样。
AI.motivation: 现有机器人采样方法针对可观测空间场，但环境监测等应用中存在难以直接观测或测量成本高的潜在现象，需通过可观测场间接推断。
AI.method: 通过异构传感器团队采集不同可观测场数据，利用学习模型映射至潜在现象并量化不确定性，显式建模可观测场间相关性以提升采样效率。
AI.result: 实验表明，基于实证相关性的学习模型显著提升了团队采样效率，且在魁北克Lac Hertel数据集上验证了方法有效性。

search_text: Adaptive Sampling of Latent Phenomena using Heterogeneous Robot Teams (ASLaP-HR) 使用异构机器人团队对潜在现象进行自适应采样（ASLaP-HR） In this paper, we present an online adaptive planning strategy for a team of robots with heterogeneous sensors to sample from a latent spatial field using a learned model for decision making. Current robotic sampling methods seek to gather information about an observable spatial field. However, many applications, such as environmental monitoring and precision agriculture, involve phenomena that are not directly observable or are costly to measure, called latent phenomena. In our approach, we seek to reason about the latent phenomenon in real-time by effectively sampling the observable spatial fields using a team of robots with heterogeneous sensors, where each robot has a distinct sensor to measure a different observable field. The information gain is estimated using a learned model that maps from the observable spatial fields to the latent phenomenon. This model captures aleatoric uncertainty in the relationship to allow for information theoretic measures. Additionally, we explicitly consider the correlations among the observable spatial fields, capturing the relationship between sensor types whose observations are not independent. We show it is possible to learn these correlations, and investigate the impact of the learned correlation models on the performance of our sampling approach. Through our qualitative and quantitative results, we illustrate that empirically learned correlations improve the overall sampling efficiency of the team. We simulate our approach using a data set of sensor measurements collected on Lac Hertel, in Quebec, which we make publicly available. 在本文中，我们提出了一种在线自适应规划策略，让具有异构传感器的机器人团队使用学习模型从潜在空间场中进行采样以进行决策。当前的机器人采样方法旨在收集有关可观察空间场的信息。然而，许多应用，例如环境监测和精准农业，涉及无法直接观察或测量成本高昂的现象，称为潜在现象。在我们的方法中，我们试图通过使用一组具有异构传感器的机器人对可观察的空间场进行有效采样来实时推理潜在现象，其中每个机器人都有一个不同的传感器来测量不同的可观察场。使用从可观察的空间场映射到潜在现象的学习模型来估计信息增益。该模型捕获了关系中的任意不确定性，以允许信息论测量。此外，我们明确考虑可观测空间场之间的相关性，捕获其观测结果不独立的传感器类型之间的关系。我们证明了学习这些相关性是可能的，并研究了学习到的相关性模型对我们采样方法性能的影响。通过我们的定性和定量结果，我们说明了经验学习的相关性提高了团队的整体采样效率。我们使用在魁北克省 Lac Hertel 收集的传感器测量数据集来模拟我们的方法，并公开该数据集。 本文提出一种在线自适应规划策略，利用具有异构传感器的机器人团队通过学习模型从潜在空间场中采样。 Matthew Malencia,Sandeep Manjanna,M. Ani Hsieh,George Pappas,Vijay Kumar cs.RO

authors_text: Zejiang Hou,Fei Sun,Yen-Kuang Chen,Yuan Xie,Sun-Yuan Kung
title: MILAN: Masked Image Pretraining on Language Assisted Representation
title_zh: 米兰：语言辅助表示的蒙版图像预训练
comment: add new experiments and improved results. provide repo link
comments: add new experiments and improved results. provide repo link
abstract: Self-attention based transformer models have been dominating many computer vision tasks in the past few years. Their superb model qualities heavily depend on the excessively large labeled image datasets. In order to reduce the reliance on large labeled datasets, reconstruction based masked autoencoders are gaining popularity, which learn high quality transferable representations from unlabeled images. For the same purpose, recent weakly supervised image pretraining methods explore language supervision from text captions accompanying the images. In this work, we propose masked image pretraining on language assisted representation, dubbed as MILAN. Instead of predicting raw pixels or low level features, our pretraining objective is to reconstruct the image features with substantial semantic signals that are obtained using caption supervision. Moreover, to accommodate our reconstruction target, we propose a more effective prompting decoder architecture and a semantic aware mask sampling mechanism, which further advance the transfer performance of the pretrained model. Experimental results demonstrate that MILAN delivers higher accuracy than the previous works. When the masked autoencoder is pretrained and finetuned on ImageNet-1K dataset with an input resolution of 224x224, MILAN achieves a top-1 accuracy of 85.4% on ViT-Base, surpassing previous state-of-the-arts by 1%. In the downstream semantic segmentation task, MILAN achieves 52.7 mIoU using ViT-Base on ADE20K dataset, outperforming previous masked pretraining results by 4 points.
summary: Self-attention based transformer models have been dominating many computer vision tasks in the past few years. Their superb model qualities heavily depend on the excessively large labeled image datasets. In order to reduce the reliance on large labeled datasets, reconstruction based masked autoencoders are gaining popularity, which learn high quality transferable representations from unlabeled images. For the same purpose, recent weakly supervised image pretraining methods explore language supervision from text captions accompanying the images. In this work, we propose masked image pretraining on language assisted representation, dubbed as MILAN. Instead of predicting raw pixels or low level features, our pretraining objective is to reconstruct the image features with substantial semantic signals that are obtained using caption supervision. Moreover, to accommodate our reconstruction target, we propose a more effective prompting decoder architecture and a semantic aware mask sampling mechanism, which further advance the transfer performance of the pretrained model. Experimental results demonstrate that MILAN delivers higher accuracy than the previous works. When the masked autoencoder is pretrained and finetuned on ImageNet-1K dataset with an input resolution of 224x224, MILAN achieves a top-1 accuracy of 85.4% on ViT-Base, surpassing previous state-of-the-arts by 1%. In the downstream semantic segmentation task, MILAN achieves 52.7 mIoU using ViT-Base on ADE20K dataset, outperforming previous masked pretraining results by 4 points.
abstract_zh: 在过去的几年里，基于自注意力的变压器模型一直在许多计算机视觉任务中占据主导地位。它们卓越的模型质量在很大程度上依赖于过大的标记图像数据集。为了减少对大型标记数据集的依赖，基于重建的掩模自动编码器越来越受欢迎，它从未标记的图像中学习高质量的可转移表示。出于同样的目的，最近的弱监督图像预训练方法从图像附带的文本标题中探索语言监督。在这项工作中，我们提出了语言辅助表示的蒙版图像预训练，称为 MILAN。我们的预训练目标不是预测原始像素或低级特征，而是使用通过标题监督获得的大量语义信号来重建图像特征。此外，为了适应我们的重建目标，我们提出了一种更有效的提示解码器架构和语义感知掩模采样机制，进一步提高了预训练模型的传输性能。实验结果表明 MILAN 比之前的作品具有更高的准确性。当掩码自动编码器在输入分辨率为 224x224 的 ImageNet-1K 数据集上进行预训练和微调时，MILAN 在 ViT-Base 上实现了 85.4% 的 top-1 准确率，比之前的最先进水平高出 1%。在下游语义分割任务中，MILAN 在 ADE20K 数据集上使用 ViT-Base 实现了 52.7 mIoU，比之前的屏蔽预训练结果高出 4 个点。

AI.tldr: 本文提出MILAN方法，通过语言辅助的掩码图像预训练，提升视觉模型的表示能力。
AI.motivation: 传统视觉Transformer依赖大量标注数据，而掩码自编码器和弱监督方法试图减少对此依赖，但如何有效利用语言信息提升模型性能仍是挑战。
AI.method: MILAN通过文本描述获取语义信号，以重建图像特征为目标，设计提示解码器架构和语义感知掩码采样机制，优化预训练过程。
AI.result: 在ImageNet-1K上，ViT-Base模型top-1准确率达85.4%（超1%）；在ADE20K语义分割任务中，mIoU达52.7（超4点）。
AI.conclusion: MILAN通过结合语言监督与改进架构，显著提升预训练模型性能，优于现有方法。

Their superb model qualities heavily depend on the excessively large labeled image datasets. In order to reduce the reliance on large labeled datasets, reconstruction based masked autoencoders are gaining popularity, which learn high quality transferable representations from unlabeled images. For the same purpose, recent weakly supervised image pretraining methods explore language supervision from text captions accompanying the images. In this work, we propose masked image pretraining on language assisted representation, dubbed as MILAN. Moreover, to accommodate our reconstruction target, we propose a more effective prompting decoder architecture and a semantic aware mask sampling mechanism, which further advance the transfer performance of the pretrained model. When the masked autoencoder is pretrained and finetuned on ImageNet-1K dataset with an input resolution of 224x224, MILAN achieves a top-1 accuracy of 85.4% on ViT-Base, surpassing previous state-of-the-arts by 1%. authors_text: Hao Li,Yang Nan,Javier Del Ser,Guang Yang
title: Region-Based Evidential Deep Learning to Quantify Uncertainty and Improve Robustness of Brain Tumor Segmentation
title_zh: 基于区域的证据深度学习可量化不确定性并提高脑肿瘤分割的稳健性
abstract: Despite recent advances in the accuracy of brain tumor segmentation, the results still suffer from low reliability and robustness. Uncertainty estimation is an efficient solution to this problem, as it provides a measure of confidence in the segmentation results. The current uncertainty estimation methods based on quantile regression, Bayesian neural network, ensemble, and Monte Carlo dropout are limited by their high computational cost and inconsistency. In order to overcome these challenges, Evidential Deep Learning (EDL) was developed in recent work but primarily for natural image classification. In this paper, we proposed a region-based EDL segmentation framework that can generate reliable uncertainty maps and robust segmentation results. We used the Theory of Evidence to interpret the output of a neural network as evidence values gathered from input features. Following Subjective Logic, evidence was parameterized as a Dirichlet distribution, and predicted probabilities were treated as subjective opinions. To evaluate the performance of our model on segmentation and uncertainty estimation, we conducted quantitative and qualitative experiments on the BraTS 2020 dataset. The results demonstrated the top performance of the proposed method in quantifying segmentation uncertainty and robustly segmenting tumors. Furthermore, our proposed new framework maintained the advantages of low computational cost and easy implementation and showed the potential for clinical application.
summary: Despite recent advances in the accuracy of brain tumor segmentation, the results still suffer from low reliability and robustness. Uncertainty estimation is an efficient solution to this problem, as it provides a measure of confidence in the segmentation results. The current uncertainty estimation methods based on quantile regression, Bayesian neural network, ensemble, and Monte Carlo dropout are limited by their high computational cost and inconsistency. In order to overcome these challenges, Evidential Deep Learning (EDL) was developed in recent work but primarily for natural image classification. In this paper, we proposed a region-based EDL segmentation framework that can generate reliable uncertainty maps and robust segmentation results. We used the Theory of Evidence to interpret the output of a neural network as evidence values gathered from input features. Following Subjective Logic, evidence was parameterized as a Dirichlet distribution, and predicted probabilities were treated as subjective opinions. To evaluate the performance of our model on segmentation and uncertainty estimation, we conducted quantitative and qualitative experiments on the BraTS 2020 dataset. The results demonstrated the top performance of the proposed method in quantifying segmentation uncertainty and robustly segmenting tumors. Furthermore, our proposed new framework maintained the advantages of low computational cost and easy implementation and showed the potential for clinical application.
abstract_zh: 尽管脑肿瘤分割的准确性最近取得了进展，但结果仍然存在可靠性和稳健性较低的问题。不确定性估计是该问题的有效解决方案，因为它提供了分割结果的置信度度量。当前基于分位数回归、贝叶斯神经网络、集成和蒙特卡洛丢失的不确定性估计方法因其高计算成本和不一致性而受到限制。为了克服这些挑战，最近的工作中开发了证据深度学习（EDL），但主要用于自然图像分类。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于区域的 EDL 分割框架，可以生成可靠的不确定性图和稳健的分割结果。我们使用证据理论将神经网络的输出解释为从输入特征收集的证据值。遵循主观逻辑，证据被参数化为狄利克雷分布，预测概率被视为主观意见。为了评估我们的模型在分割和不确定性估计方面的性能，我们在 BraTS 2020 数据集上进行了定量和定性实验。结果证明了所提出的方法在量化分割不确定性和稳健分割肿瘤方面的最佳性能。此外，我们提出的新框架保持了低计算成本和易于实现的优势，并显示出临床应用的潜力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于区域的证据深度学习框架，用于量化脑肿瘤分割的不确定性并提升分割鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有不确定性估计方法计算成本高且不一致，而证据深度学习（EDL）在自然图像分类中表现良好，尚未应用于分割任务。
AI.method: 基于证据理论将神经网络输出解释为证据值，结合主观逻辑参数化为狄利克雷分布，生成不确定性图并优化分割结果。
AI.result: 在BraTS 2020数据集上，该方法在分割不确定性和肿瘤分割性能上均达到最优，且计算成本低、易于实现。
AI.conclusion: 提出的区域EDL框架有效提升了分割鲁棒性与不确定性量化能力，具有临床应用潜力。

search_text: Region-Based Evidential Deep Learning to Quantify Uncertainty and Improve Robustness of Brain Tumor Segmentation 基于区域的证据深度学习可量化不确定性并提高脑肿瘤分割的稳健性 Despite recent advances in the accuracy of brain tumor segmentation, the results still suffer from low reliability and robustness. Uncertainty estimation is an efficient solution to this problem, as it provides a measure of confidence in the segmentation results. The current uncertainty estimation methods based on quantile regression, Bayesian neural network, ensemble, and Monte Carlo dropout are limited by their high computational cost and inconsistency. In order to overcome these challenges, Evidential Deep Learning (EDL) was developed in recent work but primarily for natural image classification. In this paper, we proposed a region-based EDL segmentation framework that can generate reliable uncertainty maps and robust segmentation results. We used the Theory of Evidence to interpret the output of a neural network as evidence values gathered from input features. Following Subjective Logic, evidence was parameterized as a Dirichlet distribution, and predicted probabilities were treated as subjective opinions. To evaluate the performance of our model on segmentation and uncertainty estimation, we conducted quantitative and qualitative experiments on the BraTS 2020 dataset. The results demonstrated the top performance of the proposed method in quantifying segmentation uncertainty and robustly segmenting tumors. Furthermore, our proposed new framework maintained the advantages of low computational cost and easy implementation and showed the potential for clinical application. 尽管脑肿瘤分割的准确性最近取得了进展，但结果仍然存在可靠性和稳健性较低的问题。不确定性估计是该问题的有效解决方案，因为它提供了分割结果的置信度度量。当前基于分位数回归、贝叶斯神经网络、集成和蒙特卡洛丢失的不确定性估计方法因其高计算成本和不一致性而受到限制。为了克服这些挑战，最近的工作中开发了证据深度学习（EDL），但主要用于自然图像分类。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于区域的 EDL 分割框架，可以生成可靠的不确定性图和稳健的分割结果。我们使用证据理论将神经网络的输出解释为从输入特征收集的证据值。遵循主观逻辑，证据被参数化为狄利克雷分布，预测概率被视为主观意见。为了评估我们的模型在分割和不确定性估计方面的性能，我们在 BraTS 2020 数据集上进行了定量和定性实验。结果证明了所提出的方法在量化分割不确定性和稳健分割肿瘤方面的最佳性能。此外，我们提出的新框架保持了低计算成本和易于实现的优势，并显示出临床应用的潜力。 本文提出一种基于区域的证据深度学习框架，用于量化脑肿瘤分割的不确定性并提升分割鲁棒性。 Hao Li,Yang Nan,Javier Del Ser,Guang Yang eess.IV,cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Caner Ozer,Arda Guler,Aysel Turkvatan Cansever,Deniz Alis,Ercan Karaarslan,Ilkay Oksuz
title: Shifted Windows Transformers for Medical Image Quality Assessment
title_zh: 用于医学图像质量评估的 Windows Transformer
comment: 10 pages, 3 figures, 4 tables. Accepted in 13th Machine Learning in Medical Imaging (MLMI 2022) workshop
comments: 10 pages, 3 figures, 4 tables. Accepted in 13th Machine Learning in Medical Imaging (MLMI 2022) workshop
abstract: To maintain a standard in a medical imaging study, images should have necessary image quality for potential diagnostic use. Although CNN-based approaches are used to assess the image quality, their performance can still be improved in terms of accuracy. In this work, we approach this problem by using Swin Transformer, which improves the poor-quality image classification performance that causes the degradation in medical image quality. We test our approach on Foreign Object Classification problem on Chest X-Rays (Object-CXR) and Left Ventricular Outflow Tract Classification problem on Cardiac MRI with a four-chamber view (LVOT). While we obtain a classification accuracy of 87.1% and 95.48% on the Object-CXR and LVOT datasets, our experimental results suggest that the use of Swin Transformer improves the Object-CXR classification performance while obtaining a comparable performance for the LVOT dataset. To the best of our knowledge, our study is the first vision transformer application for medical image quality assessment.
summary: To maintain a standard in a medical imaging study, images should have necessary image quality for potential diagnostic use. Although CNN-based approaches are used to assess the image quality, their performance can still be improved in terms of accuracy. In this work, we approach this problem by using Swin Transformer, which improves the poor-quality image classification performance that causes the degradation in medical image quality. We test our approach on Foreign Object Classification problem on Chest X-Rays (Object-CXR) and Left Ventricular Outflow Tract Classification problem on Cardiac MRI with a four-chamber view (LVOT). While we obtain a classification accuracy of 87.1% and 95.48% on the Object-CXR and LVOT datasets, our experimental results suggest that the use of Swin Transformer improves the Object-CXR classification performance while obtaining a comparable performance for the LVOT dataset. To the best of our knowledge, our study is the first vision transformer application for medical image quality assessment.
abstract_zh: 为了维持医学成像研究的标准，图像应具有潜在诊断用途所需的图像质量。尽管基于 CNN 的方法用于评估图像质量，但其性能在准确性方面仍然可以提高。在这项工作中，我们通过使用 Swin Transformer 来解决这个问题，它改善了导致医学图像质量下降的低质量图像分类性能。我们在胸部 X 光片 (Object-CXR) 上的异物分类问题和四腔视图 (LVOT) 心脏 MRI 上的左心室流出道分类问题上测试了我们的方法。虽然我们在 Object-CXR 和 LVOT 数据集上获得了 87.1% 和 95.48% 的分类准确率，但我们的实验结果表明，使用 Swin Transformer 提高了 Object-CXR 分类性能，同时获得了与 LVOT 数据集相当的性能。据我们所知，我们的研究是第一个用于医学图像质量评估的视觉转换器应用。

AI.tldr: 本文提出使用Shifted Windows Transformer（Swin Transformer）模型进行医学图像质量评估，针对胸部X光和心脏MRI两种医学影像任务进行实验验证。
AI.motivation: 传统CNN方法在医学图像质量评估中存在准确率不足的问题，而Swin Transformer在图像分类任务中表现出对低质量图像的鲁棒性，因此被引入以提升医学影像质量评估性能。
AI.method: 基于Swin Transformer架构设计医学图像质量评估模型，分别在胸部X光的Foreign Object分类任务（Object-CXR）和心脏MRI的左心室流出道分类任务（LVOT）上进行实验验证。
AI.result: 在Object-CXR数据集上达到87.1%分类准确率，在LVOT数据集上达到95.48%准确率，实验表明Swin Transformer有效提升了Object-CXR任务性能并保持LVOT任务的竞争力。
AI.conclusion: 本文首次将视觉Transformer应用于医学图像质量评估领域，验证了Swin Transformer在医学影像分析任务中的有效性与可行性。

authors_text: Qin Yang,Ramviyas Parasuraman
title: Bayesian Soft Actor-Critic: A Directed Acyclic Strategy Graph Based Deep Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: 贝叶斯软 Actor-Critic：基于深度强化学习的有向非循环策略图
abstract: Adopting reasonable strategies is challenging but crucial for an intelligent agent with limited resources working in hazardous, unstructured, and dynamic environments to improve the system's utility, decrease the overall cost, and increase mission success probability. This paper proposes a novel directed acyclic strategy graph decomposition approach based on Bayesian chaining to separate an intricate policy into several simple sub-policies and organize their relationships as Bayesian strategy networks (BSN). We integrate this approach into the state-of-the-art DRL method -- soft actor-critic (SAC), and build the corresponding Bayesian soft actor-critic (BSAC) model by organizing several sub-policies as a joint policy. We compare our method against the state-of-the-art deep reinforcement learning algorithms on the standard continuous control benchmarks in the OpenAI Gym environment. The results demonstrate that the promising potential of the BSAC method significantly improves training efficiency.
summary: Adopting reasonable strategies is challenging but crucial for an intelligent agent with limited resources working in hazardous, unstructured, and dynamic environments to improve the system's utility, decrease the overall cost, and increase mission success probability. This paper proposes a novel directed acyclic strategy graph decomposition approach based on Bayesian chaining to separate an intricate policy into several simple sub-policies and organize their relationships as Bayesian strategy networks (BSN). We integrate this approach into the state-of-the-art DRL method -- soft actor-critic (SAC), and build the corresponding Bayesian soft actor-critic (BSAC) model by organizing several sub-policies as a joint policy. We compare our method against the state-of-the-art deep reinforcement learning algorithms on the standard continuous control benchmarks in the OpenAI Gym environment. The results demonstrate that the promising potential of the BSAC method significantly improves training efficiency.
abstract_zh: 采用合理的策略具有挑战性，但对于在危险、非结构化和动态环境中工作的资源有限的智能体来说至关重要，以提高系统的效用、降低总体成本并提高任务成功概率。本文提出了一种基于贝叶斯链的新型有向非循环策略图分解方法，将复杂的策略分成几个简单的子策略，并将它们的关系组织为贝叶斯策略网络（BSN）。我们将该方法集成到最先进的 DRL 方法——软执行者-批评家（SAC）中，并通过将多个子策略组织为联合策略来构建相应的贝叶斯软执行者-批评家（BSAC）模型。我们在 OpenAI Gym 环境中的标准连续控制基准上将我们的方法与最先进的深度强化学习算法进行比较。结果表明 BSAC 方法的巨大潜力可显着提高训练效率。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于贝叶斯链的有向无环策略图分解方法，将复杂策略拆分为子策略并构建贝叶斯策略网络（BSN），集成到软演员-评论家（SAC）框架中，形成贝叶斯软演员-评论家（BSAC）模型。
AI.motivation: 在资源有限的危险、非结构化动态环境中，智能体需通过合理策略提升系统效用、降低整体成本并提高任务成功率，而现有方法在复杂场景下效率不足。
AI.method: 采用贝叶斯链分解复杂策略为多个子策略，构建贝叶斯策略网络（BSN），将其与SAC算法结合，通过联合策略优化实现高效决策。
AI.result: 在OpenAI Gym标准连续控制基准测试中，BSAC方法显著提升了训练效率，优于当前最先进的深度强化学习算法。
AI.conclusion: BSAC通过策略分解与贝叶斯建模有效提升了复杂环境下的训练效率，为资源受限场景的智能决策提供了新思路。

We integrate this approach into the state-of-the-art DRL method -- soft actor-critic (SAC), and build the corresponding Bayesian soft actor-critic (BSAC) model by organizing several sub-policies as a joint policy. We compare our method against the state-of-the-art deep reinforcement learning algorithms on the standard continuous control benchmarks in the OpenAI Gym environment. The results demonstrate that the promising potential of the BSAC method significantly improves training efficiency. 采用合理的策略具有挑战性，但对于在危险、非结构化和动态环境中工作的资源有限的智能体来说至关重要，以提高系统的效用、降低总体成本并提高任务成功概率。本文提出了一种基于贝叶斯链的新型有向非循环策略图分解方法，将复杂的策略分成几个简单的子策略，并将它们的关系组织为贝叶斯策略网络（BSN）。我们将该方法集成到最先进的 DRL 方法——软执行者-批评家（SAC）中，并通过将多个子策略组织为联合策略来构建相应的贝叶斯软执行者-批评家（BSAC）模型。我们在 OpenAI Gym 环境中的标准连续控制基准上将我们的方法与最先进的深度强化学习算法进行比较。结果表明 BSAC 方法的巨大潜力可显着提高训练效率。 本文提出基于贝叶斯链的有向无环策略图分解方法，将复杂策略拆分为子策略并构建贝叶斯策略网络（BSN），集成到软演员-评论家（SAC）框架中，形成贝叶斯软演员-评论家（BSAC）模型。 Qin Yang,Ramviyas Parasuraman cs.AI,cs.LG,cs.RO

authors_text: Mukul Singh,José Cambronero,Sumit Gulwani,Vu Le,Carina Negreanu,Mohammad Raza,Gust Verbruggen
title: CORNET: Learning Table Formatting Rules By Example
title_zh: CORNET：通过示例学习表格格式规则
abstract: Spreadsheets are widely used for table manipulation and presentation. Stylistic formatting of these tables is an important property for both presentation and analysis. As a result, popular spreadsheet software, such as Excel, supports automatically formatting tables based on rules. Unfortunately, writing such formatting rules can be challenging for users as it requires knowledge of the underlying rule language and data logic. We present CORNET, a system that tackles the novel problem of automatically learning such formatting rules from user examples in the form of formatted cells. CORNET takes inspiration from advances in inductive programming and combines symbolic rule enumeration with a neural ranker to learn conditional formatting rules. To motivate and evaluate our approach, we extracted tables with over 450K unique formatting rules from a corpus of over 1.8M real worksheets. Since we are the first to introduce conditional formatting, we compare CORNET to a wide range of symbolic and neural baselines adapted from related domains. Our results show that CORNET accurately learns rules across varying evaluation setups. Additionally, we show that CORNET finds shorter rules than those that a user has written and discovers rules in spreadsheets that users have manually formatted.
summary: Spreadsheets are widely used for table manipulation and presentation. Stylistic formatting of these tables is an important property for both presentation and analysis. As a result, popular spreadsheet software, such as Excel, supports automatically formatting tables based on rules. Unfortunately, writing such formatting rules can be challenging for users as it requires knowledge of the underlying rule language and data logic. We present CORNET, a system that tackles the novel problem of automatically learning such formatting rules from user examples in the form of formatted cells. CORNET takes inspiration from advances in inductive programming and combines symbolic rule enumeration with a neural ranker to learn conditional formatting rules. To motivate and evaluate our approach, we extracted tables with over 450K unique formatting rules from a corpus of over 1.8M real worksheets. Since we are the first to introduce conditional formatting, we compare CORNET to a wide range of symbolic and neural baselines adapted from related domains. Our results show that CORNET accurately learns rules across varying evaluation setups. Additionally, we show that CORNET finds shorter rules than those that a user has written and discovers rules in spreadsheets that users have manually formatted.
abstract_zh: 电子表格广泛用于表格操作和演示。这些表格的风格格式对于演示和分析来说都是一个重要属性。因此，流行的电子表格软件（例如 Excel）支持根据规则自动格式化表格。不幸的是，编写此类格式化规则对于用户来说可能具有挑战性，因为它需要了解底层规则语言和数据逻辑。我们提出了 CORNET，这是一个系统，它解决了从格式化单元格形式的用户示例中自动学习此类格式化规则的新问题。 CORNET 从归纳编程的进步中汲取灵感，并将符号规则枚举与神经排序器相结合来学习条件格式规则。为了激励和评估我们的方法，我们从超过 180 万个真实工作表的语料库中提取了具有超过 45 万个独特格式规则的表格。由于我们是第一个引入条件格式的人，因此我们将 CORNET 与改编自相关领域的各种符号和神经基线进行比较。我们的结果表明，CORNET 能够准确地学习不同评估设置的规则。此外，我们还表明 CORNET 可以找到比用户编写的规则更短的规则，并发现用户手动格式化的电子表格中的规则。

AI.tldr: 本文提出CORNET系统，通过用户提供的格式化单元格示例，自动学习电子表格的条件格式化规则。
AI.motivation: 电子表格的样式格式对分析和呈现至关重要，但编写格式规则需要专业知识，用户难以直接操作。
AI.method: 结合归纳编程思想，使用符号规则枚举与神经网络排序器，从示例中学习条件格式规则。
AI.result: CORNET在多种评估场景下准确学习规则，生成的规则比用户手动编写的更简洁，并能发现隐藏的格式化模式。
AI.conclusion: CORNET有效解决了自动学习表格格式规则的问题，优于现有符号和神经方法，提升了表格处理的自动化水平。

authors_text: Bin Xiao,Murat Simsek,Burak Kantarci,Ala Abu Alkheir
title: Handling big tabular data of ICT supply chains: a multi-task, machine-interpretable approach
title_zh: 处理 ICT 供应链的大表格数据：一种多任务、机器可解释的方法
comment: 6 pages, 7 tables, 4 figures, IEEE Global Communications Conference (Globecom), 2022
comments: 6 pages, 7 tables, 4 figures, IEEE Global Communications Conference (Globecom), 2022
abstract: Due to the characteristics of Information and Communications Technology (ICT) products, the critical information of ICT devices is often summarized in big tabular data shared across supply chains. Therefore, it is critical to automatically interpret tabular structures with the surging amount of electronic assets. To transform the tabular data in electronic documents into a machine-interpretable format and provide layout and semantic information for information extraction and interpretation, we define a Table Structure Recognition (TSR) task and a Table Cell Type Classification (CTC) task. We use a graph to represent complex table structures for the TSR task. Meanwhile, table cells are categorized into three groups based on their functional roles for the CTC task, namely Header, Attribute, and Data. Subsequently, we propose a multi-task model to solve the defined two tasks simultaneously by using the text modal and image modal features. Our experimental results show that our proposed method can outperform state-of-the-art methods on ICDAR2013 and UNLV datasets.
summary: Due to the characteristics of Information and Communications Technology (ICT) products, the critical information of ICT devices is often summarized in big tabular data shared across supply chains. Therefore, it is critical to automatically interpret tabular structures with the surging amount of electronic assets. To transform the tabular data in electronic documents into a machine-interpretable format and provide layout and semantic information for information extraction and interpretation, we define a Table Structure Recognition (TSR) task and a Table Cell Type Classification (CTC) task. We use a graph to represent complex table structures for the TSR task. Meanwhile, table cells are categorized into three groups based on their functional roles for the CTC task, namely Header, Attribute, and Data. Subsequently, we propose a multi-task model to solve the defined two tasks simultaneously by using the text modal and image modal features. Our experimental results show that our proposed method can outperform state-of-the-art methods on ICDAR2013 and UNLV datasets.
abstract_zh: 由于信息和通信技术（ICT）产品的特性，ICT设备的关键信息通常汇总在跨供应链共享的大表格数据中。因此，随着电子资产数量的激增，自动解释表格结构至关重要。为了将电子文档中的表格数据转换为机器可解释的格式，并为信息提取和解释提供布局和语义信息，我们定义了表格结构识别（TSR）任务和表格单元类型分类（CTC）任务。我们使用图来表示 TSR 任务的复杂表结构。同时，表格单元根据其在 CTC 任务中的功能角色分为三组，即标题、属性和数据。随后，我们提出了一种多任务模型，通过使用文本模态和图像模态特征同时解决定义的两个任务。我们的实验结果表明，我们提出的方法在 ICDAR2013 和 UNLV 数据集上的性能优于最先进的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种多任务方法，通过表格结构识别和单元类型分类，将ICT供应链中的大表格数据转化为机器可解释格式。
AI.motivation: ICT产品关键信息以大规模表格形式共享，需自动解析表格结构以提高信息提取效率，减少人工处理成本。
AI.method: 定义表格结构识别（TSR）任务和单元类型分类（CTC）任务，用图表示表格结构，基于文本和图像模态特征构建多任务模型。
AI.result: 在ICDAR2013和UNLV数据集上，该方法性能优于现有最佳方法。
AI.conclusion: 多任务模型有效融合多模态特征，可提升ICT供应链表格数据的自动化解析能力，具有实际应用价值。

authors_text: Esther Galby,Sandor Kisfaludi-Bak,Daniel Marx,Roohani Sharma
title: Subexponential Parameterized Directed Steiner Network Problems on Planar Graphs: a Complete Classification
title_zh: 平面图上的次指数参数化有向斯坦纳网络问题：完整的分类
abstract: In the Directed Steiner Network problem, the input is a directed graph G, a subset T of k vertices of G called the terminals, and a demand graph D on T. The task is to find a subgraph H of G with the minimum number of edges such that for every edge (s,t) in D, the solution H contains a directed s to t path. In this paper we investigate how the complexity of the problem depends on the demand pattern when G is planar. Formally, if \mathcal{D} is a class of directed graphs closed under identification of vertices, then the \mathcal{D}-Steiner Network (\mathcal{D}-SN) problem is the special case where the demand graph D is restricted to be from \mathcal{D}. For general graphs, Feldmann and Marx [ICALP 2016] characterized those families of demand graphs where the problem is fixed-parameter tractable (FPT) parameterized by the number k of terminals. They showed that if \mathcal{D} is a superset of one of the five hard families, then \mathcal{D}-SN is W[1]-hard parameterized by k, otherwise it can be solved in time f(k)n^{O(1)}. For planar graphs an interesting question is whether the W[1]-hard cases can be solved by subexponential parameterized algorithms. Chitnis et al. [SICOMP 2020] showed that, assuming the ETH, there is no f(k)n^{o(k)} time algorithm for the general \mathcal{D}-SN problem on planar graphs, but the special case called Strongly Connected Steiner Subgraph can be solved in time f(k) n^{O(\sqrt{k})} on planar graphs. We present a far-reaching generalization and unification of these two results: we give a complete characterization of the behavior of every $\mathcal{D}$-SN problem on planar graphs. We show that assuming ETH, either the problem is (1) solvable in time 2^{O(k)}n^{O(1)}, and not in time 2^{o(k)}n^{O(1)}, or (2) solvable in time f(k)n^{O(\sqrt{k})}, but not in time f(k)n^{o(\sqrt{k})}, or (3) solvable in time f(k)n^{O(k)}, but not in time f(k)n^{o({k})}.
