We present a far-reaching generalization and unification of these two results: we give a complete characterization of the behavior of every $\mathcal{D}$-SN problem on planar graphs. We show that assuming ETH, either the problem is (1) solvable in time 2^{O(k)}n^{O(1)}, and not in time 2^{o(k)}n^{O(1)}, or (2) solvable in time f(k)n^{O(\sqrt{k})}, but not in time f(k)n^{o(\sqrt{k})}, or (3) solvable in time f(k)n^{O(k)}, but not in time f(k)n^{o({k})}.
abstract_zh: 在有向 Steiner 网络问题中，输入是有向图 G、G 的 k 个顶点（称为终结点）的子集 T，以及 T 上的需求图 D。任务是找到 G 的子图 H，其边数最少，使得对于 D 中的每条边 (s,t)，解 H 包含有向 s 到 t 的路径。在本文中，我们研究了当 G 是平面时问题的复杂性如何取决于需求模式。形式上，如果 \mathcal{D} 是一类在顶点识别下闭合的有向图，则 \mathcal{D}-Steiner Network (\mathcal{D}-SN) 问题是需求图 D 被限制为来自 \mathcal{D} 的特殊情况。对于一般图，Feldmann 和 Marx [ICALP 2016] 描述了那些需求图族，其中问题是由终端数量 k 参数化的固定参数易处理 (FPT)。他们表明，如果 \mathcal{D} 是五个困难族之一的超集，则 \mathcal{D}-SN 是由 k 参数化的 W[1]-hard，否则可以在时间 f(k)n^{O(1)} 中求解。对于平面图来说，一个有趣的问题是 W[1]-困难情况是否可以通过次指数参数化算法来解决。奇特尼斯等人。 [SICOMP 2020]表明，假设 ETH，平面图上的一般 \mathcal{D}-SN 问题没有 f(k)n^{o(k)} 时间算法，但称为强连通 Steiner 子图的特殊情况可以在平面图上的时间 f(k) n^{O(\sqrt{k})} 上求解。我们对这两个结果进行了深远的概括和统一：我们给出了平面图上每个 $\mathcal{D}$-SN 问题的行为的完整表征。我们证明，假设 ETH，问题要么 (1) 在时间 2^{O(k)}n^{O(1)} 内可解，但在时间 2^{o(k)}n^{O(1)} 内不可解，或 (2) 在时间 f(k)n^{O(\sqrt{k})} 内可解，但在时间 f(k)n^{o(\sqrt{k})} 内不可解，或 (3)在时间 f(k)n^{O(k)} 内可解，但在时间 f(k)n^{o({k})} 内不可解。

AI.tldr: 本文对平面图上的定向Steiner网络问题进行参数化复杂性分类，基于需求图的结构特征。
AI.motivation: 定向Steiner网络问题在计算复杂性理论中具有重要意义，而平面图的特殊性质可能允许更高效的算法。此前研究仅针对强连通子图情况，缺乏对需求模式的全面分类。
AI.method: 通过分析需求图家族的结构特性，结合参数化复杂性理论和ETH假设，对平面图上的D-SN问题进行时间复杂度分类。
AI.result: 在ETH假设下，平面图上的D-SN问题分为三类：1) 2^{O(k)}n^{O(1)}时间可解；2) f(k)n^{O(√k)}时间可解；3) 需要f(k)n^{O(k)}时间，且无法进一步优化。
AI.conclusion: 本文首次对平面图上的定向Steiner网络问题进行完整分类，明确了不同需求模式下的复杂性边界，推广了现有结果并揭示了平面图的特殊性质对算法设计的影响。

search_text: Subexponential Parameterized Directed Steiner Network Problems on Planar Graphs: a Complete Classification 平面图上的次指数参数化有向斯坦纳网络问题：完整的分类 In the Directed Steiner Network problem, the input is a directed graph G, a subset T of k vertices of G called the terminals, and a demand graph D on T. The task is to find a subgraph H of G with the minimum number of edges such that for every edge (s,t) in D, the solution H contains a directed s to t path. In this paper we investigate how the complexity of the problem depends on the demand pattern when G is planar. Formally, if \mathcal{D} is a class of directed graphs closed under identification of vertices, then the \mathcal{D}-Steiner Network (\mathcal{D}-SN) problem is the special case where the demand graph D is restricted to be from \mathcal{D}. For general graphs, Feldmann and Marx [ICALP 2016] characterized those families of demand graphs where the problem is fixed-parameter tractable (FPT) parameterized by the number k of terminals. They showed that if \mathcal{D} is a superset of one of the five hard families, then \mathcal{D}-SN is W[1]-hard parameterized by k, otherwise it can be solved in time f(k)n^{O(1)}. For planar graphs an interesting question is whether the W[1]-hard cases can be solved by subexponential parameterized algorithms. Chitnis et al. [SICOMP 2020] showed that, assuming the ETH, there is no f(k)n^{o(k)} time algorithm for the general \mathcal{D}-SN problem on planar graphs, but the special case called Strongly Connected Steiner Subgraph can be solved in time f(k) n^{O(\sqrt{k})} on planar graphs. We present a far-reaching generalization and unification of these two results: we give a complete characterization of the behavior of every $\mathcal{D}$-SN problem on planar graphs. We show that assuming ETH, either the problem is (1) solvable in time 2^{O(k)}n^{O(1)}, and not in time 2^{o(k)}n^{O(1)}, or (2) solvable in time f(k)n^{O(\sqrt{k})}, but not in time f(k)n^{o(\sqrt{k})}, or (3) solvable in time f(k)n^{O(k)}, but not in time f(k)n^{o({k})}. 在有向 Steiner 网络问题中，输入是有向图 G、G 的 k 个顶点（称为终结点）的子集 T，以及 T 上的需求图 D。任务是找到 G 的子图 H，其边数最少，使得对于 D 中的每条边 (s,t)，解 H 包含有向 s 到 t 的路径。在本文中，我们研究了当 G 是平面时问题的复杂性如何取决于需求模式。形式上，如果 \mathcal{D} 是一类在顶点识别下闭合的有向图，则 \mathcal{D}-Steiner Network (\mathcal{D}-SN) 问题是需求图 D 被限制为来自 \mathcal{D} 的特殊情况。对于一般图，Feldmann 和 Marx [ICALP 2016] 描述了那些需求图族，其中问题是由终端数量 k 参数化的固定参数易处理 (FPT)。他们表明，如果 \mathcal{D} 是五个困难族之一的超集，则 \mathcal{D}-SN 是由 k 参数化的 W[1]-hard，否则可以在时间 f(k)n^{O(1)} 中求解。对于平面图来说，一个有趣的问题是 W[1]-困难情况是否可以通过次指数参数化算法来解决。奇特尼斯等人。 [SICOMP 2020]表明，假设 ETH，平面图上的一般 \mathcal{D}-SN 问题没有 f(k)n^{o(k)} 时间算法，但称为强连通 Steiner 子图的特殊情况可以在平面图上的时间 f(k) n^{O(\sqrt{k})} 上求解。我们对这两个结果进行了深远的概括和统一：我们给出了平面图上每个 $\mathcal{D}$-SN 问题的行为的完整表征。我们证明，假设 ETH，问题要么 (1) 在时间 2^{O(k)}n^{O(1)} 内可解，但在时间 2^{o(k)}n^{O(1)} 内不可解，或 (2) 在时间 f(k)n^{O(\sqrt{k})} 内可解，但在时间 f(k)n^{o(\sqrt{k})} 内不可解，或 (3)在时间 f(k)n^{O(k)} 内可解，但在时间 f(k)n^{o({k})} 内不可解。 本文对平面图上的定向Steiner网络问题进行参数化复杂性分类，基于需求图的结构特征。 Esther Galby,Sandor Kisfaludi-Bak,Daniel Marx,Roohani Sharma cs.DS,cs.CC

authors_text: Michael Dinitz,Jeremy Fineman,Seth Gilbert,Calvin Newport
title: Smoothed Analysis of Information Spreading in Dynamic Networks
title_zh: 动态网络中信息传播的平滑分析
abstract: The best known solutions for $k$-message broadcast in dynamic networks of size $n$ require $Ω(nk)$ rounds. In this paper, we see if these bounds can be improved by smoothed analysis. We study perhaps the most natural randomized algorithm for disseminating tokens in this setting: at every time step, choose a token to broadcast randomly from the set of tokens you know. We show that with even a small amount of smoothing (one random edge added per round), this natural strategy solves $k$-message broadcast in $\tilde{O}(n+k^3)$ rounds, with high probability, beating the best known bounds for $k=o(\sqrt{n})$ and matching the $Ω(n+k)$ lower bound for static networks for $k=O(n^{1/3})$ (ignoring logarithmic factors). In fact, the main result we show is even stronger and more general: given $\ell$-smoothing (i.e., $\ell$ random edges added per round), this simple strategy terminates in $O(kn^{2/3}\log^{1/3}(n)\ell^{-1/3})$ rounds. We then prove this analysis close to tight with an almost-matching lower bound. To better understand the impact of smoothing on information spreading, we next turn our attention to static networks, proving a tight bound of $\tilde{O}(k\sqrt{n})$ rounds to solve $k$-message broadcast, which is better than what our strategy can achieve in the dynamic setting. This confirms that although smoothed analysis reduces the difficulties induced by changing graph structures, it does not eliminate them altogether. Finally, we apply our tools to prove an optimal result for $k$-message broadcast in so-called well-mixed networks in the absence of smoothing. By comparing this result to an existing lower bound for well-mixed networks, we establish a formal separation between oblivious and strongly adaptive adversaries with respect to well-mixed token spreading, partially resolving an open question on the impact of adversary strength on the $k$-message broadcast problem.

We then prove this analysis close to tight with an almost-matching lower bound. abstract_zh: 在规模为 $n$ 的动态网络中广播 $k$ 消息的最著名解决方案需要 $Ω(nk)$ 轮。在本文中，我们看看是否可以通过平滑分析来改进这些界限。我们研究了在这种情况下传播令牌的最自然的随机算法：在每个时间步骤，从您知道的令牌集中选择一个令牌来随机广播。我们证明，即使进行少量平滑（每轮添加一个随机边），这种自然策略也能以很高的概率解决 $k$ 消息广播在 $\tilde{O}(n+k^3)$ 轮中的问题，击败 $k=o(\sqrt{n})$ 的最佳已知边界，并匹配静态网络 $k=O(n^{1/3})$ 的 $Ω(n+k)$ 下限（忽略对数）因素）。事实上，我们展示的主要结果甚至更强、更通用：给定 $\ell$ 平滑（即每轮添加 $\ell$ 随机边），这个简单的策略在 $O(kn^{2/3}\log^{1/3}(n)\ell^{-1/3})$ 轮中终止。然后，我们证明该分析接近紧密且具有几乎匹配的下限。为了更好地理解平滑对信息传播的影响，我们接下来将注意力转向静态网络，证明 $\tilde{O}(k\sqrt{n})$ 轮的紧密界限来解决 $k$ 消息广播，这比我们的策略在动态设置中可以实现的更好。这证实了虽然平滑分析减少了由于改变图结构而引起的困难，但它并没有完全消除它们。最后，我们应用我们的工具来证明在没有平滑的情况下在所谓的混合良好网络中广播 $k$ 消息的最佳结果。通过将此结果与混合良好网络的现有下限进行比较，我们在混合良好的代币传播方面在健忘的对手和强适应性的对手之间建立了正式的分离，部分解决了对手强度对 $k$ 消息广播问题的影响的悬而未决的问题。

AI.tldr: 本文通过引入平滑分析，研究动态网络中信息传播的效率，提出了一种随机算法并在添加随机边的情况下改进了k消息广播的时间复杂度。
AI.motivation: 现有动态网络中k消息广播的最优解需要Ω(nk)轮，但通过平滑分析（引入随机边）可能改善这一结果，从而更接近静态网络的下界。
AI.method: 采用自然的随机化算法（每轮随机选择已知令牌广播），结合平滑分析（每轮添加ℓ条随机边），推导出时间复杂度上界并证明其接近紧性。
AI.result: 在ℓ平滑下，算法可在O(kn^{2/3}log^{1/3}(n)ℓ^{-1/3})轮内完成，对k=o(√n)优于现有结果；静态网络中证明了˜O(k√n)的上界，并分离了无意识与强自适应对手的性能差异。
AI.conclusion: 平滑分析可缓解动态网络的结构变化影响，但无法完全消除；同时揭示了对手强度对信息传播问题的实质性影响。

This confirms that although smoothed analysis reduces the difficulties induced by changing graph structures, it does not eliminate them altogether. Finally, we apply our tools to prove an optimal result for $k$-message broadcast in so-called well-mixed networks in the absence of smoothing. By comparing this result to an existing lower bound for well-mixed networks, we establish a formal separation between oblivious and strongly adaptive adversaries with respect to well-mixed token spreading, partially resolving an open question on the impact of adversary strength on the $k$-message broadcast problem. 在规模为 $n$ 的动态网络中广播 $k$ 消息的最著名解决方案需要 $Ω(nk)$ 轮。在本文中，我们看看是否可以通过平滑分析来改进这些界限。我们研究了在这种情况下传播令牌的最自然的随机算法：在每个时间步骤，从您知道的令牌集中选择一个令牌来随机广播。我们证明，即使进行少量平滑（每轮添加一个随机边），这种自然策略也能以很高的概率解决 $k$ 消息广播在 $\tilde{O}(n+k^3)$ 轮中的问题，击败 $k=o(\sqrt{n})$ 的最佳已知边界，并匹配静态网络 $k=O(n^{1/3})$ 的 $Ω(n+k)$ 下限（忽略对数）因素）。事实上，我们展示的主要结果甚至更强、更通用：给定 $\ell$ 平滑（即每轮添加 $\ell$ 随机边），这个简单的策略在 $O(kn^{2/3}\log^{1/3}(n)\ell^{-1/3})$ 轮中终止。然后，我们证明该分析接近紧密且具有几乎匹配的下限。为了更好地理解平滑对信息传播的影响，我们接下来将注意力转向静态网络，证明 $\tilde{O}(k\sqrt{n})$ 轮的紧密界限来解决 $k$ 消息广播，这比我们的策略在动态设置中可以实现的更好。这证实了虽然平滑分析减少了由于改变图结构而引起的困难，但它并没有完全消除它们。最后，我们应用我们的工具来证明在没有平滑的情况下在所谓的混合良好网络中广播 $k$ 消息的最佳结果。通过将此结果与混合良好网络的现有下限进行比较，我们在混合良好的代币传播方面在健忘的对手和强适应性的对手之间建立了正式的分离，部分解决了对手强度对 $k$ 消息广播问题的影响的悬而未决的问题。 本文通过引入平滑分析，研究动态网络中信息传播的效率，提出了一种随机算法并在添加随机边的情况下改进了k消息广播的时间复杂度。 Michael Dinitz,Jeremy Fineman,Seth Gilbert,Calvin Newport cs.DC,cs.DS

authors_text: Melody G Whitehead,Andrew Curtis
title: Modular interface for managing cognitive bias in experts
title_zh: 用于管理专家认知偏差的模块化界面
abstract: Expert knowledge is required to interpret data across a range of fields. Experts bridge gaps that often exists in our knowledge about relationships between data and the parameters of interest. This is especially true in geoscientific applications, where knowledge of the Earth is derived from interpretations of observable features and relies on predominantly unproven but widely accepted theories. Thus, experts facilitate solutions to otherwise unsolvable problems. However, experts are inherently subjective, and susceptible to cognitive biases and adverse external effects. This work examines this problem within geoscience. Three compelling examples are provided of the prevalence of cognitive biases from previous work. The problem is then formally defined, and a set of design principles which ensure that any solution is sufficiently flexible to be readily applied to the range of geoscientific problems. No solutions exist that reliably capture and reduce cognitive bias in experts. However, formal expert elicitation methods can be used to assess expert variation, and a variety of approaches exist that may help to illuminate uncertainties, avoid misunderstandings, and reduce herding behaviours or single-expert over-dominance. This work combines existing and future approaches to reduce expert suboptimality through a flexible modular design where each module provides a specific function. The design centres around action modules that force a stop-and-perform step into interpretation tasks. A starter-pack of modules is provided as an example of the conceptual design. This simple bias-reduction system may readily be applied in organisations and during everyday interpretations through to tasks for major commercial ventures.

abstract_zh: 需要专业知识来解释一系列领域的数据。专家弥合了我们对数据和感兴趣参数之间关系的了解中经常存在的差距。在地球科学应用中尤其如此，地球的知识来自对可观测特征的解释，并且主要依赖于未经证实但广泛接受的理论。因此，专家可以帮助解决原本无法解决的问题。然而，专家本质上是主观的，容易受到认知偏差和不利的外部影响。这项工作研究了地球科学中的这个问题。提供了三个令人信服的例子来说明以前的研究中普遍存在的认知偏差。然后正式定义该问题，并制定一套设计原则，确保任何解决方案都足够灵活，可以轻松应用于一系列地球科学问题。不存在能够可靠地捕捉和减少专家认知偏差的解决方案。然而，正式的专家启发方法可用于评估专家变异，并且存在多种方法可能有助于阐明不确定性，避免误解，并减少羊群行为或单一专家的过度支配。这项工作结合了现有和未来的方法，通过灵活的模块化设计来减少专家的次优性，其中每个模块都提供特定的功能。该设计以行动模块为中心，强制执行解释任务。提供了一个入门模块包作为概念设计的示例。这种简单的偏差减少系统可以很容易地应用于组织中，并在日常解释过程中应用于主要商业企业的任务。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种模块化接口设计，用于在专家解读过程中减少认知偏差，特别是在地质科学领域。
AI.motivation: 专家在解读数据时易受认知偏差影响，而地质科学等领域的决策高度依赖专家判断，亟需系统性方法降低偏差带来的风险。
AI.method: 通过整合现有专家评估方法与未来技术，设计包含多个功能模块的系统，强制中断常规解读流程以触发偏差检查步骤，并提供模块化工具包作为示例。
AI.result: 该模块化系统可有效减少专家主观偏差，适用于从日常任务到商业项目等多种场景，但尚未有方法能完全消除偏差。
AI.conclusion: 模块化设计为管理专家认知偏差提供了灵活框架，通过结构化干预可提升决策可靠性，未来需进一步验证其在不同领域的适用性。

authors_text: Alexey Korovin,Artem Vasilyev,Fedor Egorov,Dmitry Saykin,Evgeny Terukov,Igor Shakhray,Leonid Zhukov,Semen Budennyy
title: Anomaly segmentation model for defects detection in electroluminescence images of heterojunction solar cells
title_zh: 异质结太阳能电池电致发光图像缺陷检测的异常分割模型
abstract: Efficient defect detection in solar cell manufacturing is crucial for stable green energy technology manufacturing. This paper presents a deep-learning-based automatic detection model SeMaCNN for classification and semantic segmentation of electroluminescent images for solar cell quality evaluation and anomalies detection. The core of the model is an anomaly detection algorithm based on Mahalanobis distance that can be trained in a semi-supervised manner on imbalanced data with small number of digital electroluminescence images with relevant defects. This is particularly valuable for prompt model integration into the industrial landscape. The model has been trained with the on-plant collected dataset consisting of 68 748 electroluminescent images of heterojunction solar cells with a busbar grid. Our model achieves the accuracy of 92.5%, F1 score 95.8%, recall 94.8%, and precision 96.9% within the validation subset consisting of 1049 manually annotated images. The model was also tested on the open ELPV dataset and demonstrates stable performance with accuracy 94.6% and F1 score 91.1%. The SeMaCNN model demonstrates a good balance between its performance and computational costs, which make it applicable for integrating into quality control systems of solar cell manufacturing.
summary: Efficient defect detection in solar cell manufacturing is crucial for stable green energy technology manufacturing. This paper presents a deep-learning-based automatic detection model SeMaCNN for classification and semantic segmentation of electroluminescent images for solar cell quality evaluation and anomalies detection. The core of the model is an anomaly detection algorithm based on Mahalanobis distance that can be trained in a semi-supervised manner on imbalanced data with small number of digital electroluminescence images with relevant defects. This is particularly valuable for prompt model integration into the industrial landscape. The model has been trained with the on-plant collected dataset consisting of 68 748 electroluminescent images of heterojunction solar cells with a busbar grid. Our model achieves the accuracy of 92.5%, F1 score 95.8%, recall 94.8%, and precision 96.9% within the validation subset consisting of 1049 manually annotated images. The model was also tested on the open ELPV dataset and demonstrates stable performance with accuracy 94.6% and F1 score 91.1%. The SeMaCNN model demonstrates a good balance between its performance and computational costs, which make it applicable for integrating into quality control systems of solar cell manufacturing.
abstract_zh: 太阳能电池制造中的有效缺陷检测对于稳定的绿色能源技术制造至关重要。本文提出了一种基于深度学习的自动检测模型 SeMaCNN，用于电致发光图像的分类和语义分割，用于太阳能电池质量评估和异常检测。该模型的核心是基于马氏距离的异常检测算法，该算法可以在具有相关缺陷的少量数字电致发光图像的不平衡数据上以半监督方式进行训练。这对于快速将模型集成到工业领域尤其有价值。该模型已使用厂内收集的数据集进行了训练，该数据集包含带有母线栅的异质结太阳能电池的 68,748 个电致发光图像。我们的模型在由 1049 张手动注释图像组成的验证子集中实现了 92.5% 的准确率、95.8% 的 F1 分数、94.8% 的召回率和 96.9% 的精度。该模型还在开放的 ELPV 数据集上进行了测试，表现出稳定的性能，准确率达到 94.6%，F1 分数达到 91.1%。 SeMaCNN 模型在性能和计算成本之间表现出良好的平衡，这使其适用于集成到太阳能电池制造的质量控制系统中。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于深度学习的SeMaCNN模型，用于异质结太阳能电池电致发光图像的缺陷分类与语义分割检测。
AI.motivation: 太阳能电池制造中高效缺陷检测对稳定绿色能源技术至关重要，而现有方法面临数据不平衡、样本量小等工业应用难题。
AI.method: 采用基于马氏距离的异常检测算法，通过半监督学习框架处理少量标注缺陷图像，在包含68,748张电致发光图像的工业数据集上训练模型。
AI.result: 在1049张人工标注验证图像上达到92.5%准确率、95.8% F1分数，在公开ELPV数据集上保持94.6%准确率和91.1% F1分数，计算成本可控。
AI.conclusion: SeMaCNN在性能与计算成本间取得良好平衡，可有效集成至太阳能电池制造的质量控制系统中。

Our model achieves the accuracy of 92.5%, F1 score 95.8%, recall 94.8%, and precision 96.9% within the validation subset consisting of 1049 manually annotated images. The model was also tested on the open ELPV dataset and demonstrates stable performance with accuracy 94.6% and F1 score 91.1%. The SeMaCNN model demonstrates a good balance between its performance and computational costs, which make it applicable for integrating into quality control systems of solar cell manufacturing. 太阳能电池制造中的有效缺陷检测对于稳定的绿色能源技术制造至关重要。本文提出了一种基于深度学习的自动检测模型 SeMaCNN，用于电致发光图像的分类和语义分割，用于太阳能电池质量评估和异常检测。该模型的核心是基于马氏距离的异常检测算法，该算法可以在具有相关缺陷的少量数字电致发光图像的不平衡数据上以半监督方式进行训练。这对于快速将模型集成到工业领域尤其有价值。该模型已使用厂内收集的数据集进行了训练，该数据集包含带有母线栅的异质结太阳能电池的 68,748 个电致发光图像。我们的模型在由 1049 张手动注释图像组成的验证子集中实现了 92.5% 的准确率、95.8% 的 F1 分数、94.8% 的召回率和 96.9% 的精度。该模型还在开放的 ELPV 数据集上进行了测试，表现出稳定的性能，准确率达到 94.6%，F1 分数达到 91.1%。 SeMaCNN 模型在性能和计算成本之间表现出良好的平衡，这使其适用于集成到太阳能电池制造的质量控制系统中。 本文提出一种基于深度学习的SeMaCNN模型，用于异质结太阳能电池电致发光图像的缺陷分类与语义分割检测。 Alexey Korovin,Artem Vasilyev,Fedor Egorov,Dmitry Saykin,Evgeny Terukov,Igor Shakhray,Leonid Zhukov,Semen Budennyy cs.CV

authors_text: Elvis Johnson,Xiaochen Tang,Sriramacharyulu Samudrala
title: WeightMom: Learning Sparse Networks using Iterative Momentum-based pruning
title_zh: WeightMom：使用基于迭代动量的修剪来学习稀疏网络
abstract: Deep Neural Networks have been used in a wide variety of applications with significant success. However, their highly complex nature owing to comprising millions of parameters has lead to problems during deployment in pipelines with low latency requirements. As a result, it is more desirable to obtain lightweight neural networks which have the same performance during inference time. In this work, we propose a weight based pruning approach in which the weights are pruned gradually based on their momentum of the previous iterations. Each layer of the neural network is assigned an importance value based on their relative sparsity, followed by the magnitude of the weight in the previous iterations. We evaluate our approach on networks such as AlexNet, VGG16 and ResNet50 with image classification datasets such as CIFAR-10 and CIFAR-100. We found that the results outperformed the previous approaches with respect to accuracy and compression ratio. Our method is able to obtain a compression of 15% for the same degradation in accuracy on both the datasets.
summary: Deep Neural Networks have been used in a wide variety of applications with significant success. However, their highly complex nature owing to comprising millions of parameters has lead to problems during deployment in pipelines with low latency requirements. As a result, it is more desirable to obtain lightweight neural networks which have the same performance during inference time. In this work, we propose a weight based pruning approach in which the weights are pruned gradually based on their momentum of the previous iterations. Each layer of the neural network is assigned an importance value based on their relative sparsity, followed by the magnitude of the weight in the previous iterations. We evaluate our approach on networks such as AlexNet, VGG16 and ResNet50 with image classification datasets such as CIFAR-10 and CIFAR-100. We found that the results outperformed the previous approaches with respect to accuracy and compression ratio. Our method is able to obtain a compression of 15% for the same degradation in accuracy on both the datasets.
abstract_zh: 深度神经网络已在各种应用中得到了巨大的成功。然而，由于包含数百万个参数，它们的高度复杂性导致了在低延迟要求的管道中部署期间出现问题。因此，更希望获得在推理时间内具有相同性能的轻量级神经网络。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种基于权重的修剪方法，其中权重根据先前迭代的动量逐渐修剪。神经网络的每一层都根据其相对稀疏性分配一个重要性值，然后是先前迭代中权重的大小。我们使用 CIFAR-10 和 CIFAR-100 等图像分类数据集在 AlexNet、VGG16 和 ResNet50 等网络上评估我们的方法。我们发现结果在准确性和压缩比方面优于以前的方法。对于两个数据集的相同精度下降，我们的方法能够获得 15% 的压缩。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于动量的迭代权重剪枝方法WeightMom，用于学习稀疏网络以减少参数数量。
AI.motivation: 深度神经网络参数过多导致部署时延迟高，需在保持性能的前提下获得轻量级网络。
AI.method: 通过迭代计算权重动量，结合层间稀疏性和权重幅度确定重要性，逐步剪枝权重。
AI.result: 在CIFAR-10和CIFAR-100数据集上，相比现有方法实现了15%的压缩率且精度损失较小。
AI.conclusion: WeightMom方法在压缩比和精度之间取得了有效平衡，优于现有剪枝技术。

authors_text: Akshansh Mishra,Rakesh Morisetty,Rajat Sarawagi
title: Forecasting the production of Distillate Fuel Oil Refinery and Propane Blender net production by using Time Series Algorithms
title_zh: 使用时间序列算法预测馏分燃料油精炼厂的产量和丙烷混合机的净产量
abstract: Oil production forecasting is an important step in controlling the cost-effect and monitoring the functioning of petroleum reservoirs. As a result, oil production forecasting makes it easier for reservoir engineers to develop feasible projects, which helps to avoid risky investments and achieve long-term growth. As a result, reliable petroleum reservoir forecasting is critical for controlling and managing the effective cost of oil reservoirs. Oil production is influenced by reservoir qualities such as porosity, permeability, compressibility, fluid saturation, and other well operational parameters. Three-time series algorithms i.e., Seasonal Naive method, Exponential Smoothening and ARIMA to forecast the Distillate Fuel Oil Refinery and Propane Blender net production for the next two years.
summary: Oil production forecasting is an important step in controlling the cost-effect and monitoring the functioning of petroleum reservoirs. As a result, oil production forecasting makes it easier for reservoir engineers to develop feasible projects, which helps to avoid risky investments and achieve long-term growth. As a result, reliable petroleum reservoir forecasting is critical for controlling and managing the effective cost of oil reservoirs. Oil production is influenced by reservoir qualities such as porosity, permeability, compressibility, fluid saturation, and other well operational parameters. Three-time series algorithms i.e., Seasonal Naive method, Exponential Smoothening and ARIMA to forecast the Distillate Fuel Oil Refinery and Propane Blender net production for the next two years.
abstract_zh: 石油产量预测是控制成本效益和监测油藏运行情况的重要一步。因此，石油产量预测使油藏工程师更容易开发可行的项目，这有助于避免风险投资并实现长期增长。因此，可靠的油藏预测对于控制和管理油藏的有效成本至关重要。石油产量受到储层质量的影响，例如孔隙度、渗透率、压缩性、流体饱和度和其他油井运行参数。三种时间序列算法，即季节朴素法、指数平滑法和 ARIMA，用于预测未来两年的馏分燃料油精炼厂和丙烷混合机的净产量。

AI.tldr: 本文使用时间序列算法预测馏分燃料油炼油厂和丙烷混合厂未来两年的净产量。
AI.motivation: 石油产量预测对控制成本、监测油藏功能及避免风险投资具有重要意义，可靠预测有助于实现长期增长。
AI.method: 采用季节性朴素法、指数平滑法和ARIMA三种时间序列算法进行预测。
AI.result: 通过三种算法对馏分燃料油炼油厂和丙烷混合厂净产量进行了未来两年的预测。
AI.conclusion: 时间序列算法为石油产量预测提供了有效工具，有助于提升油藏管理效率和成本控制能力。

authors_text: Jason Y. Zhang,Deva Ramanan,Shubham Tulsiani
title: RelPose: Predicting Probabilistic Relative Rotation for Single Objects in the Wild
title_zh: RelPose：预测野外单个物体的概率相对旋转
abstract: We describe a data-driven method for inferring the camera viewpoints given multiple images of an arbitrary object. This task is a core component of classic geometric pipelines such as SfM and SLAM, and also serves as a vital pre-processing requirement for contemporary neural approaches (e.g. NeRF) to object reconstruction and view synthesis. In contrast to existing correspondence-driven methods that do not perform well given sparse views, we propose a top-down prediction based approach for estimating camera viewpoints. Our key technical insight is the use of an energy-based formulation for representing distributions over relative camera rotations, thus allowing us to explicitly represent multiple camera modes arising from object symmetries or views. Leveraging these relative predictions, we jointly estimate a consistent set of camera rotations from multiple images. We show that our approach outperforms state-of-the-art SfM and SLAM methods given sparse images on both seen and unseen categories. Further, our probabilistic approach significantly outperforms directly regressing relative poses, suggesting that modeling multimodality is important for coherent joint reconstruction. We demonstrate that our system can be a stepping stone toward in-the-wild reconstruction from multi-view datasets. The project page with code and videos can be found at https://jasonyzhang.com/relpose.
summary: We describe a data-driven method for inferring the camera viewpoints given multiple images of an arbitrary object. This task is a core component of classic geometric pipelines such as SfM and SLAM, and also serves as a vital pre-processing requirement for contemporary neural approaches (e.g. NeRF) to object reconstruction and view synthesis. In contrast to existing correspondence-driven methods that do not perform well given sparse views, we propose a top-down prediction based approach for estimating camera viewpoints. Our key technical insight is the use of an energy-based formulation for representing distributions over relative camera rotations, thus allowing us to explicitly represent multiple camera modes arising from object symmetries or views. Leveraging these relative predictions, we jointly estimate a consistent set of camera rotations from multiple images. We show that our approach outperforms state-of-the-art SfM and SLAM methods given sparse images on both seen and unseen categories. Further, our probabilistic approach significantly outperforms directly regressing relative poses, suggesting that modeling multimodality is important for coherent joint reconstruction. We demonstrate that our system can be a stepping stone toward in-the-wild reconstruction from multi-view datasets. The project page with code and videos can be found at https://jasonyzhang.com/relpose.
abstract_zh: 我们描述了一种数据驱动的方法，用于在给定任意对象的多个图像的情况下推断相机视点。该任务是 SfM 和 SLAM 等经典几何管道的核心组成部分，也是当代神经方法（例如 NeRF）对象重建和视图合成的重要预处理要求。与在稀疏视图下表现不佳的现有对应驱动方法相比，我们提出了一种基于自上而下预测的方法来估计相机视点。我们的关键技术见解是使用基于能量的公式来表示相对相机旋转的分布，从而使我们能够明确表示由对象对称性或视图产生的多种相机模式。利用这些相对预测，我们从多个图像中联合估计一组一致的相机旋转。我们证明，在已见和未见类别的稀疏图像下，我们的方法优于最先进的 SfM 和 SLAM 方法。此外，我们的概率方法明显优于直接回归相对姿势，这表明多模态建模对于连贯的关节重建很重要。我们证明我们的系统可以成为从多视图数据集进行野外重建的垫脚石。包含代码和视频的项目页面可以在 https://jasonyzhang.com/relpose 找到。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种数据驱动方法，通过多张图像推断相机视角，用于物体重建和视图合成。
AI.motivation: 现有基于对应关系的方法在稀疏视角下表现不佳，需解决物体对称性或不同视角导致的多模式相机姿态预测问题。
AI.method: 采用能量函数建模相对相机旋转分布，通过自上而下预测联合估计多视角下的一致相机旋转。
AI.result: 在稀疏图像上优于SfM/SLAM方法，概率建模显著优于直接回归相对姿态，证明多模态建模对联合重建的重要性。
AI.conclusion: 该系统为多视角数据集的野外场景重建提供了有效解决方案。

motivation: 现有基于对应关系的方法在稀疏视角下表现不佳，需解决物体对称性或不同视角导致的多模式相机姿态预测问题。
method: 采用能量函数建模相对相机旋转分布，通过自上而下预测联合估计多视角下的一致相机旋转。
result: 在稀疏图像上优于SfM/SLAM方法，概率建模显著优于直接回归相对姿态，证明多模态建模对联合重建的重要性。
conclusion: 该系统为多视角数据集的野外场景重建提供了有效解决方案。
search_text: RelPose: Predicting Probabilistic Relative Rotation for Single Objects in the Wild RelPose：预测野外单个物体的概率相对旋转 We describe a data-driven method for inferring the camera viewpoints given multiple images of an arbitrary object. This task is a core component of classic geometric pipelines such as SfM and SLAM, and also serves as a vital pre-processing requirement for contemporary neural approaches (e.g. NeRF) to object reconstruction and view synthesis. In contrast to existing correspondence-driven methods that do not perform well given sparse views, we propose a top-down prediction based approach for estimating camera viewpoints. Our key technical insight is the use of an energy-based formulation for representing distributions over relative camera rotations, thus allowing us to explicitly represent multiple camera modes arising from object symmetries or views. Leveraging these relative predictions, we jointly estimate a consistent set of camera rotations from multiple images. We show that our approach outperforms state-of-the-art SfM and SLAM methods given sparse images on both seen and unseen categories. Further, our probabilistic approach significantly outperforms directly regressing relative poses, suggesting that modeling multimodality is important for coherent joint reconstruction. We demonstrate that our system can be a stepping stone toward in-the-wild reconstruction from multi-view datasets. The project page with code and videos can be found at https://jasonyzhang.com/relpose. 我们描述了一种数据驱动的方法，用于在给定任意对象的多个图像的情况下推断相机视点。该任务是 SfM 和 SLAM 等经典几何管道的核心组成部分，也是当代神经方法（例如 NeRF）对象重建和视图合成的重要预处理要求。与在稀疏视图下表现不佳的现有对应驱动方法相比，我们提出了一种基于自上而下预测的方法来估计相机视点。我们的关键技术见解是使用基于能量的公式来表示相对相机旋转的分布，从而使我们能够明确表示由对象对称性或视图产生的多种相机模式。利用这些相对预测，我们从多个图像中联合估计一组一致的相机旋转。我们证明，在已见和未见类别的稀疏图像下，我们的方法优于最先进的 SfM 和 SLAM 方法。此外，我们的概率方法明显优于直接回归相对姿势，这表明多模态建模对于连贯的关节重建很重要。我们证明我们的系统可以成为从多视图数据集进行野外重建的垫脚石。包含代码和视频的项目页面可以在 https://jasonyzhang.com/relpose 找到。 本文提出一种数据驱动方法，通过多张图像推断相机视角，用于物体重建和视图合成。 Jason Y. Zhang,Deva Ramanan,Shubham Tulsiani cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Jun-Kun Chen,Yu-Xiong Wang
title: PointTree: Transformation-Robust Point Cloud Encoder with Relaxed K-D Trees
title_zh: PointTree：具有宽松 K-D 树的稳健变换点云编码器
abstract: Being able to learn an effective semantic representation directly on raw point clouds has become a central topic in 3D understanding. Despite rapid progress, state-of-the-art encoders are restrictive to canonicalized point clouds, and have weaker than necessary performance when encountering geometric transformation distortions. To overcome this challenge, we propose PointTree, a general-purpose point cloud encoder that is robust to transformations based on relaxed K-D trees. Key to our approach is the design of the division rule in K-D trees by using principal component analysis (PCA). We use the structure of the relaxed K-D tree as our computational graph, and model the features as border descriptors which are merged with pointwise-maximum operation. In addition to this novel architecture design, we further improve the robustness by introducing pre-alignment -- a simple yet effective PCA-based normalization scheme. Our PointTree encoder combined with pre-alignment consistently outperforms state-of-the-art methods by large margins, for applications from object classification to semantic segmentation on various transformed versions of the widely-benchmarked datasets. Code and pre-trained models are available at https://github.com/immortalCO/PointTree.
summary: Being able to learn an effective semantic representation directly on raw point clouds has become a central topic in 3D understanding. Despite rapid progress, state-of-the-art encoders are restrictive to canonicalized point clouds, and have weaker than necessary performance when encountering geometric transformation distortions. To overcome this challenge, we propose PointTree, a general-purpose point cloud encoder that is robust to transformations based on relaxed K-D trees. Key to our approach is the design of the division rule in K-D trees by using principal component analysis (PCA). We use the structure of the relaxed K-D tree as our computational graph, and model the features as border descriptors which are merged with pointwise-maximum operation. In addition to this novel architecture design, we further improve the robustness by introducing pre-alignment -- a simple yet effective PCA-based normalization scheme. Our PointTree encoder combined with pre-alignment consistently outperforms state-of-the-art methods by large margins, for applications from object classification to semantic segmentation on various transformed versions of the widely-benchmarked datasets. Code and pre-trained models are available at https://github.com/immortalCO/PointTree.
abstract_zh: 能够直接在原始点云上学习有效的语义表示已成为 3D 理解的中心主题。尽管取得了快速进展，但最先进的编码器仅限于规范化点云，并且在遇到几何变换失真时，其性能低于必要的性能。为了克服这一挑战，我们提出了 PointTree，这是一种通用点云编码器，对于基于宽松 K-D 树的变换具有鲁棒性。我们方法的关键是使用主成分分析 (PCA) 设计 K-D 树的划分规则。我们使用松弛 K-D 树的结构作为计算图，并将特征建模为边界描述符，并与逐点最大操作合并。除了这种新颖的架构设计之外，我们还通过引入预对齐（一种简单而有效的基于 PCA 的归一化方案）进一步提高了鲁棒性。我们的 PointTree 编码器与预对齐相结合，在广泛基准数据集的各种转换版本上的从对象分类到语义分割的应用中，始终大幅优于最先进的方法。代码和预训练模型可在 https://github.com/immortalCO/PointTree 获取。

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于松弛K-D树的点云编码器，以增强对几何变换的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有点云编码器在处理几何变换时性能不足，需更鲁棒的解决方案。
AI.method: 通过PCA设计K-D树分割规则，采用松弛K-D树结构作为计算图，结合点最大值操作合并特征，并引入预对齐的PCA归一化方案。
AI.result: 在多种变换版本的基准数据集上，PointTree在分类和分割任务中显著优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: PointTree通过架构创新和预对齐方法有效提升变换鲁棒性，为3D理解提供新方向。

authors_text: Chelsea Myers-Colet,Julien Schroeter,Douglas L. Arnold,Tal Arbel
title: Heatmap Regression for Lesion Detection using Pointwise Annotations
title_zh: 使用逐点注释进行病变检测的热图回归
comment: Accepted at Medical Image Learning with Limited & Noisy Data (MILLanD), a workshop hosted with the conference on Medical Image Computing and Computer Assisted Interventions (MICCAI) 2022
comments: Accepted at Medical Image Learning with Limited & Noisy Data (MILLanD), a workshop hosted with the conference on Medical Image Computing and Computer Assisted Interventions (MICCAI) 2022
abstract: In many clinical contexts, detecting all lesions is imperative for evaluating disease activity. Standard approaches pose lesion detection as a segmentation problem despite the time-consuming nature of acquiring segmentation labels. In this paper, we present a lesion detection method which relies only on point labels. Our model, which is trained via heatmap regression, can detect a variable number of lesions in a probabilistic manner. In fact, our proposed post-processing method offers a reliable way of directly estimating the lesion existence uncertainty. Experimental results on Gad lesion detection show our point-based method performs competitively compared to training on expensive segmentation labels. Finally, our detection model provides a suitable pre-training for segmentation. When fine-tuning on only 17 segmentation samples, we achieve comparable performance to training with the full dataset.
summary: In many clinical contexts, detecting all lesions is imperative for evaluating disease activity. Standard approaches pose lesion detection as a segmentation problem despite the time-consuming nature of acquiring segmentation labels. In this paper, we present a lesion detection method which relies only on point labels. Our model, which is trained via heatmap regression, can detect a variable number of lesions in a probabilistic manner. In fact, our proposed post-processing method offers a reliable way of directly estimating the lesion existence uncertainty. Experimental results on Gad lesion detection show our point-based method performs competitively compared to training on expensive segmentation labels. Finally, our detection model provides a suitable pre-training for segmentation. When fine-tuning on only 17 segmentation samples, we achieve comparable performance to training with the full dataset.
abstract_zh: 在许多临床环境中，检测所有病变对于评估疾病活动性至关重要。尽管获取分割标签非常耗时，但标准方法将病变检测视为分割问题。在本文中，我们提出了一种仅依赖于点标签的病变检测方法。我们的模型通过热图回归进行训练，可以以概率方式检测可变数量的病变。事实上，我们提出的后处理方法提供了一种直接估计病变存在不确定性的可靠方法。 Gad 病变检测的实验结果表明，与昂贵的分割标签上的训练相比，我们基于点的方法具有竞争力。最后，我们的检测模型为分割提供了合适的预训练。当仅对 17 个分割样本进行微调时，我们获得了与使用完整数据集进行训练相当的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于点标注的病变检测方法，通过热图回归实现无需分割标签的病变检测。
AI.motivation: 传统病变检测依赖耗时的分割标注，而点标注更易获取且成本更低，需开发高效替代方案。
AI.method: 采用热图回归模型进行病变检测，结合点标注训练，并通过后处理估计病变存在不确定性。
AI.result: 在Gad病变检测任务中，点标注方法性能接近分割标签训练模型，且微调17个分割样本即可达全数据集效果。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在降低标注成本的同时保持检测性能，且可作为分割任务的预训练模型。

authors_text: Chuhao Qin,Fethi Candan,Lyudmila S. Mihaylova,Evangelos Pournaras
title: 3, 2, 1, Drones Go! A Testbed to Take off UAV Swarm Intelligence for Distributed Sensing
title_zh: 3,2,1，无人机出发！用于分布式传感的无人机群体智能测试平台
abstract: This paper introduces a testbed to study distributed sensing problems of Unmanned Aerial Vehicles (UAVs) exhibiting swarm intelligence. Several Smart City applications, such as transport and disaster response, require efficient collection of sensor data by a swarm of intelligent and cooperative UAVs. This often proves to be too complex and costly to study systematically and rigorously without compromising scale, realism and external validity. With the proposed testbed, this paper sets a stepping stone to emulate, within small laboratory spaces, large sensing areas of interest originated from empirical data and simulation models. Over this sensing map, a swarm of low-cost drones can fly allowing the study of a large spectrum of problems such as energy consumption, charging control, navigation and collision avoidance. The applicability of a decentralized multi-agent collective learning algorithm (EPOS) for UAV swarm intelligence along with the assessment of power consumption measurements provide a proof-of-concept and validate the accuracy of the proposed testbed.
summary: This paper introduces a testbed to study distributed sensing problems of Unmanned Aerial Vehicles (UAVs) exhibiting swarm intelligence. Several Smart City applications, such as transport and disaster response, require efficient collection of sensor data by a swarm of intelligent and cooperative UAVs. This often proves to be too complex and costly to study systematically and rigorously without compromising scale, realism and external validity. With the proposed testbed, this paper sets a stepping stone to emulate, within small laboratory spaces, large sensing areas of interest originated from empirical data and simulation models. Over this sensing map, a swarm of low-cost drones can fly allowing the study of a large spectrum of problems such as energy consumption, charging control, navigation and collision avoidance. The applicability of a decentralized multi-agent collective learning algorithm (EPOS) for UAV swarm intelligence along with the assessment of power consumption measurements provide a proof-of-concept and validate the accuracy of the proposed testbed.
abstract_zh: 本文介绍了一个用于研究具有群体智能的无人机 (UAV) 分布式传感问题的测试平台。交通和灾难响应等多种智慧城市应用需要通过一群智能协作无人机有效收集传感器数据。这往往被证明过于复杂和昂贵，无法在不影响规模、现实性和外部有效性的情况下进行系统和严格的研究。通过所提出的测试平台，本文奠定了在小型实验室空间内模拟源自经验数据和仿真模型的大型感兴趣传感区域的垫脚石。在这张传感地图上，一群低成本无人机可以飞行，从而可以研究能源消耗、充电控制、导航和防撞等一系列问题。无人机群体智能的分散式多智能体集体学习算法（EPOS）的适用性以及功耗测量的评估提供了概念验证并验证了所提出的测试台的准确性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于研究无人机群智能分布式感知问题的测试平台。
AI.motivation: 现有研究难以在不牺牲规模、真实性和外部效度的前提下，系统性地研究智能协作无人机群的传感器数据采集问题。
AI.method: 构建基于低成本无人机的实验室测试平台，结合实证数据与仿真模型模拟大规模感知场景，并应用去中心化多智能体集体学习算法EPOS进行验证。
AI.result: 验证了测试平台的准确性，展示了EPOS算法在能耗控制、导航避障等无人机群智能问题中的可行性。
AI.conclusion: 该测试平台为研究无人机群智能在分布式感知中的应用提供了可扩展的实验基础。

search_text: 3, 2, 1, Drones Go! A Testbed to Take off UAV Swarm Intelligence for Distributed Sensing 3,2,1，无人机出发！用于分布式传感的无人机群体智能测试平台 This paper introduces a testbed to study distributed sensing problems of Unmanned Aerial Vehicles (UAVs) exhibiting swarm intelligence. Several Smart City applications, such as transport and disaster response, require efficient collection of sensor data by a swarm of intelligent and cooperative UAVs. This often proves to be too complex and costly to study systematically and rigorously without compromising scale, realism and external validity. With the proposed testbed, this paper sets a stepping stone to emulate, within small laboratory spaces, large sensing areas of interest originated from empirical data and simulation models. Over this sensing map, a swarm of low-cost drones can fly allowing the study of a large spectrum of problems such as energy consumption, charging control, navigation and collision avoidance. The applicability of a decentralized multi-agent collective learning algorithm (EPOS) for UAV swarm intelligence along with the assessment of power consumption measurements provide a proof-of-concept and validate the accuracy of the proposed testbed. 本文介绍了一个用于研究具有群体智能的无人机 (UAV) 分布式传感问题的测试平台。交通和灾难响应等多种智慧城市应用需要通过一群智能协作无人机有效收集传感器数据。这往往被证明过于复杂和昂贵，无法在不影响规模、现实性和外部有效性的情况下进行系统和严格的研究。通过所提出的测试平台，本文奠定了在小型实验室空间内模拟源自经验数据和仿真模型的大型感兴趣传感区域的垫脚石。在这张传感地图上，一群低成本无人机可以飞行，从而可以研究能源消耗、充电控制、导航和防撞等一系列问题。无人机群体智能的分散式多智能体集体学习算法（EPOS）的适用性以及功耗测量的评估提供了概念验证并验证了所提出的测试台的准确性。 本文提出了一种用于研究无人机群智能分布式感知问题的测试平台。 Chuhao Qin,Fethi Candan,Lyudmila S. Mihaylova,Evangelos Pournaras cs.RO,cs.DC

authors_text: Aghiles Ait Messaoud,Sonia Ben Mokhtar,Vlad Nitu,Valerio Schiavoni
title: Shielding Federated Learning Systems against Inference Attacks with ARM TrustZone
title_zh: 使用 ARM TrustZone 保护联邦学习系统免受推理攻击
comment: This publication incorporates results from the VEDLIoT project, which received funding from the European Union's Horizon 2020 research and innovation programme under grant agreement No 957197
comments: This publication incorporates results from the VEDLIoT project, which received funding from the European Union's Horizon 2020 research and innovation programme under grant agreement No 957197
abstract: Federated Learning (FL) opens new perspectives for training machine learning models while keeping personal data on the users premises. Specifically, in FL, models are trained on the users devices and only model updates (i.e., gradients) are sent to a central server for aggregation purposes. However, the long list of inference attacks that leak private data from gradients, published in the recent years, have emphasized the need of devising effective protection mechanisms to incentivize the adoption of FL at scale. While there exist solutions to mitigate these attacks on the server side, little has been done to protect users from attacks performed on the client side. In this context, the use of Trusted Execution Environments (TEEs) on the client side are among the most proposing solutions. However, existing frameworks (e.g., DarkneTZ) require statically putting a large portion of the machine learning model into the TEE to effectively protect against complex attacks or a combination of attacks. We present GradSec, a solution that allows protecting in a TEE only sensitive layers of a machine learning model, either statically or dynamically, hence reducing both the TCB size and the overall training time by up to 30% and 56%, respectively compared to state-of-the-art competitors.
summary: Federated Learning (FL) opens new perspectives for training machine learning models while keeping personal data on the users premises. Specifically, in FL, models are trained on the users devices and only model updates (i.e., gradients) are sent to a central server for aggregation purposes. However, the long list of inference attacks that leak private data from gradients, published in the recent years, have emphasized the need of devising effective protection mechanisms to incentivize the adoption of FL at scale. While there exist solutions to mitigate these attacks on the server side, little has been done to protect users from attacks performed on the client side. In this context, the use of Trusted Execution Environments (TEEs) on the client side are among the most proposing solutions. However, existing frameworks (e.g., DarkneTZ) require statically putting a large portion of the machine learning model into the TEE to effectively protect against complex attacks or a combination of attacks. We present GradSec, a solution that allows protecting in a TEE only sensitive layers of a machine learning model, either statically or dynamically, hence reducing both the TCB size and the overall training time by up to 30% and 56%, respectively compared to state-of-the-art competitors.
abstract_zh: 联邦学习 (FL) 为训练机器学习模型开辟了新的视角，同时将个人数据保留在用户场所。具体来说，在 FL 中，模型在用户设备上进行训练，并且仅将模型更新（即梯度）发送到中央服务器以进行聚合。然而，近年来发布的一长串从梯度中泄露私人数据的推理攻击强调了设计有效保护机制以激励大规模采用 FL 的必要性。虽然存在缓解服务器端这些攻击的解决方案，但在保护用户免受客户端攻击方面却做得很少。在此背景下，在客户端使用可信执行环境 (TEE) 是最受提议的解决方案之一。然而，现有框架（例如DarkneTZ）需要将大部分机器学习模型静态地放入TEE中，以有效防范复杂攻击或攻击组合。我们推出的 GradSec 解决方案允许在 TEE 中仅静态或动态地保护机器学习模型的敏感层，因此与最先进的竞争对手相比，TCB 大小和总体训练时间分别减少了 30% 和 56%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出GradSec方法，利用ARM TrustZone保护联邦学习系统中敏感的模型层，以抵御推理攻击。
AI.motivation: 联邦学习中客户端上传的梯度易受推理攻击，现有方案需将大量模型置于可信执行环境（TEE）导致效率低下，亟需更高效的保护机制。
AI.method: GradSec动态或静态地仅保护敏感模型层于TEE中，减少可信计算基（TCB）规模及训练时间。
AI.result: 相比现有方案，GradSec将TCB大小减少30%，训练时间缩短56%。
AI.conclusion: GradSec通过精准保护敏感层，在保障联邦学习安全的同时显著提升效率，为客户端安全提供新思路。

authors_text: Samuel Gerber,Marc Niethammer,Ebrahim Ebrahim,Joseph Piven,Stephen R. Dager,Martin Styner,Stephen Aylward,Andinet Enquobahrie
title: Optimal Transport Features for Morphometric Population Analysis
title_zh: 用于形态群体分析的最佳传输特征
abstract: Brain pathologies often manifest as partial or complete loss of tissue. The goal of many neuroimaging studies is to capture the location and amount of tissue changes with respect to a clinical variable of interest, such as disease progression. Morphometric analysis approaches capture local differences in the distribution of tissue or other quantities of interest in relation to a clinical variable. We propose to augment morphometric analysis with an additional feature extraction step based on unbalanced optimal transport. The optimal transport feature extraction step increases statistical power for pathologies that cause spatially dispersed tissue loss, minimizes sensitivity to shifts due to spatial misalignment or differences in brain topology, and separates changes due to volume differences from changes due to tissue location. We demonstrate the proposed optimal transport feature extraction step in the context of a volumetric morphometric analysis of the OASIS-1 study for Alzheimer's disease. The results demonstrate that the proposed approach can identify tissue changes and differences that are not otherwise measurable.
summary: Brain pathologies often manifest as partial or complete loss of tissue. The goal of many neuroimaging studies is to capture the location and amount of tissue changes with respect to a clinical variable of interest, such as disease progression. Morphometric analysis approaches capture local differences in the distribution of tissue or other quantities of interest in relation to a clinical variable. We propose to augment morphometric analysis with an additional feature extraction step based on unbalanced optimal transport. The optimal transport feature extraction step increases statistical power for pathologies that cause spatially dispersed tissue loss, minimizes sensitivity to shifts due to spatial misalignment or differences in brain topology, and separates changes due to volume differences from changes due to tissue location. We demonstrate the proposed optimal transport feature extraction step in the context of a volumetric morphometric analysis of the OASIS-1 study for Alzheimer's disease. The results demonstrate that the proposed approach can identify tissue changes and differences that are not otherwise measurable.
abstract_zh: 脑部病变通常表现为组织部分或完全丧失。许多神经影像学研究的目标是捕获与感兴趣的临床变量（例如疾病进展）相关的组织变化的位置和数量。形态计量分析方法捕获与临床变量相关的组织或其他感兴趣数量的分布的局部差异。我们建议通过基于不平衡最优传输的附加特征提取步骤来增强形态测量分析。最佳传输特征提取步骤增加了导致空间分散的组织损失的病理的统计能力，最小化对由于空间错位或大脑拓扑差异引起的变化的敏感性，并将由于体积差异引起的变化与由于组织位置引起的变化分开。我们在阿尔茨海默病 OASIS-1 研究的体积形态测量分析的背景下展示了所提出的最佳传输特征提取步骤。结果表明，所提出的方法可以识别无法通过其他方式测量的组织变化和差异。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于非平衡最优运输的特征提取方法，用于增强形态学群体分析中对脑组织病变的检测能力。
AI.motivation: 现有形态学分析方法对空间分散的组织损失敏感度低，且易受空间错位和大脑拓扑差异影响，难以区分体积变化与位置变化的差异。
AI.method: 结合非平衡最优运输理论提取特征，通过计算组织分布的最优传输计划，分离体积差异与空间分布差异的影响，并整合到体积形态分析框架中。
AI.result: 在阿尔茨海默病的OASIS-1数据集分析中，该方法成功检测到传统方法无法识别的组织变化模式，显著提升统计检验效能。
AI.conclusion: 最优运输特征提取方法能有效增强形态学分析对分散性组织病变的检测能力，为神经影像学研究提供新的分析工具。

The results demonstrate that the proposed approach can identify tissue changes and differences that are not otherwise measurable. 脑部病变通常表现为组织部分或完全丧失。许多神经影像学研究的目标是捕获与感兴趣的临床变量（例如疾病进展）相关的组织变化的位置和数量。形态计量分析方法捕获与临床变量相关的组织或其他感兴趣数量的分布的局部差异。我们建议通过基于不平衡最优传输的附加特征提取步骤来增强形态测量分析。最佳传输特征提取步骤增加了导致空间分散的组织损失的病理的统计能力，最小化对由于空间错位或大脑拓扑差异引起的变化的敏感性，并将由于体积差异引起的变化与由于组织位置引起的变化分开。我们在阿尔茨海默病 OASIS-1 研究的体积形态测量分析的背景下展示了所提出的最佳传输特征提取步骤。结果表明，所提出的方法可以识别无法通过其他方式测量的组织变化和差异。 本文提出一种基于非平衡最优运输的特征提取方法，用于增强形态学群体分析中对脑组织病变的检测能力。 Samuel Gerber,Marc Niethammer,Ebrahim Ebrahim,Joseph Piven,Stephen R. Dager,Martin Styner,Stephen Aylward,Andinet Enquobahrie cs.CV,eess.IV,q-bio.QM

authors_text: Kun Zhou,Berrak Sisman,Rajib Rana,B. W. Schuller,Haizhou Li
title: Speech Synthesis with Mixed Emotions
title_zh: 复杂情绪的语音合成
comment: Accepted to IEEE Transactions on Affective Computing
comments: Accepted to IEEE Transactions on Affective Computing
abstract: Emotional speech synthesis aims to synthesize human voices with various emotional effects. The current studies are mostly focused on imitating an averaged style belonging to a specific emotion type. In this paper, we seek to generate speech with a mixture of emotions at run-time. We propose a novel formulation that measures the relative difference between the speech samples of different emotions. We then incorporate our formulation into a sequence-to-sequence emotional text-to-speech framework. During the training, the framework does not only explicitly characterize emotion styles, but also explores the ordinal nature of emotions by quantifying the differences with other emotions. At run-time, we control the model to produce the desired emotion mixture by manually defining an emotion attribute vector. The objective and subjective evaluations have validated the effectiveness of the proposed framework. To our best knowledge, this research is the first study on modelling, synthesizing, and evaluating mixed emotions in speech.
summary: Emotional speech synthesis aims to synthesize human voices with various emotional effects. The current studies are mostly focused on imitating an averaged style belonging to a specific emotion type. In this paper, we seek to generate speech with a mixture of emotions at run-time. We propose a novel formulation that measures the relative difference between the speech samples of different emotions. We then incorporate our formulation into a sequence-to-sequence emotional text-to-speech framework. During the training, the framework does not only explicitly characterize emotion styles, but also explores the ordinal nature of emotions by quantifying the differences with other emotions. At run-time, we control the model to produce the desired emotion mixture by manually defining an emotion attribute vector. The objective and subjective evaluations have validated the effectiveness of the proposed framework. To our best knowledge, this research is the first study on modelling, synthesizing, and evaluating mixed emotions in speech.
abstract_zh: 情感语音合成旨在合成具有各种情感效果的人声。目前的研究主要集中在模仿属于特定情绪类型的平均风格。在本文中，我们寻求在运行时生成具有混合情感的语音。我们提出了一种新颖的公式来测量不同情绪的语音样本之间的相对差异。然后，我们将我们的公式纳入序列到序列的情感文本到语音框架中。在训练过程中，该框架不仅明确地表征了情绪风格，而且通过量化与其他情绪的差异来探索情绪的序数本质。在运行时，我们通过手动定义情感属性向量来控制模型产生所需的情感混合物。客观和主观评估验证了所提出框架的有效性。据我们所知，这项研究是第一个关于建模、合成和评估言语中混合情绪的研究。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种在运行时生成混合情感语音的新方法，通过测量不同情感语音样本的相对差异并整合到序列到序列框架中。
AI.motivation: 现有情感语音合成研究多聚焦于单一情感类型，难以满足实际场景中复杂情感混合的需求。
AI.method: 设计情感差异度量公式，结合序列到序列框架实现情感风格表征，并通过手动定义情感属性向量控制混合比例。
AI.result: 客观评价与主观测试均验证了框架有效性，实现了首个可建模、合成和评估混合情感语音的系统。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为情感语音合成提供了新思路，推动了更自然、多样化的语音生成技术发展。

authors_text: Fabian Parzer,Prashin Jethwa,Alina Boecker,Mayte Alfaro-Cuello,Otmar Scherzer,Glenn van de Ven
title: Uncertainty-Aware Blob Detection with an Application to Integrated-Light Stellar Population Recoveries
title_zh: 不确定性感知斑点检测及其在集成光恒星种群恢复中的应用
comment: Revision submitted to A&A, comments welcome
comments: Revision submitted to A&A, comments welcome
abstract: Context. Blob detection is a common problem in astronomy. One example is in stellar population modelling, where the distribution of stellar ages and metallicities in a galaxy is inferred from observations. In this context, blobs may correspond to stars born in-situ versus those accreted from satellites, and the task of blob detection is to disentangle these components. A difficulty arises when the distributions come with significant uncertainties, as is the case for stellar population recoveries inferred from modelling spectra of unresolved stellar systems. There is currently no satisfactory method for blob detection with uncertainties. Aims. We introduce a method for uncertainty-aware blob detection developed in the context of stellar population modelling of integrated-light spectra of stellar systems. Methods. We develop theory and computational tools for an uncertainty-aware version of the classic Laplacian-of-Gaussians method for blob detection, which we call ULoG. This identifies significant blobs considering a variety of scales. As a prerequisite to apply ULoG to stellar population modelling, we introduce a method for efficient computation of uncertainties for spectral modelling. This method is based on the truncated Singular Value Decomposition and Markov Chain Monte Carlo sampling (SVD-MCMC). Results. We apply the methods to data of the star cluster M54. We show that the SVD-MCMC inferences match those from standard MCMC, but are a factor 5-10 faster to compute. We apply ULoG to the inferred M54 age/metallicity distributions, identifying between 2 or 3 significant, distinct populations amongst its stars.

One example is in stellar population modelling, where the distribution of stellar ages and metallicities in a galaxy is inferred from observations. In this context, blobs may correspond to stars born in-situ versus those accreted from satellites, and the task of blob detection is to disentangle these components. A difficulty arises when the distributions come with significant uncertainties, as is the case for stellar population recoveries inferred from modelling spectra of unresolved stellar systems. There is currently no satisfactory method for blob detection with uncertainties. Aims. We introduce a method for uncertainty-aware blob detection developed in the context of stellar population modelling of integrated-light spectra of stellar systems. Methods. We develop theory and computational tools for an uncertainty-aware version of the classic Laplacian-of-Gaussians method for blob detection, which we call ULoG. This identifies significant blobs considering a variety of scales. As a prerequisite to apply ULoG to stellar population modelling, we introduce a method for efficient computation of uncertainties for spectral modelling. This method is based on the truncated Singular Value Decomposition and Markov Chain Monte Carlo sampling (SVD-MCMC). Results. We apply the methods to data of the star cluster M54. We show that the SVD-MCMC inferences match those from standard MCMC, but are a factor 5-10 faster to compute. We apply ULoG to the inferred M54 age/metallicity distributions, identifying between 2 or 3 significant, distinct populations amongst its stars.
abstract_zh: 语境。斑点检测是天文学中的一个常见问题。一个例子是恒星种群建模，其中星系中恒星年龄和金属丰度的分布是通过观测推断的。在这种情况下，斑点可能对应于原位诞生的恒星与卫星吸积的恒星，斑点检测的任务就是解开这些成分。当分布具有显着的不确定性时，就会出现困难，就像通过对未解析的恒星系统的建模光谱推断出的恒星种群恢复的情况一样。目前还没有令人满意的方法来检测具有不确定性的斑点。目标。我们介绍了一种在恒星系统集成光谱的恒星种群建模背景下开发的不确定性斑点检测方法。方法。我们开发了用于斑点检测的经典拉普拉斯高斯方法的不确定性感知版本的理论和计算工具，我们将其称为 ULoG。考虑到各种尺度，这可以识别重要的斑点。作为将 ULoG 应用于恒星种群建模的先决条件，我们引入了一种有效计算谱建模不确定性的方法。该方法基于截断奇异值分解和马尔可夫链蒙特卡罗采样（SVD-MCMC）。结果。我们将这些方法应用于星团 M54 的数据。我们证明 SVD-MCMC 推论与标准 MCMC 的推论相匹配，但计算速度快了 5-10 倍。我们将 ULoG 应用于推断的 M54 年龄/金属丰度分布，识别其恒星中 2 或 3 个重要的、不同的星群。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种考虑不确定性的blob检测方法ULoG，并应用于恒星种群恢复，以区分星团中不同起源的恒星群体。
AI.motivation: 现有blob检测方法难以处理恒星种群建模中因光谱建模产生的显著不确定性，需开发能处理不确定性的新方法以准确区分恒星群体。
AI.method: 开发不确定性感知的ULoG方法（基于拉普拉斯高斯算子），结合截断奇异值分解与MCMC采样（SVD-MCMC）高效计算不确定性。
AI.result: 在M54星团数据中，SVD-MCMC计算速度比标准MCMC快5-10倍，ULoG检测出2-3个显著不同的恒星种群。
AI.conclusion: ULoG方法有效处理不确定性，成功识别星团中不同起源的恒星群体，且SVD-MCMC显著提升计算效率。

authors_text: Daniel Schleich,Sven Behnke
title: Predictive Angular Potential Field-based Obstacle Avoidance for Dynamic UAV Flights
title_zh: 动态无人机飞行的基于角势场的预测避障
comment: Accepted for IEEE/RSJ International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems (IROS), Kyoto, Japan, to appear October 2022
comments: Accepted for IEEE/RSJ International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems (IROS), Kyoto, Japan, to appear October 2022
abstract: In recent years, unmanned aerial vehicles (UAVs) are used for numerous inspection and video capture tasks. Manually controlling UAVs in the vicinity of obstacles is challenging, however, and poses a high risk of collisions. Even for autonomous flight, global navigation planning might be too slow to react to newly perceived obstacles. Disturbances such as wind might lead to deviations from the planned trajectories. In this work, we present a fast predictive obstacle avoidance method that does not depend on higher-level localization or mapping and maintains the dynamic flight capabilities of UAVs. It directly operates on LiDAR range images in real time and adjusts the current flight direction by computing angular potential fields within the range image. The velocity magnitude is subsequently determined based on a trajectory prediction and time-to-contact estimation. Our method is evaluated using Hardware-in-the-Loop simulations. It keeps the UAV at a safe distance to obstacles, while allowing higher flight velocities than previous reactive obstacle avoidance methods that directly operate on sensor data.
summary: In recent years, unmanned aerial vehicles (UAVs) are used for numerous inspection and video capture tasks. Manually controlling UAVs in the vicinity of obstacles is challenging, however, and poses a high risk of collisions. Even for autonomous flight, global navigation planning might be too slow to react to newly perceived obstacles. Disturbances such as wind might lead to deviations from the planned trajectories. In this work, we present a fast predictive obstacle avoidance method that does not depend on higher-level localization or mapping and maintains the dynamic flight capabilities of UAVs. It directly operates on LiDAR range images in real time and adjusts the current flight direction by computing angular potential fields within the range image. The velocity magnitude is subsequently determined based on a trajectory prediction and time-to-contact estimation. Our method is evaluated using Hardware-in-the-Loop simulations. It keeps the UAV at a safe distance to obstacles, while allowing higher flight velocities than previous reactive obstacle avoidance methods that directly operate on sensor data.
abstract_zh: 近年来，无人机（UAV）被用于大量检查和视频捕捉任务。然而，在障碍物附近手动控制无人机具有挑战性，并且发生碰撞的风险很高。即使对于自主飞行，全球导航规划也可能太慢，无法对新发现的障碍物做出反应。风等干扰可能会导致偏离计划轨迹。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种快速预测避障方法，该方法不依赖于更高级别的定位或地图绘制，并保持无人机的动态飞行能力。它直接对激光雷达距离图像进行实时操作，并通过计算距离图像内的角势场来调整当前的飞行方向。随后根据轨迹预测和接触时间估计来确定速度大小。我们的方法是使用硬件在环模拟进行评估的。它使无人机与障碍物保持安全距离，同时比以前直接操作传感器数据的反应式避障方法允许更高的飞行速度。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于预测性角势场的动态无人机避障方法，通过实时处理LiDAR数据调整飞行方向并确定速度。
AI.motivation: 无人机在复杂环境中手动控制易碰撞，传统自主导航响应慢且无法有效应对突发障碍物和风扰。
AI.method: 直接利用LiDAR距离图像实时计算角势场调整飞行方向，并通过轨迹预测和接触时间估计确定速度大小。
AI.result: 硬件在环仿真验证表明，该方法在保证安全距离的同时，相比传统反应式避障方法实现了更高的飞行速度。
AI.conclusion: 该方法无需高阶定位映射，有效提升了无人机动态避障的实时性和飞行效率。

search_text: Predictive Angular Potential Field-based Obstacle Avoidance for Dynamic UAV Flights 动态无人机飞行的基于角势场的预测避障 In recent years, unmanned aerial vehicles (UAVs) are used for numerous inspection and video capture tasks. Manually controlling UAVs in the vicinity of obstacles is challenging, however, and poses a high risk of collisions. Even for autonomous flight, global navigation planning might be too slow to react to newly perceived obstacles. Disturbances such as wind might lead to deviations from the planned trajectories. In this work, we present a fast predictive obstacle avoidance method that does not depend on higher-level localization or mapping and maintains the dynamic flight capabilities of UAVs. It directly operates on LiDAR range images in real time and adjusts the current flight direction by computing angular potential fields within the range image. The velocity magnitude is subsequently determined based on a trajectory prediction and time-to-contact estimation. Our method is evaluated using Hardware-in-the-Loop simulations. It keeps the UAV at a safe distance to obstacles, while allowing higher flight velocities than previous reactive obstacle avoidance methods that directly operate on sensor data. 近年来，无人机（UAV）被用于大量检查和视频捕捉任务。然而，在障碍物附近手动控制无人机具有挑战性，并且发生碰撞的风险很高。即使对于自主飞行，全球导航规划也可能太慢，无法对新发现的障碍物做出反应。风等干扰可能会导致偏离计划轨迹。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种快速预测避障方法，该方法不依赖于更高级别的定位或地图绘制，并保持无人机的动态飞行能力。它直接对激光雷达距离图像进行实时操作，并通过计算距离图像内的角势场来调整当前的飞行方向。随后根据轨迹预测和接触时间估计来确定速度大小。我们的方法是使用硬件在环模拟进行评估的。它使无人机与障碍物保持安全距离，同时比以前直接操作传感器数据的反应式避障方法允许更高的飞行速度。 本文提出了一种基于预测性角势场的动态无人机避障方法，通过实时处理LiDAR数据调整飞行方向并确定速度。 Daniel Schleich,Sven Behnke cs.RO

authors_text: Jakob Wasserthal,Hanns-Christian Breit,Manfred T. Meyer,Maurice Pradella,Daniel Hinck,Alexander W. Sauter,Tobias Heye,Daniel Boll,Joshy Cyriac,Shan Yang,Michael Bach,Martin Segeroth
title: TotalSegmentator: robust segmentation of 104 anatomical structures in CT images
title_zh: TotalSegmentator：CT 图像中 104 个解剖结构的稳健分割
abstract: We present a deep learning segmentation model that can automatically and robustly segment all major anatomical structures in body CT images. In this retrospective study, 1204 CT examinations (from the years 2012, 2016, and 2020) were used to segment 104 anatomical structures (27 organs, 59 bones, 10 muscles, 8 vessels) relevant for use cases such as organ volumetry, disease characterization, and surgical or radiotherapy planning. The CT images were randomly sampled from routine clinical studies and thus represent a real-world dataset (different ages, pathologies, scanners, body parts, sequences, and sites). The authors trained an nnU-Net segmentation algorithm on this dataset and calculated Dice similarity coefficients (Dice) to evaluate the model's performance. The trained algorithm was applied to a second dataset of 4004 whole-body CT examinations to investigate age dependent volume and attenuation changes. The proposed model showed a high Dice score (0.943) on the test set, which included a wide range of clinical data with major pathologies. The model significantly outperformed another publicly available segmentation model on a separate dataset (Dice score, 0.932 versus 0.871, respectively). The aging study demonstrated significant correlations between age and volume and mean attenuation for a variety of organ groups (e.g., age and aortic volume; age and mean attenuation of the autochthonous dorsal musculature). The developed model enables robust and accurate segmentation of 104 anatomical structures. The annotated dataset (https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.6802613) and toolkit (https://www.github.com/wasserth/TotalSegmentator) are publicly available.
summary: We present a deep learning segmentation model that can automatically and robustly segment all major anatomical structures in body CT images. In this retrospective study, 1204 CT examinations (from the years 2012, 2016, and 2020) were used to segment 104 anatomical structures (27 organs, 59 bones, 10 muscles, 8 vessels) relevant for use cases such as organ volumetry, disease characterization, and surgical or radiotherapy planning. The CT images were randomly sampled from routine clinical studies and thus represent a real-world dataset (different ages, pathologies, scanners, body parts, sequences, and sites). The authors trained an nnU-Net segmentation algorithm on this dataset and calculated Dice similarity coefficients (Dice) to evaluate the model's performance. The trained algorithm was applied to a second dataset of 4004 whole-body CT examinations to investigate age dependent volume and attenuation changes. The proposed model showed a high Dice score (0.943) on the test set, which included a wide range of clinical data with major pathologies. The model significantly outperformed another publicly available segmentation model on a separate dataset (Dice score, 0.932 versus 0.871, respectively). The aging study demonstrated significant correlations between age and volume and mean attenuation for a variety of organ groups (e.g., age and aortic volume; age and mean attenuation of the autochthonous dorsal musculature). The developed model enables robust and accurate segmentation of 104 anatomical structures. The annotated dataset (https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.6802613) and toolkit (https://www.github.com/wasserth/TotalSegmentator) are publicly available.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种深度学习分割模型，可以自动、稳健地分割身体 CT 图像中的所有主要解剖结构。在这项回顾性研究中，使用 1204 次 CT 检查（2012 年、2016 年和 2020 年）来分割 104 个解剖结构（27 个器官、59 个骨骼、10 个肌肉、8 个血管），这些结构与器官体积、疾病特征以及手术或放射治疗计划等用例相关。 CT 图像是从常规临床研究中随机采样的，因此代表了真实世界的数据集（不同的年龄、病理、扫描仪、身体部位、序列和部位）。作者在此数据集上训练了 nnU-Net 分割算法，并计算了 Dice 相似系数（Dice）来评估模型的性能。将经过训练的算法应用于 4004 次全身 CT 检查的第二个数据集，以研究年龄相关的体积和衰减变化。所提出的模型在测试集上显示出较高的 Dice 分数（0.943），其中包括具有主要病理学的广泛临床数据。该模型在单独的数据集上显着优于另一个公开可用的分割模型（Dice 得分分别为 0.932 和 0.871）。衰老研究表明，年龄和各种器官组的体积和平均衰减之间存在显着相关性（例如，年龄和主动脉体积；年龄和本土背侧肌肉组织的平均衰减）。开发的模型能够对 104 个解剖结构进行稳健且准确的分割。带注释的数据集（https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.6802613）和工具包（https://www.github.com/wasserth/TotalSegmentator）是公开可用的。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于深度学习的CT图像分割模型TotalSegmentator，可自动分割104种解剖结构，用于器官体积测量、疾病分析及治疗规划。
AI.motivation: 现有分割模型在临床真实数据（如不同年龄、病理、扫描设备等）中表现不稳定，需开发鲁棒性强、覆盖广泛解剖结构的分割工具以支持精准医疗。
AI.method: 采用nnU-Net架构，基于1204例临床CT数据训练模型，并在4004例独立数据集上测试。使用Dice系数评估性能，对比公开模型，并分析年龄与器官体积/密度的相关性。
AI.result: 模型在测试集上Dice得分为0.943，显著优于对比模型（0.871）。年龄研究显示主动脉体积、肌肉密度等与年龄存在显著相关性。数据集和工具包已开源。
AI.conclusion: TotalSegmentator实现了高精度、鲁棒的多结构分割，可支持临床研究与治疗规划，开源资源为后续研究提供基础。

authors_text: Biying Fu,Naser Damer
title: Face Morphing Attacks and Face Image Quality: The Effect of Morphing and the Unsupervised Attack Detection by Quality
title_zh: 人脸变形攻击和人脸图像质量：变形的影响和质量无监督攻击检测
abstract: Morphing attacks are a form of presentation attacks that gathered increasing attention in recent years. A morphed image can be successfully verified to multiple identities. This operation, therefore, poses serious security issues related to the ability of a travel or identity document to be verified to belong to multiple persons. Previous works touched on the issue of the quality of morphing attack images, however, with the main goal of quantitatively proofing the realistic appearance of the produced morphing attacks. We theorize that the morphing processes might have an effect on both, the perceptual image quality and the image utility in face recognition (FR) when compared to bona fide samples. Towards investigating this theory, this work provides an extensive analysis of the effect of morphing on face image quality, including both general image quality measures and face image utility measures. This analysis is not limited to a single morphing technique, but rather looks at six different morphing techniques and five different data sources using ten different quality measures. This analysis reveals consistent separability between the quality scores of morphing attack and bona fide samples measured by certain quality measures. Our study goes further to build on this effect and investigate the possibility of performing unsupervised morphing attack detection (MAD) based on quality scores. Our study looks intointra and inter-dataset detectability to evaluate the generalizability of such a detection concept on different morphing techniques and bona fide sources. Our final results point out that a set of quality measures, such as MagFace and CNNNIQA, can be used to perform unsupervised and generalized MAD with a correct classification accuracy of over 70%.
summary: Morphing attacks are a form of presentation attacks that gathered increasing attention in recent years. A morphed image can be successfully verified to multiple identities. This operation, therefore, poses serious security issues related to the ability of a travel or identity document to be verified to belong to multiple persons. Previous works touched on the issue of the quality of morphing attack images, however, with the main goal of quantitatively proofing the realistic appearance of the produced morphing attacks. We theorize that the morphing processes might have an effect on both, the perceptual image quality and the image utility in face recognition (FR) when compared to bona fide samples. Towards investigating this theory, this work provides an extensive analysis of the effect of morphing on face image quality, including both general image quality measures and face image utility measures. This analysis is not limited to a single morphing technique, but rather looks at six different morphing techniques and five different data sources using ten different quality measures. This analysis reveals consistent separability between the quality scores of morphing attack and bona fide samples measured by certain quality measures. Our study goes further to build on this effect and investigate the possibility of performing unsupervised morphing attack detection (MAD) based on quality scores. Our study looks intointra and inter-dataset detectability to evaluate the generalizability of such a detection concept on different morphing techniques and bona fide sources. Our final results point out that a set of quality measures, such as MagFace and CNNNIQA, can be used to perform unsupervised and generalized MAD with a correct classification accuracy of over 70%.
abstract_zh: 变形攻击是一种呈现攻击形式，近年来受到越来越多的关注。变形图像可以成功验证多个身份。因此，该操作带来了与验证旅行或身份证件属于多人的能力相关的严重安全问题。然而，之前的工作涉及变形攻击图像的质量问题，主要目标是定量证明所产生的变形攻击的真实外观。我们推测，与真实样本相比，变形过程可能会对人脸识别 (FR) 中的感知图像质量和图像效用产生影响。为了研究这一理论，这项工作对变形对面部图像质量的影响进行了广泛的分析，包括一般图像质量测量和面部图像效用测量。此分析不限于单一变形技术，而是使用十种不同的质量度量来研究六种不同的变形技术和五个不同的数据源。该分析揭示了变形攻击的质量得分与通过某些质量措施测量的真实样本之间的一致可分离性。我们的研究进一步建立在这种效应的基础上，并调查基于质量分数执行无监督变形攻击检测（MAD）的可能性。我们的研究着眼于数据集内和数据集间的可检测性，以评估这种检测概念在不同变形技术和真实来源上的普遍性。我们的最终结果指出，一组质量测量（例如 MagFace 和 CNNNIQA）可用于执行无监督和广义 MAD，正确分类准确率超过 70%。

AI.tldr: 本文分析面部融合攻击对图像质量的影响，并探索基于图像质量的无监督攻击检测方法。
AI.motivation: 融合攻击能欺骗身份验证系统，需研究其对图像质量的影响及检测方法，以提高安全。
AI.method: 通过六种融合技术、五种数据源和十种质量指标，分析质量差异，并基于质量分数进行无监督检测。
AI.result: 发现MagFace等质量指标可区分攻击与真实样本，无监督检测准确率超70%。
AI.conclusion: 基于图像质量指标的无监督检测方法有效且具有泛化能力，可提升身份验证安全。

search_text: Face Morphing Attacks and Face Image Quality: The Effect of Morphing and the Unsupervised Attack Detection by Quality 人脸变形攻击和人脸图像质量：变形的影响和质量无监督攻击检测 Morphing attacks are a form of presentation attacks that gathered increasing attention in recent years. A morphed image can be successfully verified to multiple identities. This operation, therefore, poses serious security issues related to the ability of a travel or identity document to be verified to belong to multiple persons. Previous works touched on the issue of the quality of morphing attack images, however, with the main goal of quantitatively proofing the realistic appearance of the produced morphing attacks. We theorize that the morphing processes might have an effect on both, the perceptual image quality and the image utility in face recognition (FR) when compared to bona fide samples. Towards investigating this theory, this work provides an extensive analysis of the effect of morphing on face image quality, including both general image quality measures and face image utility measures. This analysis is not limited to a single morphing technique, but rather looks at six different morphing techniques and five different data sources using ten different quality measures. This analysis reveals consistent separability between the quality scores of morphing attack and bona fide samples measured by certain quality measures. Our study goes further to build on this effect and investigate the possibility of performing unsupervised morphing attack detection (MAD) based on quality scores. Our study looks intointra and inter-dataset detectability to evaluate the generalizability of such a detection concept on different morphing techniques and bona fide sources. Our final results point out that a set of quality measures, such as MagFace and CNNNIQA, can be used to perform unsupervised and generalized MAD with a correct classification accuracy of over 70%. 变形攻击是一种呈现攻击形式，近年来受到越来越多的关注。变形图像可以成功验证多个身份。因此，该操作带来了与验证旅行或身份证件属于多人的能力相关的严重安全问题。然而，之前的工作涉及变形攻击图像的质量问题，主要目标是定量证明所产生的变形攻击的真实外观。我们推测，与真实样本相比，变形过程可能会对人脸识别 (FR) 中的感知图像质量和图像效用产生影响。为了研究这一理论，这项工作对变形对面部图像质量的影响进行了广泛的分析，包括一般图像质量测量和面部图像效用测量。此分析不限于单一变形技术，而是使用十种不同的质量度量来研究六种不同的变形技术和五个不同的数据源。该分析揭示了变形攻击的质量得分与通过某些质量措施测量的真实样本之间的一致可分离性。我们的研究进一步建立在这种效应的基础上，并调查基于质量分数执行无监督变形攻击检测（MAD）的可能性。我们的研究着眼于数据集内和数据集间的可检测性，以评估这种检测概念在不同变形技术和真实来源上的普遍性。我们的最终结果指出，一组质量测量（例如 MagFace 和 CNNNIQA）可用于执行无监督和广义 MAD，正确分类准确率超过 70%。 本文分析面部融合攻击对图像质量的影响，并探索基于图像质量的无监督攻击检测方法。 Biying Fu,Naser Damer cs.CV

authors_text: Lei Qi,Hongpeng Yang,Yinghuan Shi,Xin Geng
title: MultiMatch: Multi-task Learning for Semi-supervised Domain Generalization
title_zh: MultiMatch：半监督领域泛化的多任务学习
abstract: Domain generalization (DG) aims at learning a model on source domains to well generalize on the unseen target domain. Although it has achieved great success, most of existing methods require the label information for all training samples in source domains, which is time-consuming and expensive in the real-world application. In this paper, we resort to solving the semi-supervised domain generalization (SSDG) task, where there are a few label information in each source domain. To address the task, we first analyze the theory of the multi-domain learning, which highlights that 1) mitigating the impact of domain gap and 2) exploiting all samples to train the model can effectively reduce the generalization error in each source domain so as to improve the quality of pseudo-labels. According to the analysis, we propose MultiMatch, i.e., extending FixMatch to the multi-task learning framework, producing the high-quality pseudo-label for SSDG. To be specific, we consider each training domain as a single task (i.e., local task) and combine all training domains together (i.e., global task) to train an extra task for the unseen test domain. In the multi-task framework, we utilize the independent BN and classifier for each task, which can effectively alleviate the interference from different domains during pseudo-labeling. Also, most of parameters in the framework are shared, which can be trained by all training samples sufficiently. Moreover, to further boost the pseudo-label accuracy and the model's generalization, we fuse the predictions from the global task and local task during training and testing, respectively. A series of experiments validate the effectiveness of the proposed method, and it outperforms the existing semi-supervised methods and the SSDG method on several benchmark DG datasets.
summary: Domain generalization (DG) aims at learning a model on source domains to well generalize on the unseen target domain. Although it has achieved great success, most of existing methods require the label information for all training samples in source domains, which is time-consuming and expensive in the real-world application. In this paper, we resort to solving the semi-supervised domain generalization (SSDG) task, where there are a few label information in each source domain. To address the task, we first analyze the theory of the multi-domain learning, which highlights that 1) mitigating the impact of domain gap and 2) exploiting all samples to train the model can effectively reduce the generalization error in each source domain so as to improve the quality of pseudo-labels. According to the analysis, we propose MultiMatch, i.e., extending FixMatch to the multi-task learning framework, producing the high-quality pseudo-label for SSDG. To be specific, we consider each training domain as a single task (i.e., local task) and combine all training domains together (i.e., global task) to train an extra task for the unseen test domain. In the multi-task framework, we utilize the independent BN and classifier for each task, which can effectively alleviate the interference from different domains during pseudo-labeling. Also, most of parameters in the framework are shared, which can be trained by all training samples sufficiently. Moreover, to further boost the pseudo-label accuracy and the model's generalization, we fuse the predictions from the global task and local task during training and testing, respectively. A series of experiments validate the effectiveness of the proposed method, and it outperforms the existing semi-supervised methods and the SSDG method on several benchmark DG datasets.
abstract_zh: 域泛化（DG）旨在学习源域上的模型，以便更好地泛化未见过的目标域。尽管取得了巨大的成功，但大多数现有方法需要源域中所有训练样本的标签信息，这在实际应用中既耗时又昂贵。在本文中，我们求助于解决半监督域泛化（SSDG）任务，其中每个源域中都有一些标签信息。为了解决这个任务，我们首先分析了多域学习的理论，其中强调：1）减轻域差距的影响；2）利用所有样本来训练模型可以有效地减少每个源域的泛化误差，从而提高伪标签的质量。根据分析，我们提出了MultiMatch，即将FixMatch扩展到多任务学习框架，为SSDG生成高质量的伪标签。具体来说，我们将每个训练域视为单个任务（即局部任务），并将所有训练域组合在一起（即全局任务），为看不见的测试域训练额外的任务。在多任务框架中，我们为每个任务使用独立的BN和分类器，这可以有效减轻伪标记过程中来自不同域的干扰。此外，框架中的大部分参数是共享的，可以由所有训练样本充分训练。此外，为了进一步提高伪标签的准确性和模型的泛化性，我们在训练和测试期间分别融合了全局任务和局部任务的预测。一系列实验验证了该方法的有效性，并且在多个基准DG数据集上优于现有的半监督方法和SSDG方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出MultiMatch方法，解决半监督域泛化（SSDG）任务，在源域仅有少量标签的情况下提升模型在未见目标域的泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有域泛化方法依赖源域全部样本的标签，实际应用中标签获取成本高且耗时，需探索利用少量标签的半监督学习方案。
AI.method: 基于多任务学习框架扩展FixMatch，将每个源域视为本地任务，联合训练全局任务以适应目标域；采用独立BN和分类器减少域间干扰，通过参数共享提升样本利用率，并融合全局与本地任务预测结果。
AI.result: 在多个基准域泛化数据集上，MultiMatch优于现有半监督方法和SSDG方法，验证了其有效性。
AI.conclusion: MultiMatch通过多任务学习框架和伪标签融合策略，有效缓解域间差异，提升半监督域泛化的性能。
