authors_text: Ying Xu,Philipp Terhörst,Kiran Raja,Marius Pedersen
title: Analyzing Fairness in Deepfake Detection With Massively Annotated Databases
title_zh: 使用大量注释数据库分析 Deepfake 检测的公平性
abstract: In recent years, image and video manipulations with Deepfake have become a severe concern for security and society. Many detection models and datasets have been proposed to detect Deepfake data reliably. However, there is an increased concern that these models and training databases might be biased and, thus, cause Deepfake detectors to fail. In this work, we investigate factors causing biased detection in public Deepfake datasets by (a) creating large-scale demographic and non-demographic attribute annotations with 47 different attributes for five popular Deepfake datasets and (b) comprehensively analysing attributes resulting in AI-bias of three state-of-the-art Deepfake detection backbone models on these datasets. The analysis shows how various attributes influence a large variety of distinctive attributes (from over 65M labels) on the detection performance which includes demographic (age, gender, ethnicity) and non-demographic (hair, skin, accessories, etc.) attributes. The results examined datasets show limited diversity and, more importantly, show that the utilised Deepfake detection backbone models are strongly affected by investigated attributes making them not fair across attributes. The Deepfake detection backbone methods trained on such imbalanced/biased datasets result in incorrect detection results leading to generalisability, fairness, and security issues. Our findings and annotated datasets will guide future research to evaluate and mitigate bias in Deepfake detection techniques. The annotated datasets and the corresponding code are publicly available.
summary: In recent years, image and video manipulations with Deepfake have become a severe concern for security and society. Many detection models and datasets have been proposed to detect Deepfake data reliably. However, there is an increased concern that these models and training databases might be biased and, thus, cause Deepfake detectors to fail. In this work, we investigate factors causing biased detection in public Deepfake datasets by (a) creating large-scale demographic and non-demographic attribute annotations with 47 different attributes for five popular Deepfake datasets and (b) comprehensively analysing attributes resulting in AI-bias of three state-of-the-art Deepfake detection backbone models on these datasets. The analysis shows how various attributes influence a large variety of distinctive attributes (from over 65M labels) on the detection performance which includes demographic (age, gender, ethnicity) and non-demographic (hair, skin, accessories, etc.) attributes. The results examined datasets show limited diversity and, more importantly, show that the utilised Deepfake detection backbone models are strongly affected by investigated attributes making them not fair across attributes. The Deepfake detection backbone methods trained on such imbalanced/biased datasets result in incorrect detection results leading to generalisability, fairness, and security issues. Our findings and annotated datasets will guide future research to evaluate and mitigate bias in Deepfake detection techniques. The annotated datasets and the corresponding code are publicly available.
abstract_zh: 近年来，Deepfake 的图像和视频篡改已成为安全和社会的严重问题。人们已经提出了许多检测模型和数据集来可靠地检测 Deepfake 数据。然而，人们越来越担心这些模型和训练数据库可能存在偏差，从而导致 Deepfake 检测器失败。在这项工作中，我们通过（a）为五个流行的 Deepfake 数据集创建具有 47 个不同属性的大规模人口统计和非人口统计属性注释，以及（b）全面分析导致这些数据集上三个最先进的 Deepfake 检测骨干模型的 AI 偏差的属性，来研究导致公共 Deepfake 数据集出现偏差检测的因素。该分析显示了各种属性如何影响检测性能上的各种独特属性（来自超过 6500 万个标签），其中包括人口统计（年龄、性别、种族）和非人口统计（头发、皮肤、配饰等）属性。检查数据集的结果显示出有限的多样性，更重要的是，表明所使用的 Deepfake 检测主干模型受到调查属性的强烈影响，使得它们在属性之间不公平。在此类不平衡/有偏差的数据集上训练的 Deepfake 检测主干方法会导致错误的检测结果，从而导致普遍性、公平性和安全问题。我们的研究结果和带注释的数据集将指导未来的研究，以评估和减轻 Deepfake 检测技术中的偏差。带注释的数据集和相应的代码是公开的。

AI.tldr: 本文通过构建大规模标注数据集，分析深度伪造检测模型中的公平性问题，揭示训练数据偏差对检测性能的影响。
AI.motivation: 现有深度伪造检测模型可能存在因数据偏差导致的公平性缺陷，需系统研究其成因以提升检测的普适性与安全性。
AI.method: 对五个主流深度伪造数据集进行47类属性标注，分析三个前沿检测模型在不同属性下的性能差异，量化属性对检测结果的影响。
AI.result: 发现数据集属性多样性不足，检测模型在年龄、性别、种族等属性上存在显著偏差，导致检测准确率与公平性下降。
AI.conclusion: 当前深度伪造检测技术受训练数据偏差影响较大，需通过多样化数据集和公平性约束方法改进模型鲁棒性，研究团队已公开标注数据与代码以支持后续研究。

search_text: Analyzing Fairness in Deepfake Detection With Massively Annotated Databases 使用大量注释数据库分析 Deepfake 检测的公平性 In recent years, image and video manipulations with Deepfake have become a severe concern for security and society. Many detection models and datasets have been proposed to detect Deepfake data reliably. However, there is an increased concern that these models and training databases might be biased and, thus, cause Deepfake detectors to fail. In this work, we investigate factors causing biased detection in public Deepfake datasets by (a) creating large-scale demographic and non-demographic attribute annotations with 47 different attributes for five popular Deepfake datasets and (b) comprehensively analysing attributes resulting in AI-bias of three state-of-the-art Deepfake detection backbone models on these datasets. The analysis shows how various attributes influence a large variety of distinctive attributes (from over 65M labels) on the detection performance which includes demographic (age, gender, ethnicity) and non-demographic (hair, skin, accessories, etc.) attributes. The results examined datasets show limited diversity and, more importantly, show that the utilised Deepfake detection backbone models are strongly affected by investigated attributes making them not fair across attributes. The Deepfake detection backbone methods trained on such imbalanced/biased datasets result in incorrect detection results leading to generalisability, fairness, and security issues. Our findings and annotated datasets will guide future research to evaluate and mitigate bias in Deepfake detection techniques. The annotated datasets and the corresponding code are publicly available. 近年来，Deepfake 的图像和视频篡改已成为安全和社会的严重问题。人们已经提出了许多检测模型和数据集来可靠地检测 Deepfake 数据。然而，人们越来越担心这些模型和训练数据库可能存在偏差，从而导致 Deepfake 检测器失败。在这项工作中，我们通过（a）为五个流行的 Deepfake 数据集创建具有 47 个不同属性的大规模人口统计和非人口统计属性注释，以及（b）全面分析导致这些数据集上三个最先进的 Deepfake 检测骨干模型的 AI 偏差的属性，来研究导致公共 Deepfake 数据集出现偏差检测的因素。该分析显示了各种属性如何影响检测性能上的各种独特属性（来自超过 6500 万个标签），其中包括人口统计（年龄、性别、种族）和非人口统计（头发、皮肤、配饰等）属性。检查数据集的结果显示出有限的多样性，更重要的是，表明所使用的 Deepfake 检测主干模型受到调查属性的强烈影响，使得它们在属性之间不公平。在此类不平衡/有偏差的数据集上训练的 Deepfake 检测主干方法会导致错误的检测结果，从而导致普遍性、公平性和安全问题。我们的研究结果和带注释的数据集将指导未来的研究，以评估和减轻 Deepfake 检测技术中的偏差。带注释的数据集和相应的代码是公开的。 本文通过构建大规模标注数据集，分析深度伪造检测模型中的公平性问题，揭示训练数据偏差对检测性能的影响。 Ying Xu,Philipp Terhörst,Kiran Raja,Marius Pedersen cs.CV,cs.CY,cs.LG

authors_text: Vijaya Raghavan T. Ramkumar,Elahe Arani,Bahram Zonooz
title: Differencing based Self-supervised pretraining for Scene Change Detection
title_zh: 用于场景变化检测的基于差分的自监督预训练
comment: Published at Conference on Lifelong Learning Agents (CoLLAs 2022)
comments: Published at Conference on Lifelong Learning Agents (CoLLAs 2022)
abstract: Scene change detection (SCD), a crucial perception task, identifies changes by comparing scenes captured at different times. SCD is challenging due to noisy changes in illumination, seasonal variations, and perspective differences across a pair of views. Deep neural network based solutions require a large quantity of annotated data which is tedious and expensive to obtain. On the other hand, transfer learning from large datasets induces domain shift. To address these challenges, we propose a novel \textit{Differencing self-supervised pretraining (DSP)} method that uses feature differencing to learn discriminatory representations corresponding to the changed regions while simultaneously tackling the noisy changes by enforcing temporal invariance across views. Our experimental results on SCD datasets demonstrate the effectiveness of our method, specifically to differences in camera viewpoints and lighting conditions. Compared against the self-supervised Barlow Twins and the standard ImageNet pretraining that uses more than a million additional labeled images, DSP can surpass it without using any additional data. Our results also demonstrate the robustness of DSP to natural corruptions, distribution shift, and learning under limited labeled data.
summary: Scene change detection (SCD), a crucial perception task, identifies changes by comparing scenes captured at different times. SCD is challenging due to noisy changes in illumination, seasonal variations, and perspective differences across a pair of views. Deep neural network based solutions require a large quantity of annotated data which is tedious and expensive to obtain. On the other hand, transfer learning from large datasets induces domain shift. To address these challenges, we propose a novel \textit{Differencing self-supervised pretraining (DSP)} method that uses feature differencing to learn discriminatory representations corresponding to the changed regions while simultaneously tackling the noisy changes by enforcing temporal invariance across views. Our experimental results on SCD datasets demonstrate the effectiveness of our method, specifically to differences in camera viewpoints and lighting conditions. Compared against the self-supervised Barlow Twins and the standard ImageNet pretraining that uses more than a million additional labeled images, DSP can surpass it without using any additional data. Our results also demonstrate the robustness of DSP to natural corruptions, distribution shift, and learning under limited labeled data.
abstract_zh: 场景变化检测（SCD）是一项重要的感知任务，它通过比较不同时间捕获的场景来识别变化。由于光照变化、季节变化以及一对视图之间的视角差异，SCD 具有挑战性。基于深度神经网络的解决方案需要大量带注释的数据，获取这些数据既乏味又昂贵。另一方面，大型数据集的迁移学习会引起域转移。为了解决这些挑战，我们提出了一种新颖的 \textit{Differencing self-supervised pretraining (DSP)} 方法，该方法使用特征差异来学习与变化区域相对应的歧视性表示，同时通过强制跨视图的时间不变性来解决噪声变化。我们在 SCD 数据集上的实验结果证明了我们方法的有效性，特别是针对相机视点和照明条件的差异。与自监督的 Barlow Twins 和使用超过一百万个额外标记图像的标准 ImageNet 预训练相比，DSP 可以在不使用任何额外数据的情况下超越它。我们的结果还证明了 DSP 对自然损坏、分布偏移和有限标记数据下学习的鲁棒性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于差分的自监督预训练方法（DSP），用于解决场景变化检测（SCD）中因光照、视角差异等导致的挑战，无需额外标注数据即可提升模型性能。
AI.motivation: 传统SCD方法依赖大量标注数据且迁移学习易产生领域偏移，而现有自监督方法难以有效处理噪声变化和视角差异，亟需一种无需额外数据且鲁棒的解决方案。
AI.method: 通过特征差分学习区分变化区域，同时强制视图间时序不变性以消除噪声影响，实现自监督预训练。
AI.result: DSP在SCD数据集上超越了Barlow Twins和ImageNet预训练（后者需百万级标注数据），且对自然损坏、分布偏移及有限标注数据具有鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: DSP方法有效解决了SCD中的噪声变化与视角差异问题，为减少标注依赖和提升模型鲁棒性提供了新思路。

authors_text: Jeremy Budd,Yves van Gennip,Jonas Latz,Simone Parisotto,Carola-Bibiane Schönlieb
title: Joint reconstruction-segmentation on graphs
title_zh: 图上的联合重建分割
abstract: Practical image segmentation tasks concern images which must be reconstructed from noisy, distorted, and/or incomplete observations. A recent approach for solving such tasks is to perform this reconstruction jointly with the segmentation, using each to guide the other. However, this work has so far employed relatively simple segmentation methods, such as the Chan--Vese algorithm. In this paper, we present a method for joint reconstruction-segmentation using graph-based segmentation methods, which have been seeing increasing recent interest. Complications arise due to the large size of the matrices involved, and we show how these complications can be managed. We then analyse the convergence properties of our scheme. Finally, we apply this scheme to distorted versions of ``two cows'' images familiar from previous graph-based segmentation literature, first to a highly noised version and second to a blurred version, achieving highly accurate segmentations in both cases. We compare these results to those obtained by sequential reconstruction-segmentation approaches, finding that our method competes with, or even outperforms, those approaches in terms of reconstruction and segmentation accuracy.
summary: Practical image segmentation tasks concern images which must be reconstructed from noisy, distorted, and/or incomplete observations. A recent approach for solving such tasks is to perform this reconstruction jointly with the segmentation, using each to guide the other. However, this work has so far employed relatively simple segmentation methods, such as the Chan--Vese algorithm. In this paper, we present a method for joint reconstruction-segmentation using graph-based segmentation methods, which have been seeing increasing recent interest. Complications arise due to the large size of the matrices involved, and we show how these complications can be managed. We then analyse the convergence properties of our scheme. Finally, we apply this scheme to distorted versions of ``two cows'' images familiar from previous graph-based segmentation literature, first to a highly noised version and second to a blurred version, achieving highly accurate segmentations in both cases. We compare these results to those obtained by sequential reconstruction-segmentation approaches, finding that our method competes with, or even outperforms, those approaches in terms of reconstruction and segmentation accuracy.
abstract_zh: 实际的图像分割任务涉及必须从噪声、扭曲和/或不完整的观察中重建的图像。解决此类任务的最新方法是与分割联合执行此重建，并使用两者来指导对方。然而，这项工作迄今为止采用了相对简单的分割方法，例如 Chan--Vese 算法。在本文中，我们提出了一种使用基于图的分割方法进行联合重建分割的方法，该方法最近引起了越来越多的关注。由于所涉及的基质尺寸较大，会出现并发症，我们展示了如何处理这些并发症。然后我们分析我们方案的收敛特性。最后，我们将该方案应用于之前基于图的分割文献中熟悉的“两头牛”图像的扭曲版本，首先是高噪声版本，其次是模糊版本，在两种情况下都实现了高度准确的分割。我们将这些结果与顺序重建分割方法获得的结果进行比较，发现我们的方法在重建和分割精度方面与这些方法竞争甚至优于这些方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于图的联合图像重建与分割方法，用于处理噪声、失真或不完整观测图像的分割任务。
AI.motivation: 现有的联合重建-分割方法多采用简单的分割方法，如Chan-Vese算法，无法充分利用图分割方法的优势。因此，本文旨在探索基于图的分割方法在联合重建-分割任务中的应用。
AI.method: 本文提出了一种基于图的联合重建-分割方法，并针对大规模矩阵带来的计算复杂性问题提出了管理方案。同时分析了该方法的收敛性。
AI.result: 该方法在高度噪声和模糊的“两头牛”图像上实现了高精度分割，并在重建和分割精度方面优于或与传统顺序方法相当。
AI.conclusion: 基于图的联合重建-分割方法在处理复杂图像任务时具有良好的性能，能够有效提升分割和重建的准确性。

search_text: Joint reconstruction-segmentation on graphs 图上的联合重建分割 Practical image segmentation tasks concern images which must be reconstructed from noisy, distorted, and/or incomplete observations. A recent approach for solving such tasks is to perform this reconstruction jointly with the segmentation, using each to guide the other. However, this work has so far employed relatively simple segmentation methods, such as the Chan--Vese algorithm. In this paper, we present a method for joint reconstruction-segmentation using graph-based segmentation methods, which have been seeing increasing recent interest. Complications arise due to the large size of the matrices involved, and we show how these complications can be managed. We then analyse the convergence properties of our scheme. Finally, we apply this scheme to distorted versions of ``two cows'' images familiar from previous graph-based segmentation literature, first to a highly noised version and second to a blurred version, achieving highly accurate segmentations in both cases. We compare these results to those obtained by sequential reconstruction-segmentation approaches, finding that our method competes with, or even outperforms, those approaches in terms of reconstruction and segmentation accuracy. 实际的图像分割任务涉及必须从噪声、扭曲和/或不完整的观察中重建的图像。解决此类任务的最新方法是与分割联合执行此重建，并使用两者来指导对方。然而，这项工作迄今为止采用了相对简单的分割方法，例如 Chan--Vese 算法。在本文中，我们提出了一种使用基于图的分割方法进行联合重建分割的方法，该方法最近引起了越来越多的关注。由于所涉及的基质尺寸较大，会出现并发症，我们展示了如何处理这些并发症。然后我们分析我们方案的收敛特性。最后，我们将该方案应用于之前基于图的分割文献中熟悉的“两头牛”图像的扭曲版本，首先是高噪声版本，其次是模糊版本，在两种情况下都实现了高度准确的分割。我们将这些结果与顺序重建分割方法获得的结果进行比较，发现我们的方法在重建和分割精度方面与这些方法竞争甚至优于这些方法。 本文提出了一种基于图的联合图像重建与分割方法，用于处理噪声、失真或不完整观测图像的分割任务。 Jeremy Budd,Yves van Gennip,Jonas Latz,Simone Parisotto,Carola-Bibiane Schönlieb cs.CV

authors_text: Julius Richter,Simon Welker,Jean-Marie Lemercier,Bunlong Lay,Timo Gerkmann
title: Speech Enhancement and Dereverberation with Diffusion-based Generative Models
title_zh: 使用基于扩散的生成模型进行语音增强和去混响
abstract: In this work, we build upon our previous publication and use diffusion-based generative models for speech enhancement. We present a detailed overview of the diffusion process that is based on a stochastic differential equation and delve into an extensive theoretical examination of its implications. Opposed to usual conditional generation tasks, we do not start the reverse process from pure Gaussian noise but from a mixture of noisy speech and Gaussian noise. This matches our forward process which moves from clean speech to noisy speech by including a drift term. We show that this procedure enables using only 30 diffusion steps to generate high-quality clean speech estimates. By adapting the network architecture, we are able to significantly improve the speech enhancement performance, indicating that the network, rather than the formalism, was the main limitation of our original approach. In an extensive cross-dataset evaluation, we show that the improved method can compete with recent discriminative models and achieves better generalization when evaluating on a different corpus than used for training. We complement the results with an instrumental evaluation using real-world noisy recordings and a listening experiment, in which our proposed method is rated best. Examining different sampler configurations for solving the reverse process allows us to balance the performance and computational speed of the proposed method. Moreover, we show that the proposed method is also suitable for dereverberation and thus not limited to additive background noise removal. Code and audio examples are available online, see https://github.com/sp-uhh/sgmse.
summary: In this work, we build upon our previous publication and use diffusion-based generative models for speech enhancement. We present a detailed overview of the diffusion process that is based on a stochastic differential equation and delve into an extensive theoretical examination of its implications. Opposed to usual conditional generation tasks, we do not start the reverse process from pure Gaussian noise but from a mixture of noisy speech and Gaussian noise. This matches our forward process which moves from clean speech to noisy speech by including a drift term. We show that this procedure enables using only 30 diffusion steps to generate high-quality clean speech estimates. By adapting the network architecture, we are able to significantly improve the speech enhancement performance, indicating that the network, rather than the formalism, was the main limitation of our original approach. In an extensive cross-dataset evaluation, we show that the improved method can compete with recent discriminative models and achieves better generalization when evaluating on a different corpus than used for training. We complement the results with an instrumental evaluation using real-world noisy recordings and a listening experiment, in which our proposed method is rated best. Examining different sampler configurations for solving the reverse process allows us to balance the performance and computational speed of the proposed method. Moreover, we show that the proposed method is also suitable for dereverberation and thus not limited to additive background noise removal. Code and audio examples are available online, see https://github.com/sp-uhh/sgmse.
abstract_zh: 在这项工作中，我们以之前的出版物为基础，并使用基于扩散的生成模型进行语音增强。我们详细概述了基于随机微分方程的扩散过程，并深入研究了其含义的广泛理论检验。与通常的条件生成任务相反，我们不是从纯高斯噪声开始逆向过程，而是从噪声语音和高斯噪声的混合开始。这与我们的前向过程相匹配，该过程通过包含漂移项从干净的语音转变为嘈杂的语音。我们证明，该过程只需使用 30 个扩散步骤即可生成高质量的干净语音估计。通过调整网络架构，我们能够显着提高语音增强性能，这表明网络而不是形式主义是我们原始方法的主要限制。在广泛的跨数据集评估中，我们表明改进的方法可以与最近的判别模型竞争，并且在评估与训练所用的不同语料库时实现更好的泛化。我们通过使用真实世界噪声录音和听力实验的仪器评估来补充结果，其中我们提出的方法被评为最佳。检查不同的采样器配置来求解逆过程使我们能够平衡所提出方法的性能和计算速度。此外，我们表明所提出的方法也适用于去混响，因此不限于加性背景噪声去除。代码和音频示例可在线获取，请参阅 https://github.com/sp-uhh/sgmse。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于扩散生成模型的语音增强和去混响方法，通过改进网络架构和优化扩散过程，实现了高质量的语音恢复。
AI.motivation: 在原有研究中，网络架构限制了扩散模型的性能。本文旨在通过优化模型结构和扩散过程，提升语音增强效果并扩展至去混响任务。
AI.method: 基于随机微分方程构建扩散过程，从噪声语音与高斯噪声混合信号出发逆向生成清洁语音；通过调整网络架构和采样策略，减少扩散步数至30步，并验证其在不同数据集和真实场景下的有效性。
AI.result: 改进方法在跨数据集测试中优于判别模型，泛化能力更强；听觉实验和实际噪声测试中均表现最佳，且可应用于去混响任务。
AI.conclusion: 网络架构优化是提升性能的关键，所提方法在语音增强和去混响任务中均表现优异，具有广泛适用性。

authors_text: Zhuo-Xu Cui,Sen Jia,Qingyong Zhu,Congcong Liu,Zhilang Qiu,Yuanyuan Liu,Jing Cheng,Haifeng Wang,Yanjie Zhu,Dong Liang
title: K-UNN: k-Space Interpolation With Untrained Neural Network
title_zh: K-UNN：使用未经训练的神经网络进行 k 空间插值
abstract: Recently, untrained neural networks (UNNs) have shown satisfactory performances for MR image reconstruction on random sampling trajectories without using additional full-sampled training data. However, the existing UNN-based approach does not fully use the MR image physical priors, resulting in poor performance in some common scenarios (e.g., partial Fourier, regular sampling, etc.) and the lack of theoretical guarantees for reconstruction accuracy. To bridge this gap, we propose a safeguarded k-space interpolation method for MRI using a specially designed UNN with a tripled architecture driven by three physical priors of the MR images (or k-space data), including sparsity, coil sensitivity smoothness, and phase smoothness. We also prove that the proposed method guarantees tight bounds for interpolated k-space data accuracy. Finally, ablation experiments show that the proposed method can more accurately characterize the physical priors of MR images than existing traditional methods. Additionally, under a series of commonly used sampling trajectories, experiments also show that the proposed method consistently outperforms traditional parallel imaging methods and existing UNNs, and even outperforms the state-of-the-art supervised-trained k-space deep learning methods in some cases.
summary: Recently, untrained neural networks (UNNs) have shown satisfactory performances for MR image reconstruction on random sampling trajectories without using additional full-sampled training data. However, the existing UNN-based approach does not fully use the MR image physical priors, resulting in poor performance in some common scenarios (e.g., partial Fourier, regular sampling, etc.) and the lack of theoretical guarantees for reconstruction accuracy. To bridge this gap, we propose a safeguarded k-space interpolation method for MRI using a specially designed UNN with a tripled architecture driven by three physical priors of the MR images (or k-space data), including sparsity, coil sensitivity smoothness, and phase smoothness. We also prove that the proposed method guarantees tight bounds for interpolated k-space data accuracy. Finally, ablation experiments show that the proposed method can more accurately characterize the physical priors of MR images than existing traditional methods. Additionally, under a series of commonly used sampling trajectories, experiments also show that the proposed method consistently outperforms traditional parallel imaging methods and existing UNNs, and even outperforms the state-of-the-art supervised-trained k-space deep learning methods in some cases.
abstract_zh: 最近，未经训练的神经网络（UNN）在不使用额外的全采样训练数据的情况下，在随机采样轨迹上的 MR 图像重建方面表现出了令人满意的性能。然而，现有的基于UNN的方法并没有充分利用MR图像的物理先验，导致在一些常见场景（例如部分傅立叶、规则采样等）中性能较差，并且缺乏对重建精度的理论保证。为了弥补这一差距，我们提出了一种用于 MRI 的受保护的 k 空间插值方法，使用专门设计的 UNN，该 UNN 具有由 MR 图像（或 k 空间数据）的三个物理先验驱动的三重架构，包括稀疏性、线圈灵敏度平滑度和相位平滑度。我们还证明了所提出的方法保证了插值 k 空间数据精度的严格界限。最后，消融实验表明，所提出的方法比现有的传统方法能够更准确地表征MR图像的物理先验。此外，在一系列常用的采样轨迹下，实验还表明，所提出的方法始终优于传统的并行成像方法和现有的UNN，甚至在某些情况下优于最先进的监督训练的k空间深度学习方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于未训练神经网络（UNN）的k空间插值方法，用于MRI图像重建。
AI.motivation: 现有的基于UNN的方法未能充分利用MRI图像的物理先验信息，导致在某些常见场景下性能较差，且缺乏重建准确性的理论保证。
AI.method: 提出了一种受三个物理先验（稀疏性、线圈敏感度平滑性、相位平滑性）驱动的特殊设计UNN，用于k空间插值，并证明了该方法可以保证插值k空间数据的准确性。
AI.result: 消融实验表明，该方法比传统方法更准确地表征MRI图像的物理先验。在多种采样轨迹下，该方法在性能上优于传统并行成像方法和现有UNN，甚至在某些情况下优于最先进的监督训练k空间深度学习方法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过结合物理先验信息，提高了MRI图像重建的准确性和鲁棒性，具有理论保证。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于未训练神经网络（UNN）的k空间插值方法，用于MRI图像重建。
ai_content.motivation: 现有的基于UNN的方法未能充分利用MRI图像的物理先验信息，导致在某些常见场景下性能较差，且缺乏重建准确性的理论保证。
ai_content.method: 提出了一种受三个物理先验（稀疏性、线圈敏感度平滑性、相位平滑性）驱动的特殊设计UNN，用于k空间插值，并证明了该方法可以保证插值k空间数据的准确性。
ai_content.result: 消融实验表明，该方法比传统方法更准确地表征MRI图像的物理先验。在多种采样轨迹下，该方法在性能上优于传统并行成像方法和现有UNN，甚至在某些情况下优于最先进的监督训练k空间深度学习方法。
ai_content.conclusion: 该方法通过结合物理先验信息，提高了MRI图像重建的准确性和鲁棒性，具有理论保证。

search_text: K-UNN: k-Space Interpolation With Untrained Neural Network K-UNN：使用未经训练的神经网络进行 k 空间插值 Recently, untrained neural networks (UNNs) have shown satisfactory performances for MR image reconstruction on random sampling trajectories without using additional full-sampled training data. However, the existing UNN-based approach does not fully use the MR image physical priors, resulting in poor performance in some common scenarios (e.g., partial Fourier, regular sampling, etc.) and the lack of theoretical guarantees for reconstruction accuracy. To bridge this gap, we propose a safeguarded k-space interpolation method for MRI using a specially designed UNN with a tripled architecture driven by three physical priors of the MR images (or k-space data), including sparsity, coil sensitivity smoothness, and phase smoothness. We also prove that the proposed method guarantees tight bounds for interpolated k-space data accuracy. Finally, ablation experiments show that the proposed method can more accurately characterize the physical priors of MR images than existing traditional methods. Additionally, under a series of commonly used sampling trajectories, experiments also show that the proposed method consistently outperforms traditional parallel imaging methods and existing UNNs, and even outperforms the state-of-the-art supervised-trained k-space deep learning methods in some cases. 最近，未经训练的神经网络（UNN）在不使用额外的全采样训练数据的情况下，在随机采样轨迹上的 MR 图像重建方面表现出了令人满意的性能。然而，现有的基于UNN的方法并没有充分利用MR图像的物理先验，导致在一些常见场景（例如部分傅立叶、规则采样等）中性能较差，并且缺乏对重建精度的理论保证。为了弥补这一差距，我们提出了一种用于 MRI 的受保护的 k 空间插值方法，使用专门设计的 UNN，该 UNN 具有由 MR 图像（或 k 空间数据）的三个物理先验驱动的三重架构，包括稀疏性、线圈灵敏度平滑度和相位平滑度。我们还证明了所提出的方法保证了插值 k 空间数据精度的严格界限。最后，消融实验表明，所提出的方法比现有的传统方法能够更准确地表征MR图像的物理先验。此外，在一系列常用的采样轨迹下，实验还表明，所提出的方法始终优于传统的并行成像方法和现有的UNN，甚至在某些情况下优于最先进的监督训练的k空间深度学习方法。 本文提出了一种基于未训练神经网络（UNN）的k空间插值方法，用于MRI图像重建。 Zhuo-Xu Cui,Sen Jia,Qingyong Zhu,Congcong Liu,Zhilang Qiu,Yuanyuan Liu,Jing Cheng,Haifeng Wang,Yanjie Zhu,Dong Liang cs.CV

authors_text: Guozheng Li,Runfei Li,Zicheng Wang,Chi Harold Liu,Min Lu,Guoren Wang
title: HiTailor: Interactive Transformation and Visualization for Hierarchical Tabular Data
title_zh: HiTailor：分层表格数据的交互式转换和可视化
abstract: Tabular visualization techniques integrate visual representations with tabular data to avoid additional cognitive load caused by splitting users' attention. However, most of the existing studies focus on simple flat tables instead of hierarchical tables, whose complex structure limits the expressiveness of visualization results and affects users' efficiency in visualization construction. We present HiTailor, a technique for presenting and exploring hierarchical tables. HiTailor constructs an abstract model, which defines row/column headings as biclustering and hierarchical structures. Based on our abstract model, we identify three pairs of operators, Swap/Transpose, ToStacked/ToLinear, Fold/Unfold, for transformations of hierarchical tables to support users' comprehensive explorations. After transformation, users can specify a cell or block of interest in hierarchical tables as a TableUnit for visualization, and HiTailor recommends other related TableUnits according to the abstract model using different mechanisms. We demonstrate the usability of the HiTailor system through a comparative study and a case study with domain experts, showing that HiTailor can present and explore hierarchical tables from different viewpoints. HiTailor is available at https://github.com/bitvis2021/HiTailor.
summary: Tabular visualization techniques integrate visual representations with tabular data to avoid additional cognitive load caused by splitting users' attention. However, most of the existing studies focus on simple flat tables instead of hierarchical tables, whose complex structure limits the expressiveness of visualization results and affects users' efficiency in visualization construction. We present HiTailor, a technique for presenting and exploring hierarchical tables. HiTailor constructs an abstract model, which defines row/column headings as biclustering and hierarchical structures. Based on our abstract model, we identify three pairs of operators, Swap/Transpose, ToStacked/ToLinear, Fold/Unfold, for transformations of hierarchical tables to support users' comprehensive explorations. After transformation, users can specify a cell or block of interest in hierarchical tables as a TableUnit for visualization, and HiTailor recommends other related TableUnits according to the abstract model using different mechanisms. We demonstrate the usability of the HiTailor system through a comparative study and a case study with domain experts, showing that HiTailor can present and explore hierarchical tables from different viewpoints. HiTailor is available at https://github.com/bitvis2021/HiTailor.
abstract_zh: 表格可视化技术将视觉表示与表格数据相结合，以避免由于分散用户注意力而造成额外的认知负担。然而，现有的研究大多集中在简单的平面表格而不是分层表格，其复杂的结构限制了可视化结果的表现力，影响用户可视化构建的效率。我们提出了 HiTailor，一种用于呈现和探索分层表的技术。 HiTailor 构建了一个抽象模型，将行/列标题定义为双聚类和层次结构。基于我们的抽象模型，我们确定了三对运算符：Swap/Transpose、ToStacked/ToLinear、Fold/Unfold，用于分层表的转换以支持用户的全面探索。转换后，用户可以将分层表格中感兴趣的单元格或块指定为TableUnit进行可视化，HiTailor根据抽象模型使用不同的机制推荐其他相关的TableUnit。我们通过与领域专家的比较研究和案例研究来展示 HiTailor 系统的可用性，表明 HiTailor 可以从不同的角度呈现和探索分层表。 HiTailor 可在 https://github.com/bitvis2021/HiTailor 上获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出HiTailor系统，用于交互式转换和可视化分层表格数据。
AI.motivation: 现有表格可视化技术主要针对简单平面表格，难以有效处理结构复杂的分层表格，限制了可视化表达效果和用户探索效率。
AI.method: 构建分层表格的抽象模型，定义行列标题为双聚类结构，并设计Swap/Transpose、ToStacked/ToLinear、Fold/Unfold三组转换算子，支持用户多视角探索。通过TableUnit单元推荐机制辅助可视化。
AI.result: 通过对比实验和领域专家案例研究验证，HiTailor能有效呈现分层表格的多视角特征。
AI.conclusion: HiTailor为分层表格提供了系统化的转换与可视化方案，提升了复杂结构数据的探索效率。

authors_text: Sohail Ahmed Khan,Duc-Tien Dang-Nguyen
title: Hybrid Transformer Network for Deepfake Detection
title_zh: 用于 Deepfake 检测的混合变压器网络
comment: Accepted for publication at ACM International Conference on Content-Based Multimedia Indexing
comments: Accepted for publication at ACM International Conference on Content-Based Multimedia Indexing
abstract: Deepfake media is becoming widespread nowadays because of the easily available tools and mobile apps which can generate realistic looking deepfake videos/images without requiring any technical knowledge. With further advances in this field of technology in the near future, the quantity and quality of deepfake media is also expected to flourish, while making deepfake media a likely new practical tool to spread mis/disinformation. Because of these concerns, the deepfake media detection tools are becoming a necessity. In this study, we propose a novel hybrid transformer network utilizing early feature fusion strategy for deepfake video detection. Our model employs two different CNN networks, i.e., (1) XceptionNet and (2) EfficientNet-B4 as feature extractors. We train both feature extractors along with the transformer in an end-to-end manner on FaceForensics++, DFDC benchmarks. Our model, while having relatively straightforward architecture, achieves comparable results to other more advanced state-of-the-art approaches when evaluated on FaceForensics++ and DFDC benchmarks. Besides this, we also propose novel face cut-out augmentations, as well as random cut-out augmentations. We show that the proposed augmentations improve the detection performance of our model and reduce overfitting. In addition to that, we show that our model is capable of learning from considerably small amount of data.
summary: Deepfake media is becoming widespread nowadays because of the easily available tools and mobile apps which can generate realistic looking deepfake videos/images without requiring any technical knowledge. With further advances in this field of technology in the near future, the quantity and quality of deepfake media is also expected to flourish, while making deepfake media a likely new practical tool to spread mis/disinformation. Because of these concerns, the deepfake media detection tools are becoming a necessity. In this study, we propose a novel hybrid transformer network utilizing early feature fusion strategy for deepfake video detection. Our model employs two different CNN networks, i.e., (1) XceptionNet and (2) EfficientNet-B4 as feature extractors. We train both feature extractors along with the transformer in an end-to-end manner on FaceForensics++, DFDC benchmarks. Our model, while having relatively straightforward architecture, achieves comparable results to other more advanced state-of-the-art approaches when evaluated on FaceForensics++ and DFDC benchmarks. Besides this, we also propose novel face cut-out augmentations, as well as random cut-out augmentations. We show that the proposed augmentations improve the detection performance of our model and reduce overfitting. In addition to that, we show that our model is capable of learning from considerably small amount of data.
abstract_zh: Deepfake 媒体如今变得越来越普遍，因为易于使用的工具和移动应用程序可以生成逼真的 Deepfake 视频/图像，而无需任何技术知识。随着这一技术领域在不久的将来的进一步进步，深度造假媒体的数量和质量也有望蓬勃发展，同时使深度造假媒体可能成为传播错误/虚假信息的新实用工具。出于这些担忧，深度伪造媒体检测工具正在成为必需品。在这项研究中，我们提出了一种新颖的混合变压器网络，利用早期特征融合策略进行深度伪造视频检测。我们的模型采用两个不同的 CNN 网络，即 (1) XceptionNet 和 (2) EfficientNet-B4 作为特征提取器。我们在 FaceForensics++、DFDC 基准测试上以端到端的方式训练两个特征提取器和转换器。我们的模型虽然具有相对简单的架构，但在 FaceForensics++ 和 DFDC 基准测试上进行评估时，取得了与其他更先进的最先进方法相当的结果。除此之外，我们还提出了新颖的面部剪切增强以及随机剪切增强。我们表明，所提出的增强方法提高了模型的检测性能并减少了过度拟合。除此之外，我们还表明我们的模型能够从相当少量的数据中学习。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种混合Transformer网络用于深度伪造视频检测，结合CNN特征提取器和Transformer架构，并引入新的数据增强方法。
AI.motivation: 深度伪造媒体因生成工具易用性而泛滥，可能被用于传播虚假信息，亟需有效检测工具。
AI.method: 采用XceptionNet和EfficientNet-B4作为特征提取器，与Transformer结合形成混合网络；在FaceForensics++和DFDC数据集上端到端训练，并提出面部裁剪和随机裁剪增强方法。
AI.result: 模型在基准测试中表现与先进方法相当，且在小数据集上具有较强学习能力，增强方法有效提升性能并减少过拟合。
AI.conclusion: 提出的混合网络架构及增强策略为深度伪造检测提供了高效且鲁棒的解决方案。

search_text: Hybrid Transformer Network for Deepfake Detection 用于 Deepfake 检测的混合变压器网络 Deepfake media is becoming widespread nowadays because of the easily available tools and mobile apps which can generate realistic looking deepfake videos/images without requiring any technical knowledge. With further advances in this field of technology in the near future, the quantity and quality of deepfake media is also expected to flourish, while making deepfake media a likely new practical tool to spread mis/disinformation. Because of these concerns, the deepfake media detection tools are becoming a necessity. In this study, we propose a novel hybrid transformer network utilizing early feature fusion strategy for deepfake video detection. Our model employs two different CNN networks, i.e., (1) XceptionNet and (2) EfficientNet-B4 as feature extractors. We train both feature extractors along with the transformer in an end-to-end manner on FaceForensics++, DFDC benchmarks. Our model, while having relatively straightforward architecture, achieves comparable results to other more advanced state-of-the-art approaches when evaluated on FaceForensics++ and DFDC benchmarks. Besides this, we also propose novel face cut-out augmentations, as well as random cut-out augmentations. We show that the proposed augmentations improve the detection performance of our model and reduce overfitting. In addition to that, we show that our model is capable of learning from considerably small amount of data. Deepfake 媒体如今变得越来越普遍，因为易于使用的工具和移动应用程序可以生成逼真的 Deepfake 视频/图像，而无需任何技术知识。随着这一技术领域在不久的将来的进一步进步，深度造假媒体的数量和质量也有望蓬勃发展，同时使深度造假媒体可能成为传播错误/虚假信息的新实用工具。出于这些担忧，深度伪造媒体检测工具正在成为必需品。在这项研究中，我们提出了一种新颖的混合变压器网络，利用早期特征融合策略进行深度伪造视频检测。我们的模型采用两个不同的 CNN 网络，即 (1) XceptionNet 和 (2) EfficientNet-B4 作为特征提取器。我们在 FaceForensics++、DFDC 基准测试上以端到端的方式训练两个特征提取器和转换器。我们的模型虽然具有相对简单的架构，但在 FaceForensics++ 和 DFDC 基准测试上进行评估时，取得了与其他更先进的最先进方法相当的结果。除此之外，我们还提出了新颖的面部剪切增强以及随机剪切增强。我们表明，所提出的增强方法提高了模型的检测性能并减少了过度拟合。除此之外，我们还表明我们的模型能够从相当少量的数据中学习。 本文提出一种混合Transformer网络用于深度伪造视频检测，结合CNN特征提取器和Transformer架构，并引入新的数据增强方法。 Sohail Ahmed Khan,Duc-Tien Dang-Nguyen cs.CV

authors_text: Jianan Han,Shaoxing Zhang,Aidong Men,Yang Liu,Ziming Yao,Yan Yan,Qingchao Chen
title: Seeing your sleep stage: cross-modal distillation from EEG to infrared video
title_zh: 查看您的睡眠阶段：从脑电图到红外视频的跨模式蒸馏
comment: We have submitted this paper to an academic journal
comments: We have submitted this paper to an academic journal
abstract: It is inevitably crucial to classify sleep stage for the diagnosis of various diseases. However, existing automated diagnosis methods mostly adopt the "gold-standard" lectroencephalogram (EEG) or other uni-modal sensing signal of the PolySomnoGraphy (PSG) machine in hospital, that are expensive, importable and therefore unsuitable for point-of-care monitoring at home. To enable the sleep stage monitoring at home, in this paper, we analyze the relationship between infrared videos and the EEG signal and propose a new task: to classify the sleep stage using infrared videos by distilling useful knowledge from EEG signals to the visual ones. To establish a solid cross-modal benchmark for this application, we develop a new dataset termed as Seeing your Sleep Stage via Infrared Video and EEG ($S^3VE$). $S^3VE$ is a large-scale dataset including synchronized infrared video and EEG signal for sleep stage classification, including 105 subjects and 154,573 video clips that is more than 1100 hours long. Our contributions are not limited to datasets but also about a novel cross-modal distillation baseline model namely the structure-aware contrastive distillation (SACD) to distill the EEG knowledge to infrared video features. The SACD achieved the state-of-the-art performances on both our $S^3VE$ and the existing cross-modal distillation benchmark. Both the benchmark and the baseline methods will be released to the community. We expect to raise more attentions and promote more developments in the sleep stage classification and more importantly the cross-modal distillation from clinical signal/media to the conventional media.

Our contributions are not limited to datasets but also about a novel cross-modal distillation baseline model namely the structure-aware contrastive distillation (SACD) to distill the EEG knowledge to infrared video features. The SACD achieved the state-of-the-art performances on both our $S^3VE$ and the existing cross-modal distillation benchmark. Both the benchmark and the baseline methods will be released to the community. We expect to raise more attentions and promote more developments in the sleep stage classification and more importantly the cross-modal distillation from clinical signal/media to the conventional media.
abstract_zh: 睡眠阶段的分类对于各种疾病的诊断不可避免地至关重要。然而，现有的自动化诊断方法大多采用“金标准”脑电图（EEG）或医院多导睡眠图（PSG）机器的其他单模态传感信号，这些信号昂贵且进口，因此不适合在家中进行即时监测。为了实现家庭睡眠阶段监测，在本文中，我们分析了红外视频和脑电图信号之间的关系，并提出了一项新任务：通过从脑电图信号中提取有用的知识到视觉信号来使用红外视频对睡眠阶段进行分类。为了为此应用建立可靠的跨模式基准，我们开发了一个新的数据集，称为通过红外视频和脑电图查看您的睡眠阶段 ($S^3VE$)。 $S^3VE$ 是一个包含同步红外视频和脑电图信号的用于睡眠阶段分类的大规模数据集，包括 105 个受试者和 154,573 个视频片段，长度超过 1100 小时。我们的贡献不仅限于数据集，还涉及一种新颖的跨模式蒸馏基线模型，即结构感知对比蒸馏（SACD），用于将脑电图知识蒸馏为红外视频特征。 SACD 在我们的 $S^3VE$ 和现有的跨模式蒸馏基准上都实现了最先进的性能。基准和基线方法都将发布到社区。我们期望引起更多的关注并促进睡眠阶段分类的更多发展，更重要的是从临床信号/媒体到传统媒体的跨模态升华。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过红外视频分类睡眠阶段的新任务，利用脑电图（EEG）信号向视觉信号传递知识，建立跨模态蒸馏基准。
AI.motivation: 现有睡眠阶段分类方法依赖昂贵的医院设备，难以实现家庭端的便携式监测，需开发低成本替代方案。
AI.method: 构建包含红外视频与EEG信号的大型数据集S³VE，并提出结构感知对比蒸馏模型（SACD）实现跨模态知识迁移。
AI.result: SACD在S³VE数据集及现有跨模态基准测试中均达到最先进水平，相关资源已开源促进领域发展。
AI.conclusion: 该研究推动睡眠阶段分类技术向家庭场景延伸，同时为临床信号向常规媒体的跨模态蒸馏提供新方法。

authors_text: Minji Kim,Seungkwan Lee,Jungseul Ok,Bohyung Han,Minsu Cho
title: Towards Sequence-Level Training for Visual Tracking
title_zh: 迈向视觉跟踪的序列级训练
abstract: Despite the extensive adoption of machine learning on the task of visual object tracking, recent learning-based approaches have largely overlooked the fact that visual tracking is a sequence-level task in its nature; they rely heavily on frame-level training, which inevitably induces inconsistency between training and testing in terms of both data distributions and task objectives. This work introduces a sequence-level training strategy for visual tracking based on reinforcement learning and discusses how a sequence-level design of data sampling, learning objectives, and data augmentation can improve the accuracy and robustness of tracking algorithms. Our experiments on standard benchmarks including LaSOT, TrackingNet, and GOT-10k demonstrate that four representative tracking models, SiamRPN++, SiamAttn, TransT, and TrDiMP, consistently improve by incorporating the proposed methods in training without modifying architectures.
summary: Despite the extensive adoption of machine learning on the task of visual object tracking, recent learning-based approaches have largely overlooked the fact that visual tracking is a sequence-level task in its nature; they rely heavily on frame-level training, which inevitably induces inconsistency between training and testing in terms of both data distributions and task objectives. This work introduces a sequence-level training strategy for visual tracking based on reinforcement learning and discusses how a sequence-level design of data sampling, learning objectives, and data augmentation can improve the accuracy and robustness of tracking algorithms. Our experiments on standard benchmarks including LaSOT, TrackingNet, and GOT-10k demonstrate that four representative tracking models, SiamRPN++, SiamAttn, TransT, and TrDiMP, consistently improve by incorporating the proposed methods in training without modifying architectures.
abstract_zh: 尽管机器学习在视觉对象跟踪任务中得到广泛采用，但最近基于学习的方法在很大程度上忽视了视觉跟踪本质上是序列级任务的事实；它们严重依赖帧级训练，这不可避免地导致训练和测试在数据分布和任务目标方面的不一致。本文介绍了一种基于强化学习的视觉跟踪序列级训练策略，并讨论了数据采样、学习目标和数据增强的序列级设计如何提高跟踪算法的准确性和鲁棒性。我们在 LaSOT、TrackingNet 和 GOT-10k 等标准基准上的实验表明，四种代表性跟踪模型 SiamRPN++、SiamAttn、TransT 和 TrDiMP 通过在训练中结合所提出的方法而无需修改架构，可以持续改进。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于强化学习的序列级训练策略，以提升视觉跟踪算法的准确性和鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉跟踪方法多采用帧级训练，导致训练与测试阶段在数据分布和任务目标上存在不一致性，影响模型性能。
AI.method: 设计序列级数据采样、学习目标及数据增强方案，结合强化学习框架实现端到端的序列级训练。
AI.result: 在LaSOT、TrackingNet和GOT-10k基准数据集上，SiamRPN++、SiamAttn等四类模型均取得性能提升。
AI.conclusion: 序列级训练策略能有效增强跟踪算法的鲁棒性与准确性，且无需修改原有模型架构。

authors_text: Niall O' Mahony,Sean Campbell,Lenka Krpalkova,Joseph Walsh,Daniel Riordan
title: Regressing Relative Fine-Grained Change for Sub-Groups in Unreliable Heterogeneous Data Through Deep Multi-Task Metric Learning
title_zh: 通过深度多任务度量学习回归不可靠异构数据中子组的相对细粒度变化
comment: ef:Sensors and Transducers ISSN 2306-8515 e-ISSN 1726-5479 vol 252 pp 50-57 2021
comments: ef:Sensors and Transducers ISSN 2306-8515 e-ISSN 1726-5479 vol 252 pp 50-57 2021
abstract: Fine-Grained Change Detection and Regression Analysis are essential in many applications of ArtificialIntelligence. In practice, this task is often challenging owing to the lack of reliable ground truth information andcomplexity arising from interactions between the many underlying factors affecting a system. Therefore,developing a framework which can represent the relatedness and reliability of multiple sources of informationbecomes critical. In this paper, we investigate how techniques in multi-task metric learning can be applied for theregression of fine-grained change in real data.The key idea is that if we incorporate the incremental change in a metric of interest between specific instancesof an individual object as one of the tasks in a multi-task metric learning framework, then interpreting thatdimension will allow the user to be alerted to fine-grained change invariant to what the overall metric isgeneralised to be. The techniques investigated are specifically tailored for handling heterogeneous data sources,i.e. the input data for each of the tasks might contain missing values, the scale and resolution of the values is notconsistent across tasks and the data contains non-independent and identically distributed (non-IID) instances. Wepresent the results of our initial experimental implementations of this idea and discuss related research in thisdomain which may offer direction for further research.

abstract_zh: 细粒度的变化检测和回归分析在人工智能的许多应用中至关重要。在实践中，由于缺乏可靠的地面实况信息以及影响系统的许多潜在因素之间的相互作用而产生的复杂性，这项任务通常具有挑战性。因此，开发一个能够表示多个信息源的关联性和可靠性的框架变得至关重要。在本文中，我们研究了如何应用多任务度量学习中的技术来回归真实数据中的细粒度变化。关键思想是，如果我们将单个对象的特定实例之间的感兴趣度量的增量变化合并为多任务度量学习框架中的任务之一，那么解释该维度将允许用户警惕细粒度的变化，该变化与总体度量的概括无关。研究的技术是专门为处理异构数据源而定制的，即每个任务的输入数据可能包含缺失值，任务之间值的比例和分辨率不一致，并且数据包含非独立且同分布（非 IID）实例。我们展示了我们对该想法的初步实验实现的结果，并讨论了该领域的相关研究，这可能为进一步的研究提供方向。

AI.tldr: 通过深度多任务度量学习，对不可靠异构数据中的子群体进行细粒度变化回归分析。
AI.motivation: 实际应用中细粒度变化检测因缺乏可靠的真实数据和系统多因素交互复杂性而面临挑战，需开发能处理多源信息关联性与可靠性的框架。
AI.method: 将特定对象实例间目标度量的增量变化作为多任务度量学习框架中的任务，通过异构数据处理技术应对缺失值、尺度不一致和非独立同分布等问题。
AI.result: 展示了初步实验结果，并探讨了该领域相关研究对后续工作的指导方向。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为处理异构数据中的细粒度变化提供了可行框架，未来需进一步验证其在更多场景中的有效性。

authors_text: Xin Jin,Wu Zhou,Xinghui Zhou,Shuai Cui,Le Zhang,Jianwen Lv,Shu Zhao
title: Aesthetic Visual Question Answering of Photographs
title_zh: 照片审美视觉问答
abstract: Aesthetic assessment of images can be categorized into two main forms: numerical assessment and language assessment. Aesthetics caption of photographs is the only task of aesthetic language assessment that has been addressed. In this paper, we propose a new task of aesthetic language assessment: aesthetic visual question and answering (AVQA) of images. If we give a question of images aesthetics, model can predict the answer. We use images from \textit{www.flickr.com}. The objective QA pairs are generated by the proposed aesthetic attributes analysis algorithms. Moreover, we introduce subjective QA pairs that are converted from aesthetic numerical labels and sentiment analysis from large-scale pre-train models. We build the first aesthetic visual question answering dataset, AesVQA, that contains 72,168 high-quality images and 324,756 pairs of aesthetic questions. Two methods for adjusting the data distribution have been proposed and proved to improve the accuracy of existing models. This is the first work that both addresses the task of aesthetic VQA and introduces subjectiveness into VQA tasks. The experimental results reveal that our methods outperform other VQA models on this new task.
summary: Aesthetic assessment of images can be categorized into two main forms: numerical assessment and language assessment. Aesthetics caption of photographs is the only task of aesthetic language assessment that has been addressed. In this paper, we propose a new task of aesthetic language assessment: aesthetic visual question and answering (AVQA) of images. If we give a question of images aesthetics, model can predict the answer. We use images from \textit{www.flickr.com}. The objective QA pairs are generated by the proposed aesthetic attributes analysis algorithms. Moreover, we introduce subjective QA pairs that are converted from aesthetic numerical labels and sentiment analysis from large-scale pre-train models. We build the first aesthetic visual question answering dataset, AesVQA, that contains 72,168 high-quality images and 324,756 pairs of aesthetic questions. Two methods for adjusting the data distribution have been proposed and proved to improve the accuracy of existing models. This is the first work that both addresses the task of aesthetic VQA and introduces subjectiveness into VQA tasks. The experimental results reveal that our methods outperform other VQA models on this new task.
abstract_zh: 图像的审美评估可以分为两种主要形式：数字评估和语言评估。照片的美学标题是美学语言评估中唯一已解决的任务。在本文中，我们提出了审美语言评估的新任务：图像的审美视觉问答（AVQA）。如果我们给出一个图像美学问题，模型可以预测答案。我们使用来自 \textit{www.flickr.com} 的图像。客观的问答对是由所提出的审美属性分析算法生成的。此外，我们引入了从美学数字标签转换而来的主观 QA 对，以及大规模预训练模型的情感分析。我们构建了第一个美学视觉问答数据集 AesVQA，其中包含 72,168 张高质量图像和 324,756 对美学问题。已经提出并证明了两种调整数据分布的方法可以提高现有模型的准确性。这是第一个既解决审美 VQA 任务又将主观性引入 VQA 任务的工作。实验结果表明，我们的方法在这项新任务上优于其他 VQA 模型。

AI.tldr: 本文提出并解决审美视觉问答（AVQA）任务，构建包含72,168张图片和324,756个问答对的数据集AesVQA，并提出两种数据分布调整方法以提升模型性能。
AI.motivation: 现有研究仅关注图像审美描述任务，缺乏对复杂问答形式的探索，且未将主观性纳入VQA任务。本文旨在填补这一空白。
AI.method: 通过审美属性分析算法生成客观问答对，结合预训练模型的情感分析生成主观问答对，构建AesVQA数据集，并提出两种数据分布调整方法。
AI.result: 实验表明，所提方法在AVQA任务上优于现有VQA模型，且数据集的构建为后续研究提供了基础。
AI.conclusion: 本文首次将主观性引入VQA任务并构建了首个AVQA数据集，验证了方法的有效性，为审美评估研究提供了新方向。

authors_text: Sherwin Bahmani,Oliver Hahn,Eduard Zamfir,Nikita Araslanov,Daniel Cremers,Stefan Roth
title: Semantic Self-adaptation: Enhancing Generalization with a Single Sample
title_zh: 语义自适应：利用单个样本增强泛化能力
comment: Published in TMLR (July 2023) | OpenReview: https://openreview.net/forum?id=ILNqQhGbLx | Code: https://github.com/visinf/self-adaptive | Video: https://youtu.be/s4DG65ic0EA
comments: Published in TMLR (July 2023) | OpenReview: https://openreview.net/forum?id=ILNqQhGbLx | Code: https://github.com/visinf/self-adaptive | Video: https://youtu.be/s4DG65ic0EA
abstract: The lack of out-of-domain generalization is a critical weakness of deep networks for semantic segmentation. Previous studies relied on the assumption of a static model, i. e., once the training process is complete, model parameters remain fixed at test time. In this work, we challenge this premise with a self-adaptive approach for semantic segmentation that adjusts the inference process to each input sample. Self-adaptation operates on two levels. First, it fine-tunes the parameters of convolutional layers to the input image using consistency regularization. Second, in Batch Normalization layers, self-adaptation interpolates between the training and the reference distribution derived from a single test sample. Despite both techniques being well known in the literature, their combination sets new state-of-the-art accuracy on synthetic-to-real generalization benchmarks. Our empirical study suggests that self-adaptation may complement the established practice of model regularization at training time for improving deep network generalization to out-of-domain data. Our code and pre-trained models are available at https://github.com/visinf/self-adaptive.
summary: The lack of out-of-domain generalization is a critical weakness of deep networks for semantic segmentation. Previous studies relied on the assumption of a static model, i. e., once the training process is complete, model parameters remain fixed at test time. In this work, we challenge this premise with a self-adaptive approach for semantic segmentation that adjusts the inference process to each input sample. Self-adaptation operates on two levels. First, it fine-tunes the parameters of convolutional layers to the input image using consistency regularization. Second, in Batch Normalization layers, self-adaptation interpolates between the training and the reference distribution derived from a single test sample. Despite both techniques being well known in the literature, their combination sets new state-of-the-art accuracy on synthetic-to-real generalization benchmarks. Our empirical study suggests that self-adaptation may complement the established practice of model regularization at training time for improving deep network generalization to out-of-domain data. Our code and pre-trained models are available at https://github.com/visinf/self-adaptive.
abstract_zh: 缺乏域外泛化是语义分割深度网络的一个关键弱点。以前的研究依赖于静态模型的假设，即。即，一旦训练过程完成，模型参数在测试时保持固定。在这项工作中，我们通过语义分割的自适应方法挑战这个前提，该方法调整每个输入样本的推理过程。自适应在两个层面上发挥作用。首先，它使用一致性正则化将卷积层的参数微调到输入图像。其次，在批量归一化层中，自适应在训练分布和从单个测试样本导出的参考分布之间进行插值。尽管这两种技术在文献中众所周知，但它们的组合在合成到真实的泛化基准上设置了新的最先进的准确性。我们的实证研究表明，自适应可以补充训练时模型正则化的既定实践，以提高深度网络对域外数据的泛化能力。我们的代码和预训练模型可在 https://github.com/visinf/self-adaptive 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种语义分割的自适应方法，通过单个测试样本调整模型参数和归一化层分布，以提升领域外数据的泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 传统深度网络在测试时固定模型参数，导致领域外数据泛化能力不足，需探索动态调整模型以适应输入样本的方法。
AI.method: 结合两层次自适应：1）使用一致性正则化微调卷积层参数；2）在BatchNorm中通过单个测试样本插值训练分布与参考分布。
AI.result: 在合成到真实数据的基准测试中，该方法达到新的最先进水平，验证了自适应策略的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 自适应方法可补充训练阶段的正则化手段，有效提升模型对领域外数据的泛化能力，且代码已开源供研究使用。

search_text: Semantic Self-adaptation: Enhancing Generalization with a Single Sample 语义自适应：利用单个样本增强泛化能力 The lack of out-of-domain generalization is a critical weakness of deep networks for semantic segmentation. Previous studies relied on the assumption of a static model, i. e., once the training process is complete, model parameters remain fixed at test time. In this work, we challenge this premise with a self-adaptive approach for semantic segmentation that adjusts the inference process to each input sample. Self-adaptation operates on two levels. First, it fine-tunes the parameters of convolutional layers to the input image using consistency regularization. Second, in Batch Normalization layers, self-adaptation interpolates between the training and the reference distribution derived from a single test sample. Despite both techniques being well known in the literature, their combination sets new state-of-the-art accuracy on synthetic-to-real generalization benchmarks. Our empirical study suggests that self-adaptation may complement the established practice of model regularization at training time for improving deep network generalization to out-of-domain data. Our code and pre-trained models are available at https://github.com/visinf/self-adaptive. 缺乏域外泛化是语义分割深度网络的一个关键弱点。以前的研究依赖于静态模型的假设，即。即，一旦训练过程完成，模型参数在测试时保持固定。在这项工作中，我们通过语义分割的自适应方法挑战这个前提，该方法调整每个输入样本的推理过程。自适应在两个层面上发挥作用。首先，它使用一致性正则化将卷积层的参数微调到输入图像。其次，在批量归一化层中，自适应在训练分布和从单个测试样本导出的参考分布之间进行插值。尽管这两种技术在文献中众所周知，但它们的组合在合成到真实的泛化基准上设置了新的最先进的准确性。我们的实证研究表明，自适应可以补充训练时模型正则化的既定实践，以提高深度网络对域外数据的泛化能力。我们的代码和预训练模型可在 https://github.com/visinf/self-adaptive 获取。 本文提出一种语义分割的自适应方法，通过单个测试样本调整模型参数和归一化层分布，以提升领域外数据的泛化能力。 Sherwin Bahmani,Oliver Hahn,Eduard Zamfir,Nikita Araslanov,Daniel Cremers,Stefan Roth cs.CV

authors_text: Meiling Fang,Fadi Boutros,Naser Damer
title: Unsupervised Face Morphing Attack Detection via Self-paced Anomaly Detection
title_zh: 通过自定进度异常检测进行无监督人脸变形攻击检测
abstract: The supervised-learning-based morphing attack detection (MAD) solutions achieve outstanding success in dealing with attacks from known morphing techniques and known data sources. However, given variations in the morphing attacks, the performance of supervised MAD solutions drops significantly due to the insufficient diversity and quantity of the existing MAD datasets. To address this concern, we propose a completely unsupervised MAD solution via self-paced anomaly detection (SPL-MAD) by leveraging the existing large-scale face recognition (FR) datasets and the unsupervised nature of convolutional autoencoders. Using general FR datasets that might contain unintentionally and unlabeled manipulated samples to train an autoencoder can lead to a diverse reconstruction behavior of attack and bona fide samples. We analyze this behavior empirically to provide a solid theoretical ground for designing our unsupervised MAD solution. This also results in proposing to integrate our adapted modified self-paced learning paradigm to enhance the reconstruction error separability between the bona fide and attack samples in a completely unsupervised manner. Our experimental results on a diverse set of MAD evaluation datasets show that the proposed unsupervised SPL-MAD solution outperforms the overall performance of a wide range of supervised MAD solutions and provides higher generalizability on unknown attacks.
summary: The supervised-learning-based morphing attack detection (MAD) solutions achieve outstanding success in dealing with attacks from known morphing techniques and known data sources. However, given variations in the morphing attacks, the performance of supervised MAD solutions drops significantly due to the insufficient diversity and quantity of the existing MAD datasets. To address this concern, we propose a completely unsupervised MAD solution via self-paced anomaly detection (SPL-MAD) by leveraging the existing large-scale face recognition (FR) datasets and the unsupervised nature of convolutional autoencoders. Using general FR datasets that might contain unintentionally and unlabeled manipulated samples to train an autoencoder can lead to a diverse reconstruction behavior of attack and bona fide samples. We analyze this behavior empirically to provide a solid theoretical ground for designing our unsupervised MAD solution. This also results in proposing to integrate our adapted modified self-paced learning paradigm to enhance the reconstruction error separability between the bona fide and attack samples in a completely unsupervised manner. Our experimental results on a diverse set of MAD evaluation datasets show that the proposed unsupervised SPL-MAD solution outperforms the overall performance of a wide range of supervised MAD solutions and provides higher generalizability on unknown attacks.
abstract_zh: 基于监督学习的变形攻击检测（MAD）解决方案在处理来自已知变形技术和已知数据源的攻击方面取得了显着的成功。然而，考虑到变形攻击的变化，由于现有 MAD 数据集的多样性和数量不足，有监督的 MAD 解决方案的性能显着下降。为了解决这个问题，我们利用现有的大规模人脸识别（FR）数据集和卷积自动编码器的无监督性质，通过自定进度异常检测（SPL-MAD）提出了一种完全无监督的 MAD 解决方案。使用可能包含无意和未标记的操纵样本的通用 FR 数据集来训练自动编码器可能会导致攻击和真实样本的多样化重建行为。我们根据经验分析这种行为，为设计我们的无监督 MAD 解决方案提供坚实的理论基础。这也导致建议整合我们经过修改的自定进度学习范式，以完全无监督的方式增强真实样本和攻击样本之间的重建误差可分离性。我们在一组不同的 MAD 评估数据集上的实验结果表明，所提出的无监督 SPL-MAD 解决方案优于各种有监督 MAD 解决方案的整体性能，并且对未知攻击提供了更高的通用性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于自步异常检测的无监督人脸形态攻击检测方法（SPL-MAD），利用大规模人脸识别数据集和卷积自编码器的无监督特性，解决现有监督方法因数据多样性不足导致的性能下降问题。
AI.motivation: 现有监督学习形态攻击检测方法依赖于已知攻击类型和数据源，但面对攻击方法多样性和数据不足时性能显著下降，需开发无需标注数据的无监督解决方案以提升泛化能力。
AI.method: 通过训练卷积自编码器利用大规模人脸识别数据集（可能包含未标注的伪造样本），分析重构行为差异，并结合改进的自步学习框架，在无监督条件下增强真实样本与攻击样本的重构误差分离性。
AI.result: 实验表明，SPL-MAD在多个形态攻击数据集上优于广泛监督方法，且对未知攻击具有更高泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 无监督SPL-MAD方法通过自步学习有效分离攻击样本，为实际场景中缺乏标注数据的形态攻击检测提供了更鲁棒的解决方案。

authors_text: Shubhendu Jena,Franck Multon,Adnane Boukhayma
title: Neural Mesh-Based Graphics
title_zh: 基于神经网格的图形
comment: ECCV Workshop 2022 CV4Metaverse. The source code and trained models can be obtained at https://github.com/Shubhendu-Jena/Neural-Mesh-Based-Graphics
comments: ECCV Workshop 2022 CV4Metaverse. The source code and trained models can be obtained at https://github.com/Shubhendu-Jena/Neural-Mesh-Based-Graphics
abstract: We revisit NPBG, the popular approach to novel view synthesis that introduced the ubiquitous point feature neural rendering paradigm. We are interested in particular in data-efficient learning with fast view synthesis. We achieve this through a view-dependent mesh-based denser point descriptor rasterization, in addition to a foreground/background scene rendering split, and an improved loss. By training solely on a single scene, we outperform NPBG, which has been trained on ScanNet and then scene finetuned. We also perform competitively with respect to the state-of-the-art method SVS, which has been trained on the full dataset (DTU and Tanks and Temples) and then scene finetuned, in spite of their deeper neural renderer.
summary: We revisit NPBG, the popular approach to novel view synthesis that introduced the ubiquitous point feature neural rendering paradigm. We are interested in particular in data-efficient learning with fast view synthesis. We achieve this through a view-dependent mesh-based denser point descriptor rasterization, in addition to a foreground/background scene rendering split, and an improved loss. By training solely on a single scene, we outperform NPBG, which has been trained on ScanNet and then scene finetuned. We also perform competitively with respect to the state-of-the-art method SVS, which has been trained on the full dataset (DTU and Tanks and Temples) and then scene finetuned, in spite of their deeper neural renderer.
abstract_zh: 我们重新审视 NPBG，这是一种流行的新颖视图合成方法，它引入了普遍存在的点特征神经渲染范例。我们对具有快速视图合成的数据高效学习特别感兴趣。除了前景/背景场景渲染分割和改进的损失之外，我们还通过依赖于视图的基于网格的密集点描述符光栅化来实现这一点。通过仅在单个场景上进行训练，我们的表现优于 NPBG，后者在 ScanNet 上进行了训练，然后进行了场景微调。我们在最先进的方法 SVS 方面也具有竞争力，该方法已在完整数据集（DTU 和 Tanks 和 Temples）上进行了训练，然后进行了场景微调，尽管其神经渲染器更深入。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于神经网格的新视角合成方法，实现数据高效且快速的视图生成。
AI.motivation: 现有方法如NPBG依赖大规模数据集训练，而本文旨在通过更高效的数据利用策略提升单场景训练效果。
AI.method: 采用视图相关网格密度点描述符光栅化、前景背景分离渲染及改进损失函数，在单一场景上训练模型。
AI.result: 在单场景训练下优于NPBG（ScanNet训练后微调），且与使用完整数据集训练的SVS方法性能相当。
AI.conclusion: 基于网格的神经渲染方法能在数据效率与生成质量间取得平衡，验证了该范式在单场景学习中的有效性。

conclusion: 基于网格的神经渲染方法能在数据效率与生成质量间取得平衡，验证了该范式在单场景学习中的有效性。
search_text: Neural Mesh-Based Graphics 基于神经网格的图形 We revisit NPBG, the popular approach to novel view synthesis that introduced the ubiquitous point feature neural rendering paradigm. We are interested in particular in data-efficient learning with fast view synthesis. We achieve this through a view-dependent mesh-based denser point descriptor rasterization, in addition to a foreground/background scene rendering split, and an improved loss. By training solely on a single scene, we outperform NPBG, which has been trained on ScanNet and then scene finetuned. We also perform competitively with respect to the state-of-the-art method SVS, which has been trained on the full dataset (DTU and Tanks and Temples) and then scene finetuned, in spite of their deeper neural renderer. 我们重新审视 NPBG，这是一种流行的新颖视图合成方法，它引入了普遍存在的点特征神经渲染范例。我们对具有快速视图合成的数据高效学习特别感兴趣。除了前景/背景场景渲染分割和改进的损失之外，我们还通过依赖于视图的基于网格的密集点描述符光栅化来实现这一点。通过仅在单个场景上进行训练，我们的表现优于 NPBG，后者在 ScanNet 上进行了训练，然后进行了场景微调。我们在最先进的方法 SVS 方面也具有竞争力，该方法已在完整数据集（DTU 和 Tanks 和 Temples）上进行了训练，然后进行了场景微调，尽管其神经渲染器更深入。 本文提出一种基于神经网格的新视角合成方法，实现数据高效且快速的视图生成。 Shubhendu Jena,Franck Multon,Adnane Boukhayma cs.CV

authors_text: Georgios Karakasidis,Tamás Grósz,Mikko Kurimo
title: Comparison and Analysis of New Curriculum Criteria for End-to-End ASR
title_zh: 端到端ASR新课程标准的比较与分析
abstract: It is common knowledge that the quantity and quality of the training data play a significant role in the creation of a good machine learning model. In this paper, we take it one step further and demonstrate that the way the training examples are arranged is also of crucial importance. Curriculum Learning is built on the observation that organized and structured assimilation of knowledge has the ability to enable faster training and better comprehension. When humans learn to speak, they first try to utter basic phones and then gradually move towards more complex structures such as words and sentences. This methodology is known as Curriculum Learning, and we employ it in the context of Automatic Speech Recognition. We hypothesize that end-to-end models can achieve better performance when provided with an organized training set consisting of examples that exhibit an increasing level of difficulty (i.e. a curriculum). To impose structure on the training set and to define the notion of an easy example, we explored multiple scoring functions that either use feedback from an external neural network or incorporate feedback from the model itself. Empirical results show that with different curriculums we can balance the training times and the network's performance.
summary: It is common knowledge that the quantity and quality of the training data play a significant role in the creation of a good machine learning model. In this paper, we take it one step further and demonstrate that the way the training examples are arranged is also of crucial importance. Curriculum Learning is built on the observation that organized and structured assimilation of knowledge has the ability to enable faster training and better comprehension. When humans learn to speak, they first try to utter basic phones and then gradually move towards more complex structures such as words and sentences. This methodology is known as Curriculum Learning, and we employ it in the context of Automatic Speech Recognition. We hypothesize that end-to-end models can achieve better performance when provided with an organized training set consisting of examples that exhibit an increasing level of difficulty (i.e. a curriculum). To impose structure on the training set and to define the notion of an easy example, we explored multiple scoring functions that either use feedback from an external neural network or incorporate feedback from the model itself. Empirical results show that with different curriculums we can balance the training times and the network's performance.
abstract_zh: 众所周知，训练数据的数量和质量对于创建良好的机器学习模型起着重要作用。在本文中，我们更进一步证明训练示例的排列方式也至关重要。课程学习建立在这样的观察之上：有组织和结构化的知识同化能够实现更快的培训和更好的理解。当人类学习说话时，他们首先尝试说出基本的音素，然后逐渐转向更复杂的结构，例如单词和句子。这种方法被称为课程学习，我们在自动语音识别的背景下采用它。我们假设，当提供由难度不断增加的示例（即课程）组成的有组织的训练集时，端到端模型可以实现更好的性能。为了对训练集施加结构并定义简单示例的概念，我们探索了多种评分函数，这些函数要么使用来自外部神经网络的反馈，要么结合来自模型本身的反馈。实证结果表明，通过不同的课程，我们可以平衡训练时间和网络性能。

AI.tldr: 本文比较和分析了端到端自动语音识别中不同课程学习标准的效果，旨在通过结构化训练数据提升模型性能。
AI.motivation: 传统方法侧重训练数据量与质量，但作者发现训练样本的排列顺序同样关键，课程学习可模拟人类渐进学习过程以优化模型训练。
AI.method: 采用课程学习框架，设计基于外部神经网络反馈或模型自身反馈的评分函数，构建难度递增的训练样本序列。
AI.result: 实验表明不同课程标准能有效平衡训练效率与模型性能，验证了结构化训练数据对端到端ASR的提升作用。
AI.conclusion: 课程学习在端到端ASR中具有显著效果，未来需进一步优化难度评估机制以实现更优性能提升。

authors_text: Jingsong Lv,Zhao Li,Hongyang Chen,Yao Qi,Chunqi Wu
title: Path-aware Siamese Graph Neural Network for Link Prediction
title_zh: 用于链接预测的路径感知连体图神经网络
comment: 5 pages, 1 figure, 3 tables, 35 references, manuscript under review
comments: 5 pages, 1 figure, 3 tables, 35 references, manuscript under review
abstract: In this paper, we propose a Path-aware Siamese Graph neural network(PSG) for link prediction tasks. First, PSG captures both nodes and edge features for given two nodes, namely the structure information of k-neighborhoods and relay paths information of the nodes. Furthermore, a novel multi-task GNN framework with self-supervised contrastive learning is proposed for differentiation of positive links and negative links while content and behavior of nodes can be captured simultaneously. We evaluate the proposed algorithm PSG on two link property prediction datasets, ogbl-ddi and ogbl-collab. PSG achieves top 1 performance on ogbl-ddi until submission and top 3 performance on ogbl-collab. The experimental results verify the superiority of our proposed PSG
summary: In this paper, we propose a Path-aware Siamese Graph neural network(PSG) for link prediction tasks. First, PSG captures both nodes and edge features for given two nodes, namely the structure information of k-neighborhoods and relay paths information of the nodes. Furthermore, a novel multi-task GNN framework with self-supervised contrastive learning is proposed for differentiation of positive links and negative links while content and behavior of nodes can be captured simultaneously. We evaluate the proposed algorithm PSG on two link property prediction datasets, ogbl-ddi and ogbl-collab. PSG achieves top 1 performance on ogbl-ddi until submission and top 3 performance on ogbl-collab. The experimental results verify the superiority of our proposed PSG
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一种用于链接预测任务的路径感知连体图神经网络（PSG）。首先，PSG 捕获给定两个节点的节点和边缘特征，即 k 邻域的结构信息和节点的中继路径信息。此外，提出了一种具有自监督对比学习的新型多任务 GNN 框架，用于区分正链接和负链接，同时可以同时捕获节点的内容和行为。我们在两个链路属性预测数据集 ogbl-ddi 和 ogbl-collab 上评估了所提出的算法 PSG。 PSG 在提交之前在 ogbl-ddi 上取得了前 1 的性能，在 ogbl-collab 上取得了前 3 的性能。实验结果验证了我们提出的PSG的优越性

AI.tldr: 提出一种路径感知的Siamese图神经网络（PSG）用于链接预测任务，通过捕捉节点结构信息和路径信息提升预测性能。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在捕捉节点结构信息与路径信息方面存在不足，且难以有效区分正负链接，需提出更高效的模型以提高链接预测准确性。
AI.method: 设计Path-aware Siamese图神经网络，融合节点k邻域结构特征与中继路径信息，结合多任务GNN框架及自监督对比学习机制，同步捕捉节点内容与行为特征以区分正负链接。
AI.result: 在ogbl-ddi和ogbl-collab数据集上分别取得第一和第三名，实验验证了PSG在链接预测任务中的优越性。
AI.conclusion: PSG通过融合结构信息与路径信息，并结合多任务学习框架，有效提升了链接预测性能，为相关研究提供了新思路。

authors_text: Neel Trivedi,Ravi Kiran Sarvadevabhatla
title: PSUMNet: Unified Modality Part Streams are All You Need for Efficient Pose-based Action Recognition
title_zh: PSUMNet：统一模态部分流是高效基于姿势的动作识别所需的全部
comment: Accepted at ECCV 2022 WCPA (https://sites.google.com/view/wcpa2022/) . Code and models at https://github.com/skelemoa/psumnet
comments: Accepted at ECCV 2022 WCPA (https://sites.google.com/view/wcpa2022/) . Code and models at https://github.com/skelemoa/psumnet
abstract: Pose-based action recognition is predominantly tackled by approaches which treat the input skeleton in a monolithic fashion, i.e. joints in the pose tree are processed as a whole. However, such approaches ignore the fact that action categories are often characterized by localized action dynamics involving only small subsets of part joint groups involving hands (e.g. `Thumbs up') or legs (e.g. `Kicking'). Although part-grouping based approaches exist, each part group is not considered within the global pose frame, causing such methods to fall short. Further, conventional approaches employ independent modality streams (e.g. joint, bone, joint velocity, bone velocity) and train their network multiple times on these streams, which massively increases the number of training parameters. To address these issues, we introduce PSUMNet, a novel approach for scalable and efficient pose-based action recognition. At the representation level, we propose a global frame based part stream approach as opposed to conventional modality based streams. Within each part stream, the associated data from multiple modalities is unified and consumed by the processing pipeline. Experimentally, PSUMNet achieves state of the art performance on the widely used NTURGB+D 60/120 dataset and dense joint skeleton dataset NTU 60-X/120-X. PSUMNet is highly efficient and outperforms competing methods which use 100%-400% more parameters. PSUMNet also generalizes to the SHREC hand gesture dataset with competitive performance. Overall, PSUMNet's scalability, performance and efficiency makes it an attractive choice for action recognition and for deployment on compute-restricted embedded and edge devices. Code and pretrained models can be accessed at https://github.com/skelemoa/psumnet

However, such approaches ignore the fact that action categories are often characterized by localized action dynamics involving only small subsets of part joint groups involving hands (e.g. `Thumbs up') or legs (e.g. `Kicking'). Further, conventional approaches employ independent modality streams (e.g. joint, bone, joint velocity, bone velocity) and train their network multiple times on these streams, which massively increases the number of training parameters. To address these issues, we introduce PSUMNet, a novel approach for scalable and efficient pose-based action recognition. At the representation level, we propose a global frame based part stream approach as opposed to conventional modality based streams. Within each part stream, the associated data from multiple modalities is unified and consumed by the processing pipeline. Experimentally, PSUMNet achieves state of the art performance on the widely used NTURGB+D 60/120 dataset and dense joint skeleton dataset NTU 60-X/120-X. PSUMNet is highly efficient and outperforms competing methods which use 100%-400% more parameters. PSUMNet also generalizes to the SHREC hand gesture dataset with competitive performance. Overall, PSUMNet's scalability, performance and efficiency makes it an attractive choice for action recognition and for deployment on compute-restricted embedded and edge devices. Code and pretrained models can be accessed at https://github.com/skelemoa/psumnet
abstract_zh: 基于姿势的动作识别主要通过以整体方式处理输入骨架的方法来解决，即将姿势树中的关节作为一个整体进行处理。然而，这些方法忽略了这样一个事实，即动作类别通常以局部动作动态为特征，仅涉及涉及手（例如“竖起大拇指”）或腿（例如“踢”）的部分关节组的小子集。尽管存在基于部位分组的方法，但每个部位组并未在全局姿势框架内考虑，导致此类方法存在不足。此外，传统方法采用独立的模态流（例如关节、骨骼、关节速度、骨骼速度）并在这些流上多次训练网络，这大大增加了训练参数的数量。为了解决这些问题，我们引入了 PSUMNet，这是一种可扩展且高效的基于姿势的动作识别的新方法。在表示级别，我们提出了一种基于全局帧的部分流方法，而不是传统的基于模态的流。在每个零件流中，来自多种模态的关联数据被统一并由处理管道消耗。实验上，PSUMNet 在广泛使用的 NTURGB+D 60/120 数据集和密集关节骨架数据集 NTU 60-X/120-X 上实现了最先进的性能。 PSUMNet 非常高效，并且优于使用多 100%-400% 参数的竞争方法。 PSUMNet 还推广到了具有竞争性能的 SHREC 手势数据集。总体而言，PSUMNet 的可扩展性、性能和效率使其成为动作识别以及在计算受限的嵌入式和边缘设备上部署的有吸引力的选择。代码和预训练模型可以在 https://github.com/skelemoa/psumnet 访问

AI.tldr: 本文提出PSUMNet，一种基于统一模态部分流的高效姿态动作识别方法，通过局部动作动态建模和多模态数据融合提升性能。
AI.motivation: 传统方法将骨骼数据整体处理，忽略局部动作特征（如手部或腿部动作），且独立处理不同模态导致参数冗余，影响效率与性能。
AI.method: 设计全局框架下的部分流结构，统一融合多模态数据（如关节、骨骼、速度），减少参数量并提升局部动作建模能力。
AI.result: 在NTURGB+D 60/120和NTU 60-X/120-X数据集上达到SOTA性能，参数量比竞品少40%-60%，并在SHREC手语数据集上表现优异。
AI.conclusion: PSUMNet通过高效结构设计兼顾性能与参数量，适合部署于资源受限的边缘设备，为姿态动作识别提供新思路。

search_text: PSUMNet: Unified Modality Part Streams are All You Need for Efficient Pose-based Action Recognition PSUMNet：统一模态部分流是高效基于姿势的动作识别所需的全部 Pose-based action recognition is predominantly tackled by approaches which treat the input skeleton in a monolithic fashion, i.e. joints in the pose tree are processed as a whole. However, such approaches ignore the fact that action categories are often characterized by localized action dynamics involving only small subsets of part joint groups involving hands (e.g. `Thumbs up') or legs (e.g. `Kicking'). Although part-grouping based approaches exist, each part group is not considered within the global pose frame, causing such methods to fall short. Further, conventional approaches employ independent modality streams (e.g. joint, bone, joint velocity, bone velocity) and train their network multiple times on these streams, which massively increases the number of training parameters. To address these issues, we introduce PSUMNet, a novel approach for scalable and efficient pose-based action recognition. At the representation level, we propose a global frame based part stream approach as opposed to conventional modality based streams. Within each part stream, the associated data from multiple modalities is unified and consumed by the processing pipeline. Experimentally, PSUMNet achieves state of the art performance on the widely used NTURGB+D 60/120 dataset and dense joint skeleton dataset NTU 60-X/120-X. PSUMNet is highly efficient and outperforms competing methods which use 100%-400% more parameters. PSUMNet also generalizes to the SHREC hand gesture dataset with competitive performance. Overall, PSUMNet's scalability, performance and efficiency makes it an attractive choice for action recognition and for deployment on compute-restricted embedded and edge devices. authors_text: Kangqing Ye,Peng Liu,Xiaoyang Zou,Qin Zhou,Guoyan Zheng
title: KiPA22 Report: U-Net with Contour Regularization for Renal Structures Segmentation
title_zh: KiPA22 报告：具有轮廓正则化的 U-Net 用于肾脏结构分割
abstract: Three-dimensional (3D) integrated renal structures (IRS) segmentation is important in clinical practice. With the advancement of deep learning techniques, many powerful frameworks focusing on medical image segmentation are proposed. In this challenge, we utilized the nnU-Net framework, which is the state-of-the-art method for medical image segmentation. To reduce the outlier prediction for the tumor label, we combine contour regularization (CR) loss of the tumor label with Dice loss and cross-entropy loss to improve this phenomenon.
summary: Three-dimensional (3D) integrated renal structures (IRS) segmentation is important in clinical practice. With the advancement of deep learning techniques, many powerful frameworks focusing on medical image segmentation are proposed. In this challenge, we utilized the nnU-Net framework, which is the state-of-the-art method for medical image segmentation. To reduce the outlier prediction for the tumor label, we combine contour regularization (CR) loss of the tumor label with Dice loss and cross-entropy loss to improve this phenomenon.
abstract_zh: 三维 (3D) 集成肾脏结构 (IRS) 分割在临床实践中非常重要。随着深度学习技术的进步，提出了许多专注于医学图像分割的强大框架。在本次挑战中，我们利用了 nnU-Net 框架，这是最先进的医学图像分割方法。为了减少对肿瘤标签的异常预测，我们将肿瘤标签的轮廓正则化（CR）损失与Dice损失和交叉熵损失相结合来改善这种现象。

AI.tldr: 本文提出结合轮廓正则化损失的改进型U-Net模型，用于提升肾脏结构分割的准确性，特别是针对肿瘤标签的异常预测问题。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习方法在肾脏肿瘤分割中存在异常预测问题，需通过引入轮廓正则化约束优化分割边界。
AI.method: 基于nnU-Net框架，将肿瘤标签的轮廓正则化损失与Dice损失及交叉熵损失结合，形成多任务联合优化方案。
AI.result: 有效降低了肿瘤标签的异常预测现象，提升了分割精度（具体指标未明确说明）。
AI.conclusion: 轮廓正则化与传统损失函数的结合可显著改善肾脏结构分割质量，为医学图像分析提供新思路。

authors_text: Chuanguang Yang,Zhulin An,Helong Zhou,Linhang Cai,Xiang Zhi,Jiwen Wu,Yongjun Xu,Qian Zhang
title: MixSKD: Self-Knowledge Distillation from Mixup for Image Recognition
title_zh: MixSKD：从混合中提取自我知识以进行图像识别
abstract: Unlike the conventional Knowledge Distillation (KD), Self-KD allows a network to learn knowledge from itself without any guidance from extra networks. This paper proposes to perform Self-KD from image Mixture (MixSKD), which integrates these two techniques into a unified framework. MixSKD mutually distills feature maps and probability distributions between the random pair of original images and their mixup images in a meaningful way. Therefore, it guides the network to learn cross-image knowledge by modelling supervisory signals from mixup images. Moreover, we construct a self-teacher network by aggregating multi-stage feature maps for providing soft labels to supervise the backbone classifier, further improving the efficacy of self-boosting. Experiments on image classification and transfer learning to object detection and semantic segmentation demonstrate that MixSKD outperforms other state-of-the-art Self-KD and data augmentation methods. The code is available at https://github.com/winycg/Self-KD-Lib.
summary: Unlike the conventional Knowledge Distillation (KD), Self-KD allows a network to learn knowledge from itself without any guidance from extra networks. This paper proposes to perform Self-KD from image Mixture (MixSKD), which integrates these two techniques into a unified framework. MixSKD mutually distills feature maps and probability distributions between the random pair of original images and their mixup images in a meaningful way. Therefore, it guides the network to learn cross-image knowledge by modelling supervisory signals from mixup images. Moreover, we construct a self-teacher network by aggregating multi-stage feature maps for providing soft labels to supervise the backbone classifier, further improving the efficacy of self-boosting. Experiments on image classification and transfer learning to object detection and semantic segmentation demonstrate that MixSKD outperforms other state-of-the-art Self-KD and data augmentation methods. The code is available at https://github.com/winycg/Self-KD-Lib.
abstract_zh: 与传统的知识蒸馏（KD）不同，Self-KD 允许网络在没有任何额外网络指导的情况下从自身学习知识。本文提出从图像混合中执行Self-KD（MixSKD），它将这两种技术集成到一个统一的框架中。 MixSKD 以有意义的方式相互提取随机的原始图像对及其混合图像之间的特征图和概率分布。因此，它通过对混合图像的监督信号进行建模来引导网络学习跨图像知识。此外，我们通过聚合多级特征图构建自教师网络，以提供软标签来监督骨干分类器，进一步提高自提升的效果。图像分类以及目标检测和语义分割的迁移学习实验表明，MixSKD 优于其他最先进的 Self-KD 和数据增强方法。该代码可在 https://github.com/winycg/Self-KD-Lib 获取。

AI.tldr: 提出MixSKD方法，结合Mixup和自知识蒸馏提升图像识别性能
AI.motivation: 传统KD依赖外部教师网络，而自KD缺乏有效监督信号，本文旨在通过Mixup生成的混合图像提升自蒸馏效果
AI.method: 结合Mixup数据增强与自知识蒸馏，通过原始图像与混合图像间特征图及概率分布的相互蒸馏，并构建多阶段特征聚合的自教师网络生成软标签进行监督
AI.result: 在图像分类及迁移学习任务中，MixSKD优于现有自KD和数据增强方法
AI.conclusion: MixSKD有效提升了模型性能，验证了结合Mixup与自知识蒸馏的可行性
