MixSKD mutually distills feature maps and probability distributions between the random pair of original images and their mixup images in a meaningful way. Therefore, it guides the network to learn cross-image knowledge by modelling supervisory signals from mixup images. Moreover, we construct a self-teacher network by aggregating multi-stage feature maps for providing soft labels to supervise the backbone classifier, further improving the efficacy of self-boosting. Experiments on image classification and transfer learning to object detection and semantic segmentation demonstrate that MixSKD outperforms other state-of-the-art Self-KD and data augmentation methods. The code is available at https://github.com/winycg/Self-KD-Lib. 与传统的知识蒸馏（KD）不同，Self-KD 允许网络在没有任何额外网络指导的情况下从自身学习知识。本文提出从图像混合中执行Self-KD（MixSKD），它将这两种技术集成到一个统一的框架中。 MixSKD 以有意义的方式相互提取随机的原始图像对及其混合图像之间的特征图和概率分布。因此，它通过对混合图像的监督信号进行建模来引导网络学习跨图像知识。此外，我们通过聚合多级特征图构建自教师网络，以提供软标签来监督骨干分类器，进一步提高自提升的效果。图像分类以及目标检测和语义分割的迁移学习实验表明，MixSKD 优于其他最先进的 Self-KD 和数据增强方法。该代码可在 https://github.com/winycg/Self-KD-Lib 获取。 提出MixSKD方法，结合Mixup和自知识蒸馏提升图像识别性能 Chuanguang Yang,Zhulin An,Helong Zhou,Linhang Cai,Xiang Zhi,Jiwen Wu,Yongjun Xu,Qian Zhang cs.CV

authors_text: Edwin J. Beggs,John V. Tucker
title: The dynamics of belief: continuously monitoring and visualising complex systems
title_zh: 信念的动态：持续监控和可视化复杂系统
abstract: The rise of AI in human contexts places new demands on automated systems to be transparent and explainable. We examine some anthropomorphic ideas and principles relevant to such accountablity in order to develop a theoretical framework for thinking about digital systems in complex human contexts and the problem of explaining their behaviour. Structurally, systems are made of modular and hierachical components, which we abstract in a new system model using notions of modes and mode transitions. A mode is an independent component of the system with its own objectives, monitoring data, and algorithms. The behaviour of a mode, including its transitions to other modes, is determined by functions that interpret each mode's monitoring data in the light of its objectives and algorithms. We show how these belief functions can help explain system behaviour by visualising their evaluation as trajectories in higher-dimensional geometric spaces. These ideas are formalised mathematically by abstract and concrete simplicial complexes. We offer three techniques: a framework for design heuristics, a general system theory based on modes, and a geometric visualisation, and apply them in three types of human-centred systems.
summary: The rise of AI in human contexts places new demands on automated systems to be transparent and explainable. We examine some anthropomorphic ideas and principles relevant to such accountablity in order to develop a theoretical framework for thinking about digital systems in complex human contexts and the problem of explaining their behaviour. Structurally, systems are made of modular and hierachical components, which we abstract in a new system model using notions of modes and mode transitions. A mode is an independent component of the system with its own objectives, monitoring data, and algorithms. The behaviour of a mode, including its transitions to other modes, is determined by functions that interpret each mode's monitoring data in the light of its objectives and algorithms. We show how these belief functions can help explain system behaviour by visualising their evaluation as trajectories in higher-dimensional geometric spaces. These ideas are formalised mathematically by abstract and concrete simplicial complexes. We offer three techniques: a framework for design heuristics, a general system theory based on modes, and a geometric visualisation, and apply them in three types of human-centred systems.
abstract_zh: 人工智能在人类环境中的兴起对自动化系统的透明性和可解释性提出了新的要求。我们研究了与这种责任相关的一些拟人化思想和原则，以便开发一个理论框架来思考复杂人类环境中的数字系统以及解释其行为的问题。在结构上，系统由模块化和分层组件组成，我们使用模式和模式转换的概念将其抽象为新的系统模型。模式是系统的一个独立组件，有自己的目标、监控数据和算法。模式的行为（包括其到其他模式的转换）由根据其目标和算法解释每个模式的监控数据的函数确定。我们展示了这些信念函数如何通过将其评估可视化为高维几何空间中的轨迹来帮助解释系统行为。这些想法通过抽象和具体的单纯复形在数学上形式化。我们提供三种技术：设计启发式框架、基于模式的一般系统理论和几何可视化，并将它们应用于三种类型的以人为中心的系统中。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于模式和几何可视化的理论框架，用于解释复杂系统的行为，特别是在人工智能与人类交互的背景下。
AI.motivation: 随着人工智能在人类环境中的广泛应用，对自动化系统的透明性和可解释性提出了更高要求，需要建立理论框架以增强系统问责性。
AI.method: 通过构建包含模式及其转换的系统模型，结合信念函数与高维几何空间轨迹可视化，并利用单纯复形进行数学形式化，提出设计启发式框架、模式系统理论及几何可视化三种技术。
AI.result: 将上述方法应用于三种人机交互系统，验证了其在解释系统行为、可视化动态过程及提升系统透明性方面的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为复杂系统的可解释性设计提供了理论支持和可视化工具，有助于推动人工智能在人类中心场景中的负责任应用。

authors_text: Yun-Ya Huang,Chih-Ya Shen
title: Learning Computation Bounds for Branch-and-Bound Algorithms to k-plex Extraction
title_zh: 学习分支定界算法到 k-plex 提取的计算范围
abstract: k-plex is a representative definition of communities in networks. While the cliques is too stiff to applicate to real cases, the k-plex relaxes the notion of the clique, allowing each node to miss up to k connections. Although k-plexes are more flexible than cliques, finding them is more challenging as their number is greater. In this paper, we aim to detect the k-plex under the size and time constraints, leveraging the new vision of automated learning bounding strategy. We introduce the constraint learning concept to learn the bound strategy from the branch and bound process and develop it into a Mixed Integer Programming framework. While most of the work is dedicated on learn the branch strategy in branch and bound-based algorithms, we focus on the learn to bound strategy which needs to handle the problem that learned strategy might not examine the feasible solution. We adopted the MILP framework and design a set of variables relative to the k-plex property as our constraint space to learn the strategy. The learn to bound strategy learning the original strategy function also reduces the computation load of the bound process to accelerate the branch and bound algorithm. Note that the learn to bound concept can apply to any branch and bound based algorithm with the appropriate framework. We conduct the experiment on different networks, the results show that our learn to branch and bound method does accelerate the original branch and bound method and outperforms other baselines, while also being able to generalize on different graph properties.
summary: k-plex is a representative definition of communities in networks. While the cliques is too stiff to applicate to real cases, the k-plex relaxes the notion of the clique, allowing each node to miss up to k connections. Although k-plexes are more flexible than cliques, finding them is more challenging as their number is greater. In this paper, we aim to detect the k-plex under the size and time constraints, leveraging the new vision of automated learning bounding strategy. We introduce the constraint learning concept to learn the bound strategy from the branch and bound process and develop it into a Mixed Integer Programming framework. While most of the work is dedicated on learn the branch strategy in branch and bound-based algorithms, we focus on the learn to bound strategy which needs to handle the problem that learned strategy might not examine the feasible solution. We adopted the MILP framework and design a set of variables relative to the k-plex property as our constraint space to learn the strategy. The learn to bound strategy learning the original strategy function also reduces the computation load of the bound process to accelerate the branch and bound algorithm. Note that the learn to bound concept can apply to any branch and bound based algorithm with the appropriate framework. We conduct the experiment on different networks, the results show that our learn to branch and bound method does accelerate the original branch and bound method and outperforms other baselines, while also being able to generalize on different graph properties.
abstract_zh: k-plex 是网络中社区的代表性定义。虽然派系太僵化而无法应用于实际情况，但 k-plex 放宽了派系的概念，允许每个节点最多错过 k 个连接。尽管 k-plex 比派系更灵活，但找到它们更具挑战性，因为它们的数量更多。在本文中，我们的目标是利用自动学习边界策略的新愿景，在大小和时间限制下检测 k-plex。我们引入约束学习概念，从分支定界过程中学习定界策略，并将其开发为混合整数编程框架。虽然大部分工作致力于学习基于分支定界的算法中的分支策略，但我们重点关注学习定界策略，该策略需要处理学习策略可能无法检查可行解决方案的问题。我们采用 MILP 框架并设计一组与 k-plex 属性相关的变量作为我们的约束空间来学习策略。学习绑定策略学习原始策略函数还减少了绑定过程的计算负载以加速分支定界算法。请注意，学习绑定概念可以应用于具有适当框架的任何基于分支定界的算法。我们在不同的网络上进行了实验，结果表明我们的学习分支定界方法确实加速了原始分支定界方法并优于其他基线，同时还能够泛化不同的图属性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种通过学习计算界限策略来加速分支定界算法提取k-plex社区的方法。
AI.motivation: k-plex作为比clique更灵活的社区定义，在实际网络中数量更多且更难提取，传统分支定界算法效率不足。
AI.method: 引入约束学习概念，结合混合整数规划框架，设计与k-plex属性相关的变量空间学习界限策略以降低计算负载。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法加速了原有算法，优于其他基线，并能在不同图结构上泛化。
AI.conclusion: 学习界限策略有效提升分支定界算法效率，且框架可扩展至其他同类算法。

authors_text: Jingbo Zhang,Xiaoyu Li,Ziyu Wan,Can Wang,Jing Liao
title: FDNeRF: Few-shot Dynamic Neural Radiance Fields for Face Reconstruction and Expression Editing
title_zh: FDNeRF：用于面部重建和表情编辑的少量动态神经辐射场
comment: Accepted at SIGGRAPH Asia 2022. Project page: https://fdnerf.github.io
comments: Accepted at SIGGRAPH Asia 2022. Project page: https://fdnerf.github.io
abstract: We propose a Few-shot Dynamic Neural Radiance Field (FDNeRF), the first NeRF-based method capable of reconstruction and expression editing of 3D faces based on a small number of dynamic images. Unlike existing dynamic NeRFs that require dense images as input and can only be modeled for a single identity, our method enables face reconstruction across different persons with few-shot inputs. Compared to state-of-the-art few-shot NeRFs designed for modeling static scenes, the proposed FDNeRF accepts view-inconsistent dynamic inputs and supports arbitrary facial expression editing, i.e., producing faces with novel expressions beyond the input ones. To handle the inconsistencies between dynamic inputs, we introduce a well-designed conditional feature warping (CFW) module to perform expression conditioned warping in 2D feature space, which is also identity adaptive and 3D constrained. As a result, features of different expressions are transformed into the target ones. We then construct a radiance field based on these view-consistent features and use volumetric rendering to synthesize novel views of the modeled faces. Extensive experiments with quantitative and qualitative evaluation demonstrate that our method outperforms existing dynamic and few-shot NeRFs on both 3D face reconstruction and expression editing tasks. Code is available at https://github.com/FDNeRF/FDNeRF.
summary: We propose a Few-shot Dynamic Neural Radiance Field (FDNeRF), the first NeRF-based method capable of reconstruction and expression editing of 3D faces based on a small number of dynamic images. Unlike existing dynamic NeRFs that require dense images as input and can only be modeled for a single identity, our method enables face reconstruction across different persons with few-shot inputs. Compared to state-of-the-art few-shot NeRFs designed for modeling static scenes, the proposed FDNeRF accepts view-inconsistent dynamic inputs and supports arbitrary facial expression editing, i.e., producing faces with novel expressions beyond the input ones. To handle the inconsistencies between dynamic inputs, we introduce a well-designed conditional feature warping (CFW) module to perform expression conditioned warping in 2D feature space, which is also identity adaptive and 3D constrained. As a result, features of different expressions are transformed into the target ones. We then construct a radiance field based on these view-consistent features and use volumetric rendering to synthesize novel views of the modeled faces. Extensive experiments with quantitative and qualitative evaluation demonstrate that our method outperforms existing dynamic and few-shot NeRFs on both 3D face reconstruction and expression editing tasks. Code is available at https://github.com/FDNeRF/FDNeRF.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了少样本动态神经辐射场（FDNeRF），这是第一个基于 NeRF 的方法，能够基于少量动态图像对 3D 人脸进行重建和表情编辑。现有的动态 NeRF 需要密集的图像作为输入，并且只能针对单个身份进行建模，而我们的方法与此不同，我们的方法可以通过少量的输入来实现不同人的面部重建。与为静态场景建模而设计的最先进的少样本 NeRF 相比，所提出的 FDNeRF 接受视图不一致的动态输入，并支持任意面部表情编辑，即生成具有超出输入表情的新颖表情的面部。为了处理动态输入之间的不一致，我们引入了一个精心设计的条件特征扭曲（CFW）模块来在 2D 特征空间中执行表达式条件扭曲，该模块也是身份自适应和 3D 约束的。结果，不同表达的特征被转换为目标特征。然后，我们基于这些视图一致的特征构建一个辐射场，并使用体积渲染来合成建模面孔的新视图。大量的定量和定性评估实验表明，我们的方法在 3D 人脸重建和表情编辑任务上都优于现有的动态和少样本 NeRF。代码可在 https://github.com/FDNeRF/FDNeRF 获取。

AI.motivation: 现有动态NeRF需密集图像且仅支持单一身份，而静态场景的少样本NeRF无法处理动态输入或表情编辑，需开发兼顾少样本、动态输入与表情编辑的3D人脸建模方法。
AI.method: 设计条件特征扭曲模块（CFW），在2D特征空间进行表情条件化扭曲，结合身份自适应与3D约束，生成视图一致特征后通过体渲染合成新视角。
AI.result: 在3D人脸重建与表情编辑任务中优于现有动态与少样本NeRF方法，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: FDNeRF有效解决了少样本动态人脸建模与表情编辑难题，为相关应用提供新思路。

search_text: FDNeRF: Few-shot Dynamic Neural Radiance Fields for Face Reconstruction and Expression Editing FDNeRF：用于面部重建和表情编辑的少量动态神经辐射场 We propose a Few-shot Dynamic Neural Radiance Field (FDNeRF), the first NeRF-based method capable of reconstruction and expression editing of 3D faces based on a small number of dynamic images. Unlike existing dynamic NeRFs that require dense images as input and can only be modeled for a single identity, our method enables face reconstruction across different persons with few-shot inputs. Compared to state-of-the-art few-shot NeRFs designed for modeling static scenes, the proposed FDNeRF accepts view-inconsistent dynamic inputs and supports arbitrary facial expression editing, i.e., producing faces with novel expressions beyond the input ones. To handle the inconsistencies between dynamic inputs, we introduce a well-designed conditional feature warping (CFW) module to perform expression conditioned warping in 2D feature space, which is also identity adaptive and 3D constrained. As a result, features of different expressions are transformed into the target ones. We then construct a radiance field based on these view-consistent features and use volumetric rendering to synthesize novel views of the modeled faces. Extensive experiments with quantitative and qualitative evaluation demonstrate that our method outperforms existing dynamic and few-shot NeRFs on both 3D face reconstruction and expression editing tasks. Code is available at https://github.com/FDNeRF/FDNeRF. 我们提出了少样本动态神经辐射场（FDNeRF），这是第一个基于 NeRF 的方法，能够基于少量动态图像对 3D 人脸进行重建和表情编辑。现有的动态 NeRF 需要密集的图像作为输入，并且只能针对单个身份进行建模，而我们的方法与此不同，我们的方法可以通过少量的输入来实现不同人的面部重建。与为静态场景建模而设计的最先进的少样本 NeRF 相比，所提出的 FDNeRF 接受视图不一致的动态输入，并支持任意面部表情编辑，即生成具有超出输入表情的新颖表情的面部。为了处理动态输入之间的不一致，我们引入了一个精心设计的条件特征扭曲（CFW）模块来在 2D 特征空间中执行表达式条件扭曲，该模块也是身份自适应和 3D 约束的。结果，不同表达的特征被转换为目标特征。然后，我们基于这些视图一致的特征构建一个辐射场，并使用体积渲染来合成建模面孔的新视图。大量的定量和定性评估实验表明，我们的方法在 3D 人脸重建和表情编辑任务上都优于现有的动态和少样本 NeRF。代码可在 https://github.com/FDNeRF/FDNeRF 获取。 本文提出FDNeRF方法，通过少量动态图像实现3D人脸重建与表情编辑。 Jingbo Zhang,Xiaoyu Li,Ziyu Wan,Can Wang,Jing Liao cs.CV

authors_text: Trung Pham,Chaoning Zhang,Axi Niu,Kang Zhang,Chang D. Yoo
title: On the Pros and Cons of Momentum Encoder in Self-Supervised Visual Representation Learning
title_zh: 论动量编码器在自监督视觉表示学习中的优缺点
abstract: Exponential Moving Average (EMA or momentum) is widely used in modern self-supervised learning (SSL) approaches, such as MoCo, for enhancing performance. We demonstrate that such momentum can also be plugged into momentum-free SSL frameworks, such as SimCLR, for a performance boost. Despite its wide use as a fundamental component in modern SSL frameworks, the benefit caused by momentum is not well understood. We find that its success can be at least partly attributed to the stability effect. In the first attempt, we analyze how EMA affects each part of the encoder and reveal that the portion near the encoder's input plays an insignificant role while the latter parts have much more influence. By monitoring the gradient of the overall loss with respect to the output of each block in the encoder, we observe that the final layers tend to fluctuate much more than other layers during backpropagation, i.e. less stability. Interestingly, we show that using EMA to the final part of the SSL encoder, i.e. projector, instead of the whole deep network encoder can give comparable or preferable performance. Our proposed projector-only momentum helps maintain the benefit of EMA but avoids the double forward computation.
summary: Exponential Moving Average (EMA or momentum) is widely used in modern self-supervised learning (SSL) approaches, such as MoCo, for enhancing performance. We demonstrate that such momentum can also be plugged into momentum-free SSL frameworks, such as SimCLR, for a performance boost. Despite its wide use as a fundamental component in modern SSL frameworks, the benefit caused by momentum is not well understood. We find that its success can be at least partly attributed to the stability effect. In the first attempt, we analyze how EMA affects each part of the encoder and reveal that the portion near the encoder's input plays an insignificant role while the latter parts have much more influence. By monitoring the gradient of the overall loss with respect to the output of each block in the encoder, we observe that the final layers tend to fluctuate much more than other layers during backpropagation, i.e. less stability. Interestingly, we show that using EMA to the final part of the SSL encoder, i.e. projector, instead of the whole deep network encoder can give comparable or preferable performance. Our proposed projector-only momentum helps maintain the benefit of EMA but avoids the double forward computation.
abstract_zh: 指数移动平均线（EMA 或动量）广泛应用于现代自我监督学习 (SSL) 方法（例如 MoCo）中，以提高性能。我们证明，这种动量也可以插入无动量 SSL 框架（例如 SimCLR）中，以提高性能。尽管它作为现代 SSL 框架的基本组件被广泛使用，但动量带来的好处尚不清楚。我们发现它的成功至少可以部分归因于稳定性效应。在第一次尝试中，我们分析了 EMA 如何影响编码器的每个部分，并发现靠近编码器输入的部分起着无关紧要的作用，而后面的部分则具有更大的影响。通过监控编码器中每个块的输出的整体损失的梯度，我们观察到最终层在反向传播期间往往比其他层波动更大，即稳定性较差。有趣的是，我们表明，对 SSL 编码器的最后部分（即投影仪）使用 EMA，而不是整个深度网络编码器，可以提供可比较或更好的性能。我们提出的仅投影仪动量有助于保持 EMA 的优势，但避免了双重前向计算。

AI.tldr: 本文分析了动量编码器在自监督视觉表征学习中的优缺点，提出仅对投影器部分使用EMA可提升性能并减少计算开销。
AI.motivation: 尽管EMA在自监督学习中广泛应用，但其优势机制尚不明确，且现有方法存在计算冗余问题。
AI.method: 通过梯度监控分析EMA对编码器各层的影响，发现末层波动较大，提出仅对投影器部分应用EMA的改进方法。
AI.result: 投影器专用动量方法在保持性能的同时，避免了双前向计算，且效果优于或媲美全网络动量方法。
AI.conclusion: EMA的稳定性效应是其成功关键，聚焦投影器的优化策略为自监督学习提供了更高效的实现方案。

We demonstrate that such momentum can also be plugged into momentum-free SSL frameworks, such as SimCLR, for a performance boost. authors_text: Huan Zhang,Shiqi Wang,Kaidi Xu,Linyi Li,Bo Li,Suman Jana,Cho-Jui Hsieh,J. Zico Kolter
title: General Cutting Planes for Bound-Propagation-Based Neural Network Verification
title_zh: 基于有界传播的神经网络验证的通用剖切面
comment: Accepted by NeurIPS 2022. GCP-CROWN is part of the alpha-beta-CROWN verifier, the VNN-COMP 2022 winner
comments: Accepted by NeurIPS 2022. GCP-CROWN is part of the alpha-beta-CROWN verifier, the VNN-COMP 2022 winner
abstract: Bound propagation methods, when combined with branch and bound, are among the most effective methods to formally verify properties of deep neural networks such as correctness, robustness, and safety. However, existing works cannot handle the general form of cutting plane constraints widely accepted in traditional solvers, which are crucial for strengthening verifiers with tightened convex relaxations. In this paper, we generalize the bound propagation procedure to allow the addition of arbitrary cutting plane constraints, including those involving relaxed integer variables that do not appear in existing bound propagation formulations. Our generalized bound propagation method, GCP-CROWN, opens up the opportunity to apply general cutting plane methods for neural network verification while benefiting from the efficiency and GPU acceleration of bound propagation methods. As a case study, we investigate the use of cutting planes generated by off-the-shelf mixed integer programming (MIP) solver. We find that MIP solvers can generate high-quality cutting planes for strengthening bound-propagation-based verifiers using our new formulation. Since the branching-focused bound propagation procedure and the cutting-plane-focused MIP solver can run in parallel utilizing different types of hardware (GPUs and CPUs), their combination can quickly explore a large number of branches with strong cutting planes, leading to strong verification performance. Experiments demonstrate that our method is the first verifier that can completely solve the oval20 benchmark and verify twice as many instances on the oval21 benchmark compared to the best tool in VNN-COMP 2021, and also noticeably outperforms state-of-the-art verifiers on a wide range of benchmarks. GCP-CROWN is part of the $α,\!β$-CROWN verifier, the VNN-COMP 2022 winner. Code is available at http://PaperCode.cc/GCP-CROWN
summary: Bound propagation methods, when combined with branch and bound, are among the most effective methods to formally verify properties of deep neural networks such as correctness, robustness, and safety. However, existing works cannot handle the general form of cutting plane constraints widely accepted in traditional solvers, which are crucial for strengthening verifiers with tightened convex relaxations. In this paper, we generalize the bound propagation procedure to allow the addition of arbitrary cutting plane constraints, including those involving relaxed integer variables that do not appear in existing bound propagation formulations. Our generalized bound propagation method, GCP-CROWN, opens up the opportunity to apply general cutting plane methods for neural network verification while benefiting from the efficiency and GPU acceleration of bound propagation methods. As a case study, we investigate the use of cutting planes generated by off-the-shelf mixed integer programming (MIP) solver. We find that MIP solvers can generate high-quality cutting planes for strengthening bound-propagation-based verifiers using our new formulation. Since the branching-focused bound propagation procedure and the cutting-plane-focused MIP solver can run in parallel utilizing different types of hardware (GPUs and CPUs), their combination can quickly explore a large number of branches with strong cutting planes, leading to strong verification performance. Experiments demonstrate that our method is the first verifier that can completely solve the oval20 benchmark and verify twice as many instances on the oval21 benchmark compared to the best tool in VNN-COMP 2021, and also noticeably outperforms state-of-the-art verifiers on a wide range of benchmarks. GCP-CROWN is part of the $α,\!β$-CROWN verifier, the VNN-COMP 2022 winner. Code is available at http://PaperCode.cc/GCP-CROWN
abstract_zh: 当与分支定界相结合时，有界传播方法是形式化验证深度神经网络的正确性、鲁棒性和安全性等属性的最有效方法之一。然而，现有的工作无法处理传统求解器中广泛接受的切割平面约束的一般形式，这对于加强具有紧凸松弛的验证器至关重要。在本文中，我们概括了边界传播过程，以允许添加任意切割平面约束，包括那些涉及现有边界传播公式中未出现的宽松整数变量的约束。我们的广义边界传播方法 GCP-CROWN 为应用通用割平面方法进行神经网络验证提供了机会，同时受益于边界传播方法的效率和 GPU 加速。作为案例研究，我们研究了现成的混合整数规划 (MIP) 求解器生成的切割平面的使用。我们发现 MIP 求解器可以使用我们的新公式生成高质量的切割平面，以增强基于边界传播的验证器。由于以分支为中心的边界传播过程和以切割平面为中心的 MIP 求解器可以利用不同类型的硬件（GPU 和 CPU）并行运行，因此它们的组合可以快速探索大量具有强切割平面的分支，从而获得强大的验证性能。实验表明，我们的方法是第一个能够完全解决 oval20 基准的验证器，与 VNN-COMP 2021 中最好的工具相比，在 oval21 基准上验证的实例数量是 VNN-COMP 2021 中最佳工具的两倍，并且在各种基准上也明显优于最先进的验证器。 GCP-CROWN 是 VNN-COMP 2022 获胜者 $α,\!β$-CROWN 验证程序的一部分。代码可在 http://PaperCode.cc/GCP-CROWN 获取

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合通用切割平面与边界传播的神经网络验证方法GCP-CROWN，以提升验证效果和效率。
AI.motivation: 现有边界传播方法无法处理传统求解器中广泛使用的通用切割平面约束，而这些约束对强化验证器至关重要。
AI.method: 通过扩展边界传播过程以支持任意切割平面约束，结合混合整数规划求解器生成高质量切割平面，并利用GPU和CPU并行加速。
AI.result: GCP-CROWN首次完全解决oval20基准测试，在oval21基准上验证实例数量是VNN-COMP 2021最佳工具的两倍，且在多类基准上显著优于现有验证器。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过融合切割平面与边界传播的优势，实现了高效且强效的神经网络验证，为后续研究提供了新方向。

search_text: General Cutting Planes for Bound-Propagation-Based Neural Network Verification 基于有界传播的神经网络验证的通用剖切面 Bound propagation methods, when combined with branch and bound, are among the most effective methods to formally verify properties of deep neural networks such as correctness, robustness, and safety. However, existing works cannot handle the general form of cutting plane constraints widely accepted in traditional solvers, which are crucial for strengthening verifiers with tightened convex relaxations. In this paper, we generalize the bound propagation procedure to allow the addition of arbitrary cutting plane constraints, including those involving relaxed integer variables that do not appear in existing bound propagation formulations. Our generalized bound propagation method, GCP-CROWN, opens up the opportunity to apply general cutting plane methods for neural network verification while benefiting from the efficiency and GPU acceleration of bound propagation methods. As a case study, we investigate the use of cutting planes generated by off-the-shelf mixed integer programming (MIP) solver. We find that MIP solvers can generate high-quality cutting planes for strengthening bound-propagation-based verifiers using our new formulation. Since the branching-focused bound propagation procedure and the cutting-plane-focused MIP solver can run in parallel utilizing different types of hardware (GPUs and CPUs), their combination can quickly explore a large number of branches with strong cutting planes, leading to strong verification performance. Experiments demonstrate that our method is the first verifier that can completely solve the oval20 benchmark and verify twice as many instances on the oval21 benchmark compared to the best tool in VNN-COMP 2021, and also noticeably outperforms state-of-the-art verifiers on a wide range of benchmarks. GCP-CROWN is part of the $α,\!β$-CROWN verifier, the VNN-COMP 2022 winner. Code is available at http://PaperCode.cc/GCP-CROWN 当与分支定界相结合时，有界传播方法是形式化验证深度神经网络的正确性、鲁棒性和安全性等属性的最有效方法之一。然而，现有的工作无法处理传统求解器中广泛接受的切割平面约束的一般形式，这对于加强具有紧凸松弛的验证器至关重要。在本文中，我们概括了边界传播过程，以允许添加任意切割平面约束，包括那些涉及现有边界传播公式中未出现的宽松整数变量的约束。我们的广义边界传播方法 GCP-CROWN 为应用通用割平面方法进行神经网络验证提供了机会，同时受益于边界传播方法的效率和 GPU 加速。作为案例研究，我们研究了现成的混合整数规划 (MIP) 求解器生成的切割平面的使用。我们发现 MIP 求解器可以使用我们的新公式生成高质量的切割平面，以增强基于边界传播的验证器。由于以分支为中心的边界传播过程和以切割平面为中心的 MIP 求解器可以利用不同类型的硬件（GPU 和 CPU）并行运行，因此它们的组合可以快速探索大量具有强切割平面的分支，从而获得强大的验证性能。实验表明，我们的方法是第一个能够完全解决 oval20 基准的验证器，与 VNN-COMP 2021 中最好的工具相比，在 oval21 基准上验证的实例数量是 VNN-COMP 2021 中最佳工具的两倍，并且在各种基准上也明显优于最先进的验证器。 GCP-CROWN 是 VNN-COMP 2022 获胜者 $α,\!β$-CROWN 验证程序的一部分。代码可在 http://PaperCode.cc/GCP-CROWN 获取 本文提出了一种结合通用切割平面与边界传播的神经网络验证方法GCP-CROWN，以提升验证效果和效率。 Huan Zhang,Shiqi Wang,Kaidi Xu,Linyi Li,Bo Li,Suman Jana,Cho-Jui Hsieh,J. Zico Kolter cs.LG,cs.CR,cs.CV,math.OC,stat.ML

authors_text: Bright Kudzaishe Mahembe,Clement Nyirenda
title: A Modified UDP for Federated Learning Packet Transmissions
title_zh: 用于联邦学习数据包传输的改进 UDP
abstract: This paper introduces a Modified User Datagram Protocol (UDP) for Federated Learning to ensure efficiency and reliability in the model parameter transport process, maximizing the potential of the Global model in each Federated Learning round. In developing and testing this protocol, the NS3 simulator is utilized to simulate the packet transport over the network and Google TensorFlow is used to create a custom Federated learning environment. In this preliminary implementation, the simulation contains three nodes where two nodes are client nodes, and one is a server node. The results obtained in this paper provide confidence in the capabilities of the protocol in the future of Federated Learning therefore, in future the Modified UDP will be tested on a larger Federated learning system with a TensorFlow model containing more parameters and a comparison between the traditional UDP protocol and the Modified UDP protocol will be simulated. Optimization of the Modified UDP will also be explored to improve efficiency while ensuring reliability.
summary: This paper introduces a Modified User Datagram Protocol (UDP) for Federated Learning to ensure efficiency and reliability in the model parameter transport process, maximizing the potential of the Global model in each Federated Learning round. In developing and testing this protocol, the NS3 simulator is utilized to simulate the packet transport over the network and Google TensorFlow is used to create a custom Federated learning environment. In this preliminary implementation, the simulation contains three nodes where two nodes are client nodes, and one is a server node. The results obtained in this paper provide confidence in the capabilities of the protocol in the future of Federated Learning therefore, in future the Modified UDP will be tested on a larger Federated learning system with a TensorFlow model containing more parameters and a comparison between the traditional UDP protocol and the Modified UDP protocol will be simulated. Optimization of the Modified UDP will also be explored to improve efficiency while ensuring reliability.
abstract_zh: 本文引入了一种用于联邦学习的修改用户数据报协议（UDP），以确保模型参数传输过程的效率和可靠性，最大限度地发挥每轮联邦学习中全局模型的潜力。在开发和测试该协议时，使用 NS3 模拟器来模拟网络上的数据包传输，并使用 Google TensorFlow 创建自定义的联合学习环境。在此初步实现中，模拟包含三个节点，其中两个节点是客户端节点，一个是服务器节点。本文获得的结果为该协议在未来联邦学习中的能力提供了信心，因此，未来将在更大的联邦学习系统上使用包含更多参数的 TensorFlow 模型对 Modified UDP 进行测试，并模拟传统 UDP 协议和 Modified UDP 协议之间的比较。还将探索Modified UDP的优化，在保证可靠性的同时提高效率。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种改进的UDP协议以提升联邦学习中模型参数传输的效率和可靠性。
AI.motivation: 传统UDP协议在联邦学习场景下存在可靠性不足的问题，而模型参数传输的效率直接影响全局模型训练效果。
AI.method: 基于NS3网络模拟器构建传输环境，结合TensorFlow搭建包含3节点（2客户端+1服务器）的联邦学习测试平台。
AI.result: 验证了改进协议在参数传输中的可行性，为后续扩展至更大规模系统及与传统UDP对比奠定基础。
AI.conclusion: 改进UDP协议展现出应用潜力，未来将通过更大规模实验优化协议性能并验证其优势。

authors_text: Saurabh Dash,Xueyuan She,Saibal Mukhopadhyay
title: Learning Point Processes using Recurrent Graph Network
title_zh: 使用循环图网络的学习点过程
abstract: We present a novel Recurrent Graph Network (RGN) approach for predicting discrete marked event sequences by learning the underlying complex stochastic process. Using the framework of Point Processes, we interpret a marked discrete event sequence as the superposition of different sequences each of a unique type. The nodes of the Graph Network use LSTM to incorporate past information whereas a Graph Attention Network (GAT Network) introduces strong inductive biases to capture the interaction between these different types of events. By changing the self-attention mechanism from attending over past events to attending over event types, we obtain a reduction in time and space complexity from $\mathcal{O}(N^2)$ (total number of events) to $\mathcal{O}(|\mathcal{Y}|^2)$ (number of event types). Experiments show that the proposed approach improves performance in log-likelihood, prediction and goodness-of-fit tasks with lower time and space complexity compared to state-of-the art Transformer based architectures.
summary: We present a novel Recurrent Graph Network (RGN) approach for predicting discrete marked event sequences by learning the underlying complex stochastic process. Using the framework of Point Processes, we interpret a marked discrete event sequence as the superposition of different sequences each of a unique type. The nodes of the Graph Network use LSTM to incorporate past information whereas a Graph Attention Network (GAT Network) introduces strong inductive biases to capture the interaction between these different types of events. By changing the self-attention mechanism from attending over past events to attending over event types, we obtain a reduction in time and space complexity from $\mathcal{O}(N^2)$ (total number of events) to $\mathcal{O}(|\mathcal{Y}|^2)$ (number of event types). Experiments show that the proposed approach improves performance in log-likelihood, prediction and goodness-of-fit tasks with lower time and space complexity compared to state-of-the art Transformer based architectures.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种新颖的循环图网络（RGN）方法，通过学习底层的复杂随机过程来预测离散标记事件序列。使用点过程的框架，我们将标记的离散事件序列解释为每个独特类型的不同序列的叠加。图网络的节点使用 LSTM 来合并过去的信息，而图注意力网络（GAT 网络）则引入强归纳偏差来捕获这些不同类型事件之间的交互。通过将自注意力机制从关注过去的事件改为关注事件类型，我们将时间和空间复杂度从 $\mathcal{O}(N^2)$ （事件总数）降低到 $\mathcal{O}(|\mathcal{Y}|^2)$ （事件类型数量）。实验表明，与最先进的基于 Transformer 的架构相比，所提出的方法提高了对数似然、预测和拟合优度任务的性能，且时间和空间复杂度更低。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于循环图网络（RGN）的方法，用于预测带有标记的离散事件序列，通过学习潜在的复杂随机过程。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在处理事件类型交互和复杂度方面存在不足，需设计更高效的模型以捕捉事件类型间的关联并降低计算复杂度。
AI.method: 结合LSTM与图注意力网络（GAT），通过将自注意力机制从关注历史事件转向事件类型，将时间复杂度从O(N²)降至O(|Y|²)，并利用图结构建模事件类型间交互。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在对数似然、预测和拟合任务上优于基于Transformer的最新方法，且时间与空间复杂度更低。
AI.conclusion: RGN通过类型级注意力机制有效平衡了模型复杂度与性能，为复杂事件序列建模提供了高效解决方案。

Experiments show that the proposed approach improves performance in log-likelihood, prediction and goodness-of-fit tasks with lower time and space complexity compared to state-of-the art Transformer based architectures. 我们提出了一种新颖的循环图网络（RGN）方法，通过学习底层的复杂随机过程来预测离散标记事件序列。使用点过程的框架，我们将标记的离散事件序列解释为每个独特类型的不同序列的叠加。图网络的节点使用 LSTM 来合并过去的信息，而图注意力网络（GAT 网络）则引入强归纳偏差来捕获这些不同类型事件之间的交互。通过将自注意力机制从关注过去的事件改为关注事件类型，我们将时间和空间复杂度从 $\mathcal{O}(N^2)$ （事件总数）降低到 $\mathcal{O}(|\mathcal{Y}|^2)$ （事件类型数量）。实验表明，与最先进的基于 Transformer 的架构相比，所提出的方法提高了对数似然、预测和拟合优度任务的性能，且时间和空间复杂度更低。 本文提出一种基于循环图网络（RGN）的方法，用于预测带有标记的离散事件序列，通过学习潜在的复杂随机过程。 Saurabh Dash,Xueyuan She,Saibal Mukhopadhyay cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Ido Benbaji,Omri Doron,Adèle Hénot-Mortier
title: Word-Embeddings Distinguish Denominal and Root-Derived Verbs in Semitic
title_zh: 词嵌入区分闪族语中的名词动词和词根派生动词
abstract: Proponents of the Distributed Morphology framework have posited the existence of two levels of morphological word formation: a lower one, leading to loose input-output semantic relationships; and an upper one, leading to tight input-output semantic relationships. In this work, we propose to test the validity of this assumption in the context of Hebrew word embeddings. If the two-level hypothesis is borne out, we expect state-of-the-art Hebrew word embeddings to encode (1) a noun, (2) a denominal derived from it (via an upper-level operation), and (3) a verb related to the noun (via a lower-level operation on the noun's root), in such a way that the denominal (2) should be closer in the embedding space to the noun (1) than the related verb (3) is to the same noun (1). We report that this hypothesis is verified by four embedding models of Hebrew: fastText, GloVe, Word2Vec and AlephBERT. This suggests that word embedding models are able to capture complex and fine-grained semantic properties that are morphologically motivated.
summary: Proponents of the Distributed Morphology framework have posited the existence of two levels of morphological word formation: a lower one, leading to loose input-output semantic relationships; and an upper one, leading to tight input-output semantic relationships. In this work, we propose to test the validity of this assumption in the context of Hebrew word embeddings. If the two-level hypothesis is borne out, we expect state-of-the-art Hebrew word embeddings to encode (1) a noun, (2) a denominal derived from it (via an upper-level operation), and (3) a verb related to the noun (via a lower-level operation on the noun's root), in such a way that the denominal (2) should be closer in the embedding space to the noun (1) than the related verb (3) is to the same noun (1). We report that this hypothesis is verified by four embedding models of Hebrew: fastText, GloVe, Word2Vec and AlephBERT. This suggests that word embedding models are able to capture complex and fine-grained semantic properties that are morphologically motivated.
abstract_zh: 分布式形态学框架的支持者假设存在两个层次的形态词形成：较低的一级，导致松散的输入输出语义关系；第二级，导致松散的输入输出语义关系；第二级，导致松散的输入输出语义关系；第二级，导致松散的输入输出语义关系。上一层，导致紧密的输入输出语义关系。在这项工作中，我们建议在希伯来语词嵌入的上下文中测试这一假设的有效性。如果两级假设得到证实，我们期望最先进的希伯来语词嵌入能够编码（1）一个名词，（2）从它派生的一个分词（通过上层操作），以及（3）一个与名词相关的动词（通过对名词词根的下层操作），这样在嵌入空间中，分词（2）应该比相关动词更接近名词（1）。 (3) 对应同一个名词(1)。我们报告说，这一假设得到了四种希伯来语嵌入模型的验证：fastText、GloVe、Word2Vec 和 AlephBERT。这表明词嵌入模型能够捕获由形态驱动的复杂且细粒度的语义属性。

AI.tldr: 该论文通过希伯来语词嵌入模型验证分布式形态学框架中关于词形变化层级的假设，区分名词派生动词与词根派生动词的语义关系。
AI.motivation: 分布式形态学框架提出词形变化存在松散和紧密两种语义关系层级，需验证词嵌入模型是否能捕捉此类形态学驱动的语义特性。
AI.method: 使用fastText、GloVe、Word2Vec和AlephBERT四类希伯来语词嵌入模型，通过计算名词、派生名词动词（上层操作）及词根派生动词（下层操作）的向量距离验证假设。
AI.result: 四类模型均验证了假设：派生名词动词与原名词的向量距离小于词根派生动词与原名词的距离。
AI.conclusion: 词嵌入模型能够捕捉形态学驱动的复杂语义特性，支持分布式形态学框架的双层级假设。

authors_text: Kin Ian Lo,Mehrnoosh Sadrzadeh,Shane Mansfield
title: A Model of Anaphoric Ambiguities using Sheaf Theoretic Quantum-like Contextuality and BERT
title_zh: 使用层理论类量子上下文和 BERT 的照应歧义模型
abstract: Ambiguities of natural language do not preclude us from using it and context helps in getting ideas across. They, nonetheless, pose a key challenge to the development of competent machines to understand natural language and use it as humans do. Contextuality is an unparalleled phenomenon in quantum mechanics, where different mathematical formalisms have been put forwards to understand and reason about it. In this paper, we construct a schema for anaphoric ambiguities that exhibits quantum-like contextuality. We use a recently developed criterion of sheaf-theoretic contextuality that is applicable to signalling models. We then take advantage of the neural word embedding engine BERT to instantiate the schema to natural language examples and extract probability distributions for the instances. As a result, plenty of sheaf-contextual examples were discovered in the natural language corpora BERT utilises. Our hope is that these examples will pave the way for future research and for finding ways to extend applications of quantum computing to natural language processing.
summary: Ambiguities of natural language do not preclude us from using it and context helps in getting ideas across. They, nonetheless, pose a key challenge to the development of competent machines to understand natural language and use it as humans do. Contextuality is an unparalleled phenomenon in quantum mechanics, where different mathematical formalisms have been put forwards to understand and reason about it. In this paper, we construct a schema for anaphoric ambiguities that exhibits quantum-like contextuality. We use a recently developed criterion of sheaf-theoretic contextuality that is applicable to signalling models. We then take advantage of the neural word embedding engine BERT to instantiate the schema to natural language examples and extract probability distributions for the instances. As a result, plenty of sheaf-contextual examples were discovered in the natural language corpora BERT utilises. Our hope is that these examples will pave the way for future research and for finding ways to extend applications of quantum computing to natural language processing.
abstract_zh: 自然语言的歧义并不妨碍我们使用它，上下文有助于理解想法。尽管如此，它们对开发有能力的机器来理解自然语言并像人类一样使用它提出了关键挑战。语境性是量子力学中无与伦比的现象，人们提出了不同的数学形式来理解和推理它。在本文中，我们构建了一个显示类似量子语境的照应歧义的模式。我们使用最近开发的适用于信号模型的层理论上下文标准。然后，我们利用神经词嵌入引擎 BERT 将模式实例化为自然语言示例，并提取实例的概率分布。结果，在 BERT 使用的自然语言语料库中发现了大量上下文示例。我们希望这些例子将为未来的研究以及寻找将量子计算的应用扩展到自然语言处理的方法铺平道路。

AI.tldr: 本文构建了一个结合量子力学sheaf理论和BERT模型的框架，用于分析自然语言中的回指歧义问题。
AI.motivation: 自然语言歧义阻碍了机器像人类一样理解语言，传统方法难以处理上下文相关性，需探索新模型。
AI.method: 采用sheaf理论的量子似上下文相关性模型，结合BERT提取自然语言实例的概率分布进行分析。
AI.result: 在BERT使用的语料库中发现了大量符合sheaf-上下文相关性的自然语言实例。
AI.conclusion: 这些发现为量子计算在自然语言处理中的应用提供了潜在研究方向。

authors_text: Junye Chen,Fangdi Li,Futong An,Chen Yang,Hongzhan Song,Shangsheng Wen,Weipeng Guan
title: A Cooperative Positioning Flamework for Robot and Smart Phone Based on Visible Light Communication
title_zh: 基于可见光通信的机器人与智能手机协同定位火焰
abstract: A cooperative positioning flamework of human and robots based on visible light communication (VLC) is proposed. Based on the experiment system, we demonstrated it is feasible and has high-accuracy and real-time performance.
summary: A cooperative positioning flamework of human and robots based on visible light communication (VLC) is proposed. Based on the experiment system, we demonstrated it is feasible and has high-accuracy and real-time performance.
abstract_zh: 提出了一种基于可见光通信（VLC）的人机协同定位火焰。基于该实验系统，我们证明了该方法的可行性，并且具有高精度和实时性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于可见光通信（VLC）的机器人与智能手机协同定位框架，通过实验验证了其可行性及高精度和实时性。
AI.motivation: 传统定位技术存在精度不足或依赖复杂基础设施的问题，而VLC具有高带宽、抗干扰性强等优势，适合实现高精度实时定位。
AI.method: 构建基于VLC的实验系统，结合机器人与智能手机的光信号交互，设计协同定位算法并进行实验验证。
AI.result: 实验结果表明该框架在定位精度和实时性方面表现优异，验证了VLC在协同定位中的可行性。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的VLC协同定位框架为机器人与移动设备的高精度定位提供了有效解决方案，具有实际应用潜力。

ai_content_json.result: 实验结果表明该框架在定位精度和实时性方面表现优异，验证了VLC在协同定位中的可行性。
ai_content_json.conclusion: 所提出的VLC协同定位框架为机器人与移动设备的高精度定位提供了有效解决方案，具有实际应用潜力。

tldr: 本文提出了一种基于可见光通信（VLC）的机器人与智能手机协同定位框架，通过实验验证了其可行性及高精度和实时性。

search_text: A Cooperative Positioning Flamework for Robot and Smart Phone Based on Visible Light Communication 基于可见光通信的机器人与智能手机协同定位火焰 A cooperative positioning flamework of human and robots based on visible light communication (VLC) is proposed. Based on the experiment system, we demonstrated it is feasible and has high-accuracy and real-time performance. 提出了一种基于可见光通信（VLC）的人机协同定位火焰。基于该实验系统，我们证明了该方法的可行性，并且具有高精度和实时性。 本文提出了一种基于可见光通信（VLC）的机器人与智能手机协同定位框架，通过实验验证了其可行性及高精度和实时性。 Junye Chen,Fangdi Li,Futong An,Chen Yang,Hongzhan Song,Shangsheng Wen,Weipeng Guan cs.RO

authors_text: Inan Evin,Perttu Hämäläinen,Christian Guckelsberger
title: Cine-AI: Generating Video Game Cutscenes in the Style of Human Directors
title_zh: Cine-AI：以人类导演的风格生成视频游戏过场动画
comment: 23 pages, 6 figures, 4 tables. In Proceedings ACM Human-Computer Interaction, Vol. 6, CHIPLAY, Article 223. Publication date: October 2022
comments: 23 pages, 6 figures, 4 tables. In Proceedings ACM Human-Computer Interaction, Vol. 6, CHIPLAY, Article 223. Publication date: October 2022
abstract: Cutscenes form an integral part of many video games, but their creation is costly, time-consuming, and requires skills that many game developers lack. While AI has been leveraged to semi-automate cutscene production, the results typically lack the internal consistency and uniformity in style that is characteristic of professional human directors. We overcome this shortcoming with Cine-AI, an open-source procedural cinematography toolset capable of generating in-game cutscenes in the style of eminent human directors. Implemented in the popular game engine Unity, Cine-AI features a novel timeline and storyboard interface for design-time manipulation, combined with runtime cinematography automation. Via two user studies, each employing quantitative and qualitative measures, we demonstrate that Cine-AI generates cutscenes that people correctly associate with a target director, while providing above-average usability. Our director imitation dataset is publicly available, and can be extended by users and film enthusiasts.
summary: Cutscenes form an integral part of many video games, but their creation is costly, time-consuming, and requires skills that many game developers lack. While AI has been leveraged to semi-automate cutscene production, the results typically lack the internal consistency and uniformity in style that is characteristic of professional human directors. We overcome this shortcoming with Cine-AI, an open-source procedural cinematography toolset capable of generating in-game cutscenes in the style of eminent human directors. Implemented in the popular game engine Unity, Cine-AI features a novel timeline and storyboard interface for design-time manipulation, combined with runtime cinematography automation. Via two user studies, each employing quantitative and qualitative measures, we demonstrate that Cine-AI generates cutscenes that people correctly associate with a target director, while providing above-average usability. Our director imitation dataset is publicly available, and can be extended by users and film enthusiasts.
abstract_zh: 过场动画是许多视频游戏不可或缺的一部分，但其创作成本高昂、耗时，并且需要许多游戏开发人员缺乏的技能。虽然人工智能已被用于半自动化过场动画制作，但其结果通常缺乏专业人类导演所特有的内部一致性和风格统一性。我们通过 Cine-AI 克服了这一缺点，这是一个开源程序电影摄影工具集，能够生成杰出人类导演风格的游戏内过场动画。 Cine-AI 在流行的游戏引擎 Unity 中实现，具有新颖的时间线和故事板界面，用于设计时操作，并与运行时电影摄影自动化相结合。通过两项用户研究（每一项都采用定量和定性测量），我们证明 Cine-AI 可以生成人们与目标导演正确关联的过场动画，同时提供高于平均水平的可用性。我们的导演模仿数据集是公开的，可以由用户和电影爱好者扩展。

AI.tldr: 开发名为Cine-AI的开源工具集，用于在Unity引擎中生成符合人类导演风格的游戏过场动画。
AI.motivation: 传统游戏过场动画制作成本高且依赖专业技能，现有AI方法生成的动画缺乏风格统一性和内部一致性。
AI.method: 基于Unity开发支持时间线与故事板设计的界面，结合运行时摄像机自动化技术，并构建导演风格模仿数据集。
AI.result: 用户研究显示生成的动画能被正确关联到目标导演，且工具可用性评分高于平均水平。
AI.conclusion: Cine-AI有效实现了导演风格化过场动画生成，其开源数据集可支持后续扩展研究。

ai_content.conclusion: Cine-AI有效实现了导演风格化过场动画生成，其开源数据集可支持后续扩展研究。

authors_text: Georgia Kouvoutsakis,Elena Kokkoni,Konstantinos Karydis
title: Using Infant Limb Movement Data to Control Small Aerial Robots
title_zh: 利用婴儿肢体运动数据控制小型空中机器人
abstract: Promoting exploratory movements through contingent feedback can positively influence motor development in infancy. Our ongoing work gears toward the development of a robot-assisted contingency learning environment through the use of small aerial robots. This paper examines whether aerial robots and their associated motion controllers can be used to achieve efficient and highly-responsive robot flight for our purpose. Infant kicking kinematic data were extracted from videos and used in simulation and physical experiments with an aerial robot. The efficacy of two standard of practice controllers was assessed: a linear PID and a nonlinear geometric controller. The ability of the robot to match infant kicking trajectories was evaluated qualitatively and quantitatively via the mean squared error (to assess overall deviation from the input infant leg trajectory signals), and dynamic time warping algorithm (to quantify the signal synchrony). Results demonstrate that it is in principle possible to track infant kicking trajectories with small aerials robots, and identify areas of further development required to improve the tracking quality.
summary: Promoting exploratory movements through contingent feedback can positively influence motor development in infancy. Our ongoing work gears toward the development of a robot-assisted contingency learning environment through the use of small aerial robots. This paper examines whether aerial robots and their associated motion controllers can be used to achieve efficient and highly-responsive robot flight for our purpose. Infant kicking kinematic data were extracted from videos and used in simulation and physical experiments with an aerial robot. The efficacy of two standard of practice controllers was assessed: a linear PID and a nonlinear geometric controller. The ability of the robot to match infant kicking trajectories was evaluated qualitatively and quantitatively via the mean squared error (to assess overall deviation from the input infant leg trajectory signals), and dynamic time warping algorithm (to quantify the signal synchrony). Results demonstrate that it is in principle possible to track infant kicking trajectories with small aerials robots, and identify areas of further development required to improve the tracking quality.
abstract_zh: 通过偶然反馈促进探索性运动可以对婴儿期的运动发育产生积极影响。我们正在进行的工作旨在通过使用小型空中机器人来开发机器人辅助的应急学习环境。本文研究了空中机器人及其相关运动控制器是否可用于实现高效且高响应的机器人飞行。从视频中提取婴儿踢腿运动学数据，并用于空中机器人的模拟和物理实验。评估了两种标准实践控制器的功效：线性 PID 和非线性几何控制器。通过均方误差（评估与输入婴儿腿部轨迹信号的总体偏差）和动态时间扭曲算法（量化信号同步性），对机器人匹配婴儿踢腿轨迹的能力进行定性和定量评估。结果表明，原则上可以使用小型空中机器人跟踪婴儿踢腿轨迹，并确定提高跟踪质量所需的进一步开发领域。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨利用婴儿肢体运动数据控制小型空中机器人，以构建机器人辅助的条件反射学习环境。
AI.motivation: 通过条件反馈促进婴儿探索性运动可积极影响其运动发育，研究旨在开发基于小型空中机器人的机器人辅助条件学习系统。
AI.method: 从视频中提取婴儿踢腿运动学数据，通过仿真和物理实验测试线性PID控制器与非线性几何控制器的性能，采用均方误差和动态时间规整算法评估轨迹匹配效果。
AI.result: 实验表明小型空中机器人可原理上追踪婴儿踢腿轨迹，但需进一步优化控制器以提高跟踪精度。
AI.conclusion: 空中机器人可用于婴儿运动轨迹追踪，但需改进控制算法和系统设计以提升跟踪质量。

authors_text: Ang Lv,Xu Tan,Tao Qin,Tie-Yan Liu,Rui Yan
title: Re-creation of Creations: A New Paradigm for Lyric-to-Melody Generation
title_zh: 创作的再创作：歌词到旋律生成的新范式
abstract: Lyric-to-melody generation is an important task in songwriting, and is also quite challenging due to its unique characteristics: the generated melodies should not only follow good musical patterns, but also align with features in lyrics such as rhythms and structures. These characteristics cannot be well handled by neural generation models that learn lyric-to-melody mapping in an end-to-end way, due to several issues: (1) lack of aligned lyric-melody training data to sufficiently learn lyric-melody feature alignment; (2) lack of controllability in generation to better and explicitly align the lyric-melody features. In this paper, we propose Re-creation of Creations (ROC), a new paradigm for lyric-to-melody generation. ROC generates melodies according to given lyrics and also conditions on user-designated chord progression. It addresses the above issues through a generation-retrieval pipeline. Specifically, our paradigm has two stages: (1) creation stage, where a huge amount of music fragments generated by a neural melody language model are indexed in a database through several key features (e.g., chords, tonality, rhythm, and structural information); (2) re-creation stage, where melodies are re-created by retrieving music fragments from the database according to the key features from lyrics and concatenating best music fragments based on composition guidelines and melody language model scores. ROC has several advantages: (1) It only needs unpaired melody data to train melody language model, instead of paired lyric-melody data in previous models. (2) It achieves good lyric-melody feature alignment in lyric-to-melody generation. Tested by English and Chinese lyrics, ROC outperforms previous neural based lyric-to-melody generation models on both objective and subjective metrics.
summary: Lyric-to-melody generation is an important task in songwriting, and is also quite challenging due to its unique characteristics: the generated melodies should not only follow good musical patterns, but also align with features in lyrics such as rhythms and structures. In this paper, we propose Re-creation of Creations (ROC), a new paradigm for lyric-to-melody generation. ROC generates melodies according to given lyrics and also conditions on user-designated chord progression. It addresses the above issues through a generation-retrieval pipeline. Specifically, our paradigm has two stages: (1) creation stage, where a huge amount of music fragments generated by a neural melody language model are indexed in a database through several key features (e.g., chords, tonality, rhythm, and structural information); (2) re-creation stage, where melodies are re-created by retrieving music fragments from the database according to the key features from lyrics and concatenating best music fragments based on composition guidelines and melody language model scores. ROC has several advantages: (1) It only needs unpaired melody data to train melody language model, instead of paired lyric-melody data in previous models. (2) It achieves good lyric-melody feature alignment in lyric-to-melody generation. Tested by English and Chinese lyrics, ROC outperforms previous neural based lyric-to-melody generation models on both objective and subjective metrics.
abstract_zh: 歌词到旋律的生成是歌曲创作中的一项重要任务，并且由于其独特的特点也非常具有挑战性：生成的旋律不仅要遵循良好的音乐模式，还要与歌词中的节奏和结构等特征保持一致。由于以下几个问题，以端到端方式学习歌词到旋律映射的神经生成模型无法很好地处理这些特征：（1）缺乏对齐的歌词 - 旋律训练数据来充分学习歌词 - 旋律特征对齐； （2）生成缺乏可控性，无法更好、更明确地调整歌词旋律特征。在本文中，我们提出了创作的重新创作（ROC），这是一种歌词到旋律生成的新范式。 ROC 根据给定的歌词以及用户指定的和弦进行条件生成旋律。它通过生成检索管道解决上述问题。具体来说，我们的范式有两个阶段：（1）创作阶段，由神经旋律语言模型生成的大量音乐片段通过几个关键特征（例如和弦、调性、节奏和结构信息）在数据库中索引； (2)重新创作阶段，根据歌词的关键特征从数据库中检索音乐片段，并根据作曲指南和旋律语言模型分数拼接最佳音乐片段，重新创作旋律。 ROC有几个优点：（1）它只需要不成对的旋律数据来训练旋律语言模型，而不是以前模型中成对的歌词旋律数据。 （2）在歌词到旋律生成中实现了良好的歌词到旋律特征对齐。通过英文和中文歌词测试，ROC 在客观和主观指标上都优于之前基于神经的歌词到旋律生成模型。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的歌词到旋律生成范式ROC，通过生成-检索流程解决现有模型在数据对齐和可控性方面的不足。
AI.motivation: 现有神经网络模型因缺乏歌词-旋律对齐数据和生成可控性，难以生成符合歌词节奏、结构特征的高质量旋律。
AI.method: ROC采用两阶段流程：1) 创建阶段使用神经旋律语言模型生成大量音乐片段并建立特征数据库；2) 重组阶段根据歌词特征检索数据库片段并按作曲规则拼接生成旋律。
AI.result: 在英文和中文歌词测试中，ROC在客观指标和主观评价上均优于现有神经模型，实现了更好的歌词-旋律特征对齐。
AI.conclusion: ROC通过无监督预训练和特征检索机制，有效解决了歌词旋律生成中的数据对齐难题，为创作提供了更可控的生成范式。

search_text: Re-creation of Creations: A New Paradigm for Lyric-to-Melody Generation 创作的再创作：歌词到旋律生成的新范式 Lyric-to-melody generation is an important task in songwriting, and is also quite challenging due to its unique characteristics: the generated melodies should not only follow good musical patterns, but also align with features in lyrics such as rhythms and structures. These characteristics cannot be well handled by neural generation models that learn lyric-to-melody mapping in an end-to-end way, due to several issues: (1) lack of aligned lyric-melody training data to sufficiently learn lyric-melody feature alignment; (2) lack of controllability in generation to better and explicitly align the lyric-melody features. In this paper, we propose Re-creation of Creations (ROC), a new paradigm for lyric-to-melody generation. ROC generates melodies according to given lyrics and also conditions on user-designated chord progression. It addresses the above issues through a generation-retrieval pipeline. Specifically, our paradigm has two stages: (1) creation stage, where a huge amount of music fragments generated by a neural melody language model are indexed in a database through several key features (e.g., chords, tonality, rhythm, and structural information); (2) re-creation stage, where melodies are re-created by retrieving music fragments from the database according to the key features from lyrics and concatenating best music fragments based on composition guidelines and melody language model scores. ROC has several advantages: (1) It only needs unpaired melody data to train melody language model, instead of paired lyric-melody data in previous models. (2) It achieves good lyric-melody feature alignment in lyric-to-melody generation. Tested by English and Chinese lyrics, ROC outperforms previous neural based lyric-to-melody generation models on both objective and subjective metrics. 歌词到旋律的生成是歌曲创作中的一项重要任务，并且由于其独特的特点也非常具有挑战性：生成的旋律不仅要遵循良好的音乐模式，还要与歌词中的节奏和结构等特征保持一致。由于以下几个问题，以端到端方式学习歌词到旋律映射的神经生成模型无法很好地处理这些特征：（1）缺乏对齐的歌词 - 旋律训练数据来充分学习歌词 - 旋律特征对齐； （2）生成缺乏可控性，无法更好、更明确地调整歌词旋律特征。在本文中，我们提出了创作的重新创作（ROC），这是一种歌词到旋律生成的新范式。 ROC 根据给定的歌词以及用户指定的和弦进行条件生成旋律。它通过生成检索管道解决上述问题。具体来说，我们的范式有两个阶段：（1）创作阶段，由神经旋律语言模型生成的大量音乐片段通过几个关键特征（例如和弦、调性、节奏和结构信息）在数据库中索引； (2)重新创作阶段，根据歌词的关键特征从数据库中检索音乐片段，并根据作曲指南和旋律语言模型分数拼接最佳音乐片段，重新创作旋律。 ROC有几个优点：（1）它只需要不成对的旋律数据来训练旋律语言模型，而不是以前模型中成对的歌词旋律数据。 （2）在歌词到旋律生成中实现了良好的歌词到旋律特征对齐。通过英文和中文歌词测试，ROC 在客观和主观指标上都优于之前基于神经的歌词到旋律生成模型。 本文提出了一种新的歌词到旋律生成范式ROC，通过生成-检索流程解决现有模型在数据对齐和可控性方面的不足。 Ang Lv,Xu Tan,Tao Qin,Tie-Yan Liu,Rui Yan cs.SD,cs.AI,cs.MM,eess.AS

authors_text: Zhaowei Cai,Avinash Ravichandran,Paolo Favaro,Manchen Wang,Davide Modolo,Rahul Bhotika,Zhuowen Tu,Stefano Soatto
title: Semi-supervised Vision Transformers at Scale
title_zh: 大规模半监督视觉变压器
abstract: We study semi-supervised learning (SSL) for vision transformers (ViT), an under-explored topic despite the wide adoption of the ViT architectures to different tasks. To tackle this problem, we propose a new SSL pipeline, consisting of first un/self-supervised pre-training, followed by supervised fine-tuning, and finally semi-supervised fine-tuning. At the semi-supervised fine-tuning stage, we adopt an exponential moving average (EMA)-Teacher framework instead of the popular FixMatch, since the former is more stable and delivers higher accuracy for semi-supervised vision transformers. In addition, we propose a probabilistic pseudo mixup mechanism to interpolate unlabeled samples and their pseudo labels for improved regularization, which is important for training ViTs with weak inductive bias. Our proposed method, dubbed Semi-ViT, achieves comparable or better performance than the CNN counterparts in the semi-supervised classification setting. Semi-ViT also enjoys the scalability benefits of ViTs that can be readily scaled up to large-size models with increasing accuracies. For example, Semi-ViT-Huge achieves an impressive 80% top-1 accuracy on ImageNet using only 1% labels, which is comparable with Inception-v4 using 100% ImageNet labels.
summary: We study semi-supervised learning (SSL) for vision transformers (ViT), an under-explored topic despite the wide adoption of the ViT architectures to different tasks. To tackle this problem, we propose a new SSL pipeline, consisting of first un/self-supervised pre-training, followed by supervised fine-tuning, and finally semi-supervised fine-tuning. At the semi-supervised fine-tuning stage, we adopt an exponential moving average (EMA)-Teacher framework instead of the popular FixMatch, since the former is more stable and delivers higher accuracy for semi-supervised vision transformers. In addition, we propose a probabilistic pseudo mixup mechanism to interpolate unlabeled samples and their pseudo labels for improved regularization, which is important for training ViTs with weak inductive bias. Our proposed method, dubbed Semi-ViT, achieves comparable or better performance than the CNN counterparts in the semi-supervised classification setting. Semi-ViT also enjoys the scalability benefits of ViTs that can be readily scaled up to large-size models with increasing accuracies. For example, Semi-ViT-Huge achieves an impressive 80% top-1 accuracy on ImageNet using only 1% labels, which is comparable with Inception-v4 using 100% ImageNet labels.
abstract_zh: 我们研究视觉变换器 (ViT) 的半监督学习 (SSL)，尽管 ViT 架构已广泛应用于不同的任务，但这是一个尚未充分探索的主题。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种新的 SSL 管道，包括首先无监督/自监督预训练，然后是监督微调，最后是半监督微调。在半监督微调阶段，我们采用指数移动平均（EMA）-Teacher框架而不是流行的FixMatch，因为前者更稳定，并且为半监督视觉变压器提供更高的准确性。此外，我们提出了一种概率伪混合机制来插入未标记样本及其伪标签以改进正则化，这对于训练具有弱归纳偏差的 ViT 非常重要。我们提出的方法被称为 Semi-ViT，在半监督分类设置中实现了与 CNN 同类方法相当或更好的性能。 Semi-ViT 还享有 ViT 的可扩展性优势，可以轻松扩展到大尺寸模型，并且精度不断提高。例如，Semi-ViT-Huge 仅使用 1% 的标签就在 ImageNet 上实现了令人印象深刻的 80% top-1 准确率，这与使用 100% ImageNet 标签的 Inception-v4 相当。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了大规模半监督视觉变换器（ViT）的学习方法。
AI.motivation: 尽管ViT架构已被广泛应用于各种任务，但其在半监督学习（SSL）方面的研究仍较为不足，因此需要探索更有效的SSL方法以提升ViT的性能。
AI.method: 本文提出了一种新的SSL流程，包括预训练、监督微调和半监督微调三个阶段。在半监督微调阶段，采用EMA-Teacher框架替代FixMatch，并引入概率伪Mixup机制以增强正则化效果。
AI.result: Semi-ViT方法在半监督分类任务中表现优于CNN模型，并且具备ViT的可扩展性优势。例如，Semi-ViT-Huge在仅使用1%标签的情况下，ImageNet数据集上的top-1准确率达到80%。
AI.conclusion: Semi-ViT方法在半监督视觉变换器领域表现优异，具备良好的可扩展性和性能优势。

authors_text: Frank Neumann,Carsten Witt
title: Runtime Analysis of the (1+1) EA on Weighted Sums of Transformed Linear Functions
title_zh: (1+1) EA 对变换线性函数加权和的运行时分析
comment: To appear at PPSN 2022. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2109.05799
comments: To appear at PPSN 2022. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2109.05799
abstract: Linear functions play a key role in the runtime analysis of evolutionary algorithms and studies have provided a wide range of new insights and techniques for analyzing evolutionary computation methods. Motivated by studies on separable functions and the optimization behaviour of evolutionary algorithms as well as objective functions from the area of chance constrained optimization, we study the class of objective functions that are weighted sums of two transformed linear functions. Our results show that the (1+1) EA, with a mutation rate depending on the number of overlapping bits of the functions, obtains an optimal solution for these functions in expected time O(n log n), thereby generalizing a well-known result for linear functions to a much wider range of problems.
summary: Linear functions play a key role in the runtime analysis of evolutionary algorithms and studies have provided a wide range of new insights and techniques for analyzing evolutionary computation methods. Motivated by studies on separable functions and the optimization behaviour of evolutionary algorithms as well as objective functions from the area of chance constrained optimization, we study the class of objective functions that are weighted sums of two transformed linear functions. Our results show that the (1+1) EA, with a mutation rate depending on the number of overlapping bits of the functions, obtains an optimal solution for these functions in expected time O(n log n), thereby generalizing a well-known result for linear functions to a much wider range of problems.
abstract_zh: 线性函数在进化算法的运行时分析中发挥着关键作用，研究为分析进化计算方法提供了广泛的新见解和技术。在对可分离函数和进化算法的优化行为以及机会约束优化领域的目标函数的研究的推动下，我们研究了作为两个变换线性函数的加权和的目标函数类。我们的结果表明，(1+1) EA 的突变率取决于函数重叠位数，可以在预期时间 O(n log n) 内获得这些函数的最优解，从而将线性函数的众所周知的结果推广到更广泛的问题。

AI.tldr: 本文分析了(1+1) EA进化算法在求解加权转换线性函数和问题时的运行时间。
AI.motivation: 受分离函数研究及机会约束优化中目标函数的优化行为启发，旨在扩展线性函数的运行时间分析结果到更广泛的函数类。
AI.method: 通过设置依赖函数重叠位数的突变率，对(1+1) EA进行运行时间分析。
AI.result: (1+1) EA在期望时间内以O(n log n)复杂度求得最优解，推广了线性函数的已知结果。
AI.conclusion: 该结果将经典线性函数分析扩展至加权转换线性函数和的更广泛问题范围。

search_text: Runtime Analysis of the (1+1) EA on Weighted Sums of Transformed Linear Functions (1+1) EA 对变换线性函数加权和的运行时分析 Linear functions play a key role in the runtime analysis of evolutionary algorithms and studies have provided a wide range of new insights and techniques for analyzing evolutionary computation methods. Motivated by studies on separable functions and the optimization behaviour of evolutionary algorithms as well as objective functions from the area of chance constrained optimization, we study the class of objective functions that are weighted sums of two transformed linear functions. Our results show that the (1+1) EA, with a mutation rate depending on the number of overlapping bits of the functions, obtains an optimal solution for these functions in expected time O(n log n), thereby generalizing a well-known result for linear functions to a much wider range of problems. 线性函数在进化算法的运行时分析中发挥着关键作用，研究为分析进化计算方法提供了广泛的新见解和技术。在对可分离函数和进化算法的优化行为以及机会约束优化领域的目标函数的研究的推动下，我们研究了作为两个变换线性函数的加权和的目标函数类。我们的结果表明，(1+1) EA 的突变率取决于函数重叠位数，可以在预期时间 O(n log n) 内获得这些函数的最优解，从而将线性函数的众所周知的结果推广到更广泛的问题。 本文分析了(1+1) EA进化算法在求解加权转换线性函数和问题时的运行时间。 Frank Neumann,Carsten Witt cs.NE

authors_text: Shuwei Zhai,Guotai Wang,Xiangde Luo,Qiang Yue,Kang Li,Shaoting Zhang
title: PA-Seg: Learning from Point Annotations for 3D Medical Image Segmentation using Contextual Regularization and Cross Knowledge Distillation
title_zh: PA-Seg：使用上下文正则化和交叉知识蒸馏从 3D 医学图像分割的点注释中学习
comment: 12 pages, 10 figures, 4 tables; Accepted by IEEE TMI
comments: 12 pages, 10 figures, 4 tables; Accepted by IEEE TMI
abstract: The success of Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs) in 3D medical image segmentation relies on massive fully annotated 3D volumes for training that are time-consuming and labor-intensive to acquire. In this paper, we propose to annotate a segmentation target with only seven points in 3D medical images, and design a two-stage weakly supervised learning framework PA-Seg. In the first stage, we employ geodesic distance transform to expand the seed points to provide more supervision signal. To further deal with unannotated image regions during training, we propose two contextual regularization strategies, i.e., multi-view Conditional Random Field (mCRF) loss and Variance Minimization (VM) loss, where the first one encourages pixels with similar features to have consistent labels, and the second one minimizes the intensity variance for the segmented foreground and background, respectively. In the second stage, we use predictions obtained by the model pre-trained in the first stage as pseudo labels. To overcome noises in the pseudo labels, we introduce a Self and Cross Monitoring (SCM) strategy, which combines self-training with Cross Knowledge Distillation (CKD) between a primary model and an auxiliary model that learn from soft labels generated by each other. Experiments on public datasets for Vestibular Schwannoma (VS) segmentation and Brain Tumor Segmentation (BraTS) demonstrated that our model trained in the first stage outperformed existing state-of-the-art weakly supervised approaches by a large margin, and after using SCM for additional training, the model's performance was close to its fully supervised counterpart on the BraTS dataset.
summary: The success of Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs) in 3D medical image segmentation relies on massive fully annotated 3D volumes for training that are time-consuming and labor-intensive to acquire. In this paper, we propose to annotate a segmentation target with only seven points in 3D medical images, and design a two-stage weakly supervised learning framework PA-Seg. In the first stage, we employ geodesic distance transform to expand the seed points to provide more supervision signal. To further deal with unannotated image regions during training, we propose two contextual regularization strategies, i.e., multi-view Conditional Random Field (mCRF) loss and Variance Minimization (VM) loss, where the first one encourages pixels with similar features to have consistent labels, and the second one minimizes the intensity variance for the segmented foreground and background, respectively. In the second stage, we use predictions obtained by the model pre-trained in the first stage as pseudo labels. To overcome noises in the pseudo labels, we introduce a Self and Cross Monitoring (SCM) strategy, which combines self-training with Cross Knowledge Distillation (CKD) between a primary model and an auxiliary model that learn from soft labels generated by each other. Experiments on public datasets for Vestibular Schwannoma (VS) segmentation and Brain Tumor Segmentation (BraTS) demonstrated that our model trained in the first stage outperformed existing state-of-the-art weakly supervised approaches by a large margin, and after using SCM for additional training, the model's performance was close to its fully supervised counterpart on the BraTS dataset.
abstract_zh: 卷积神经网络 (CNN) 在 3D 医学图像分割中的成功依赖于大量完全注释的 3D 数据集进行训练，而获取这些数据既耗时又费力。在本文中，我们提出在 3D 医学图像中仅用七个点来注释分割目标，并设计一个两阶段弱监督学习框架 PA-Seg。在第一阶段，我们采用测地距离变换来扩展种子点以提供更多的监督信号。为了在训练期间进一步处理未注释的图像区域，我们提出了两种上下文正则化策略，即多视图条件随机场（mCRF）损失和方差最小化（VM）损失，其中第一个策略鼓励具有相似特征的像素具有一致的标签，第二个策略分别最小化分割的前景和背景的强度方差。在第二阶段，我们使用第一阶段预训练的模型获得的预测作为伪标签。为了克服伪标签中的噪声，我们引入了自我和交叉监控（SCM）策略，该策略将主模型和辅助模型之间的自我训练与交叉知识蒸馏（CKD）相结合，从彼此生成的软标签中学习。在前庭神经鞘瘤 (VS) 分割和脑肿瘤分割 (BraTS) 公共数据集上进行的实验表明，我们在第一阶段训练的模型大幅优于现有最先进的弱监督方法，并且在使用 SCM 进行额外训练后，该模型的性能接近于 BraTS 数据集上完全监督的模型。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为PA-Seg的弱监督学习框架，通过点标注实现3D医学图像分割，采用上下文正则化和跨知识蒸馏技术。
AI.motivation: 传统3D医学图像分割依赖大量全注释数据，标注成本高。本文旨在通过仅使用少量点标注实现高效分割，减少人工标注需求。
AI.method: 设计两阶段框架：第一阶段用测地距离变换扩展种子点，结合多视图CRF损失和方差最小化损失进行正则化；第二阶段通过伪标签与自训练、跨知识蒸馏结合的SCM策略优化模型。
AI.result: 在VS和BraTS数据集上，第一阶段模型显著优于现有弱监督方法，经SCM训练后在BraTS数据集性能接近全监督方法。
AI.conclusion: PA-Seg通过创新性弱监督策略有效提升了3D医学图像分割效果，为减少标注依赖提供了可行方案。

authors_text: Woo Jae Kim,Seunghoon Hong,Sung-Eui Yoon
title: Diverse Generative Perturbations on Attention Space for Transferable Adversarial Attacks
title_zh: 可转移对抗攻击注意力空间的多种生成扰动
abstract: Adversarial attacks with improved transferability - the ability of an adversarial example crafted on a known model to also fool unknown models - have recently received much attention due to their practicality. Nevertheless, existing transferable attacks craft perturbations in a deterministic manner and often fail to fully explore the loss surface, thus falling into a poor local optimum and suffering from low transferability. To solve this problem, we propose Attentive-Diversity Attack (ADA), which disrupts diverse salient features in a stochastic manner to improve transferability. Primarily, we perturb the image attention to disrupt universal features shared by different models. Then, to effectively avoid poor local optima, we disrupt these features in a stochastic manner and explore the search space of transferable perturbations more exhaustively. More specifically, we use a generator to produce adversarial perturbations that each disturbs features in different ways depending on an input latent code. Extensive experimental evaluations demonstrate the effectiveness of our method, outperforming the transferability of state-of-the-art methods. Codes are available at https://github.com/wkim97/ADA.
summary: Adversarial attacks with improved transferability - the ability of an adversarial example crafted on a known model to also fool unknown models - have recently received much attention due to their practicality. Nevertheless, existing transferable attacks craft perturbations in a deterministic manner and often fail to fully explore the loss surface, thus falling into a poor local optimum and suffering from low transferability. To solve this problem, we propose Attentive-Diversity Attack (ADA), which disrupts diverse salient features in a stochastic manner to improve transferability. Primarily, we perturb the image attention to disrupt universal features shared by different models. Then, to effectively avoid poor local optima, we disrupt these features in a stochastic manner and explore the search space of transferable perturbations more exhaustively. More specifically, we use a generator to produce adversarial perturbations that each disturbs features in different ways depending on an input latent code. Extensive experimental evaluations demonstrate the effectiveness of our method, outperforming the transferability of state-of-the-art methods. Codes are available at https://github.com/wkim97/ADA.
abstract_zh: 具有改进的可转移性的对抗性攻击——在已知模型上制作的对抗性示例也能愚弄未知模型的能力——由于其实用性，最近受到了广泛关注。然而，现有的可转移攻击以确定性方式产生扰动，并且常常无法充分探索损失面，从而陷入较差的局部最优并且可转移性较低。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了注意力多样性攻击（ADA），它以随机的方式破坏不同的显着特征，以提高可转移性。首先，我们扰乱图像注意力，以破坏不同模型共享的通用特征。然后，为了有效避免较差的局部最优，我们以随机方式破坏这些特征，并更详尽地探索可转移扰动的搜索空间。更具体地说，我们使用生成器来产生对抗性扰动，每个扰动根据输入的潜在代码以不同的方式扰乱特征。广泛的实验评估证明了我们方法的有效性，优于最先进方法的可转移性。代码可在 https://github.com/wkim97/ADA 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为ADA的方法，通过在注意力空间中引入多样化的生成性扰动，提升对抗样本在不同模型间的可迁移性。
AI.motivation: 现有可迁移对抗攻击方法通常采用确定性扰动策略，易陷入局部最优解，导致迁移效果不佳，需探索更全面的扰动空间。
AI.method: ADA利用生成器根据输入潜在码随机生成扰动，通过破坏不同模型共享的显著特征（如注意力机制）来提升迁移性，并采用随机化策略避免局部最优。
AI.result: 实验表明，ADA在多个基准数据集上显著优于现有最先进方法，证明其扰动策略能有效提升对抗样本的跨模型迁移能力。
AI.conclusion: 通过引入注意力空间的随机化多样化扰动，ADA有效克服了传统方法的局限性，为可迁移对抗攻击提供了新思路。

ai_content_json.method: ADA利用生成器根据输入潜在码随机生成扰动，通过破坏不同模型共享的显著特征（如注意力机制）来提升迁移性，并采用随机化策略避免局部最优。
ai_content_json.result: 实验表明，ADA在多个基准数据集上显著优于现有最先进方法，证明其扰动策略能有效提升对抗样本的跨模型迁移能力。
ai_content_json.conclusion: 通过引入注意力空间的随机化多样化扰动，ADA有效克服了传统方法的局限性，为可迁移对抗攻击提供了新思路。

tldr: 本文提出一种名为ADA的方法，通过在注意力空间中引入多样化的生成性扰动，提升对抗样本在不同模型间的可迁移性。

method: ADA利用生成器根据输入潜在码随机生成扰动，通过破坏不同模型共享的显著特征（如注意力机制）来提升迁移性，并采用随机化策略避免局部最优。
result: 实验表明，ADA在多个基准数据集上显著优于现有最先进方法，证明其扰动策略能有效提升对抗样本的跨模型迁移能力。
conclusion: 通过引入注意力空间的随机化多样化扰动，ADA有效克服了传统方法的局限性，为可迁移对抗攻击提供了新思路。
search_text: Diverse Generative Perturbations on Attention Space for Transferable Adversarial Attacks 可转移对抗攻击注意力空间的多种生成扰动 Adversarial attacks with improved transferability - the ability of an adversarial example crafted on a known model to also fool unknown models - have recently received much attention due to their practicality. Nevertheless, existing transferable attacks craft perturbations in a deterministic manner and often fail to fully explore the loss surface, thus falling into a poor local optimum and suffering from low transferability. To solve this problem, we propose Attentive-Diversity Attack (ADA), which disrupts diverse salient features in a stochastic manner to improve transferability. Primarily, we perturb the image attention to disrupt universal features shared by different models. Then, to effectively avoid poor local optima, we disrupt these features in a stochastic manner and explore the search space of transferable perturbations more exhaustively. More specifically, we use a generator to produce adversarial perturbations that each disturbs features in different ways depending on an input latent code. Extensive experimental evaluations demonstrate the effectiveness of our method, outperforming the transferability of state-of-the-art methods. Codes are available at https://github.com/wkim97/ADA. 具有改进的可转移性的对抗性攻击——在已知模型上制作的对抗性示例也能愚弄未知模型的能力——由于其实用性，最近受到了广泛关注。然而，现有的可转移攻击以确定性方式产生扰动，并且常常无法充分探索损失面，从而陷入较差的局部最优并且可转移性较低。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了注意力多样性攻击（ADA），它以随机的方式破坏不同的显着特征，以提高可转移性。首先，我们扰乱图像注意力，以破坏不同模型共享的通用特征。然后，为了有效避免较差的局部最优，我们以随机方式破坏这些特征，并更详尽地探索可转移扰动的搜索空间。更具体地说，我们使用生成器来产生对抗性扰动，每个扰动根据输入的潜在代码以不同的方式扰乱特征。广泛的实验评估证明了我们方法的有效性，优于最先进方法的可转移性。代码可在 https://github.com/wkim97/ADA 获取。 本文提出一种名为ADA的方法，通过在注意力空间中引入多样化的生成性扰动，提升对抗样本在不同模型间的可迁移性。 Woo Jae Kim,Seunghoon Hong,Sung-Eui Yoon cs.CV

authors_text: Chin-Chia Michael Yeh,Mengting Gu,Yan Zheng,Huiyuan Chen,Javid Ebrahimi,Zhongfang Zhuang,Junpeng Wang,Liang Wang,Wei Zhang
title: Embedding Compression with Hashing for Efficient Representation Learning in Large-Scale Graph
title_zh: 嵌入压缩和哈希以实现大规模图的高效表示学习
abstract: Graph neural networks (GNNs) are deep learning models designed specifically for graph data, and they typically rely on node features as the input to the first layer. When applying such a type of network on the graph without node features, one can extract simple graph-based node features (e.g., number of degrees) or learn the input node representations (i.e., embeddings) when training the network. While the latter approach, which trains node embeddings, more likely leads to better performance, the number of parameters associated with the embeddings grows linearly with the number of nodes. It is therefore impractical to train the input node embeddings together with GNNs within graphics processing unit (GPU) memory in an end-to-end fashion when dealing with industrial-scale graph data. Inspired by the embedding compression methods developed for natural language processing (NLP) tasks, we develop a node embedding compression method where each node is compactly represented with a bit vector instead of a floating-point vector. The parameters utilized in the compression method can be trained together with GNNs. We show that the proposed node embedding compression method achieves superior performance compared to the alternatives.
summary: Graph neural networks (GNNs) are deep learning models designed specifically for graph data, and they typically rely on node features as the input to the first layer. When applying such a type of network on the graph without node features, one can extract simple graph-based node features (e.g., number of degrees) or learn the input node representations (i.e., embeddings) when training the network. While the latter approach, which trains node embeddings, more likely leads to better performance, the number of parameters associated with the embeddings grows linearly with the number of nodes. It is therefore impractical to train the input node embeddings together with GNNs within graphics processing unit (GPU) memory in an end-to-end fashion when dealing with industrial-scale graph data. Inspired by the embedding compression methods developed for natural language processing (NLP) tasks, we develop a node embedding compression method where each node is compactly represented with a bit vector instead of a floating-point vector. The parameters utilized in the compression method can be trained together with GNNs. We show that the proposed node embedding compression method achieves superior performance compared to the alternatives.
abstract_zh: 图神经网络（GNN）是专门为图数据设计的深度学习模型，它们通常依赖节点特征作为第一层的输入。当在没有节点特征的图上应用这种类型的网络时，可以提取简单的基于图的节点特征（例如度数）或在训练网络时学习输入节点表示（即嵌入）。虽然后一种训练节点嵌入的方法更有可能带来更好的性能，但与嵌入相关的参数数量随着节点数量线性增长。因此，在处理工业规模的图数据时，以端到端的方式在图形处理单元 (GPU) 内存中训练输入节点嵌入与 GNN 是不切实际的。受到为自然语言处理（NLP）任务开发的嵌入压缩方法的启发，我们开发了一种节点嵌入压缩方法，其中每个节点都用位向量而不是浮点向量紧凑地表示。压缩方法中使用的参数可以与 GNN 一起训练。我们表明，与替代方案相比，所提出的节点嵌入压缩方法具有更优越的性能。

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种通过哈希进行嵌入压缩的方法，以提高大规模图数据中表示学习的效率。
AI.motivation: 图神经网络（GNN）在处理无节点特征的图数据时，通常需要训练节点嵌入，但嵌入参数的数量随着节点数量线性增长，导致在工业级图数据上无法在GPU内存中端到端地训练。
AI.method: 受自然语言处理中嵌入压缩方法的启发，该论文提出了一种节点嵌入压缩方法，使用位向量代替浮点向量来紧凑地表示每个节点，并将压缩方法的参数与GNN一起训练。
AI.result: 实验表明，所提出的节点嵌入压缩方法在性能上优于其他替代方法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效解决了大规模图数据中嵌入参数过多的问题，并在性能上优于现有方法。

authors_text: Zihan Ding,Zi-han Ding,Tianrui Hui,Junshi Huang,Xiaoming Wei,Xiaolin Wei,Si Liu
title: PPMN: Pixel-Phrase Matching Network for One-Stage Panoptic Narrative Grounding
title_zh: PPMN：用于一级全景叙事基础的像素短语匹配网络
abstract: Panoptic Narrative Grounding (PNG) is an emerging task whose goal is to segment visual objects of things and stuff categories described by dense narrative captions of a still image. The previous two-stage approach first extracts segmentation region proposals by an off-the-shelf panoptic segmentation model, then conducts coarse region-phrase matching to ground the candidate regions for each noun phrase. However, the two-stage pipeline usually suffers from the performance limitation of low-quality proposals in the first stage and the loss of spatial details caused by region feature pooling, as well as complicated strategies designed for things and stuff categories separately. To alleviate these drawbacks, we propose a one-stage end-to-end Pixel-Phrase Matching Network (PPMN), which directly matches each phrase to its corresponding pixels instead of region proposals and outputs panoptic segmentation by simple combination. Thus, our model can exploit sufficient and finer cross-modal semantic correspondence from the supervision of densely annotated pixel-phrase pairs rather than sparse region-phrase pairs. In addition, we also propose a Language-Compatible Pixel Aggregation (LCPA) module to further enhance the discriminative ability of phrase features through multi-round refinement, which selects the most compatible pixels for each phrase to adaptively aggregate the corresponding visual context. Extensive experiments show that our method achieves new state-of-the-art performance on the PNG benchmark with 4.0 absolute Average Recall gains.
summary: Panoptic Narrative Grounding (PNG) is an emerging task whose goal is to segment visual objects of things and stuff categories described by dense narrative captions of a still image. The previous two-stage approach first extracts segmentation region proposals by an off-the-shelf panoptic segmentation model, then conducts coarse region-phrase matching to ground the candidate regions for each noun phrase. However, the two-stage pipeline usually suffers from the performance limitation of low-quality proposals in the first stage and the loss of spatial details caused by region feature pooling, as well as complicated strategies designed for things and stuff categories separately. To alleviate these drawbacks, we propose a one-stage end-to-end Pixel-Phrase Matching Network (PPMN), which directly matches each phrase to its corresponding pixels instead of region proposals and outputs panoptic segmentation by simple combination. Thus, our model can exploit sufficient and finer cross-modal semantic correspondence from the supervision of densely annotated pixel-phrase pairs rather than sparse region-phrase pairs. In addition, we also propose a Language-Compatible Pixel Aggregation (LCPA) module to further enhance the discriminative ability of phrase features through multi-round refinement, which selects the most compatible pixels for each phrase to adaptively aggregate the corresponding visual context. Extensive experiments show that our method achieves new state-of-the-art performance on the PNG benchmark with 4.0 absolute Average Recall gains.
abstract_zh: 全景叙事基础（PNG）是一项新兴任务，其目标是分割静态图像的密集叙事标题所描述的事物和事物类别的视觉对象。之前的两阶段方法首先通过现成的全景分割模型提取分割区域建议，然后进行粗略的区域短语匹配以奠定每个名词短语的候选区域。然而，两阶段管道通常受到第一阶段低质量提案的性能限制和区域特征池导致的空间细节损失，以及分别为事物和事物类别设计的复杂策略。为了缓解这些缺点，我们提出了一种单阶段端到端像素短语匹配网络（PPMN），它直接将每个短语与其相应的像素而不是区域建议进行匹配，并通过简单的组合输出全景分割。因此，我们的模型可以通过密集注释的像素短语对而不是稀疏的区域短语对的监督来利用足够且更精细的跨模态语义对应。此外，我们还提出了语言兼容像素聚合（LCPA）模块，通过多轮细化进一步增强短语特征的判别能力，为每个短语选择最兼容的像素来自适应聚合相应的视觉上下文。大量实验表明，我们的方法在 PNG 基准测试中实现了新的最先进性能，绝对平均召回率增益为 4.0。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为PPMN的一阶段像素-短语匹配网络，用于解决视觉叙事接地任务（PNG），通过直接匹配短语与像素实现更精确的图像分割。
AI.motivation: 传统两阶段方法依赖于低质量的区域提议和区域特征池化，导致空间细节丢失及处理事物与材质类别的策略复杂，需改进以提升性能。
AI.method: 设计了一阶段端到端PPMN模型，直接匹配短语与像素而非区域提议，并引入语言兼容像素聚合模块（LCPA）通过多轮优化增强短语特征的判别能力。
AI.result: 在PNG基准测试中，该方法实现了4.0的绝对平均召回率提升，达到新状态-of-the-art性能。
AI.conclusion: 通过密集像素-短语对监督和LCPA模块优化，PPMN有效解决了传统方法的局限性，为视觉叙事接地任务提供了更高效准确的解决方案。
