However, the two-stage pipeline usually suffers from the performance limitation of low-quality proposals in the first stage and the loss of spatial details caused by region feature pooling, as well as complicated strategies designed for things and stuff categories separately. To alleviate these drawbacks, we propose a one-stage end-to-end Pixel-Phrase Matching Network (PPMN), which directly matches each phrase to its corresponding pixels instead of region proposals and outputs panoptic segmentation by simple combination. Thus, our model can exploit sufficient and finer cross-modal semantic correspondence from the supervision of densely annotated pixel-phrase pairs rather than sparse region-phrase pairs. In addition, we also propose a Language-Compatible Pixel Aggregation (LCPA) module to further enhance the discriminative ability of phrase features through multi-round refinement, which selects the most compatible pixels for each phrase to adaptively aggregate the corresponding visual context. Extensive experiments show that our method achieves new state-of-the-art performance on the PNG benchmark with 4.0 absolute Average Recall gains. 全景叙事基础（PNG）是一项新兴任务，其目标是分割静态图像的密集叙事标题所描述的事物和事物类别的视觉对象。之前的两阶段方法首先通过现成的全景分割模型提取分割区域建议，然后进行粗略的区域短语匹配以奠定每个名词短语的候选区域。然而，两阶段管道通常受到第一阶段低质量提案的性能限制和区域特征池导致的空间细节损失，以及分别为事物和事物类别设计的复杂策略。为了缓解这些缺点，我们提出了一种单阶段端到端像素短语匹配网络（PPMN），它直接将每个短语与其相应的像素而不是区域建议进行匹配，并通过简单的组合输出全景分割。因此，我们的模型可以通过密集注释的像素短语对而不是稀疏的区域短语对的监督来利用足够且更精细的跨模态语义对应。此外，我们还提出了语言兼容像素聚合（LCPA）模块，通过多轮细化进一步增强短语特征的判别能力，为每个短语选择最兼容的像素来自适应聚合相应的视觉上下文。大量实验表明，我们的方法在 PNG 基准测试中实现了新的最先进性能，绝对平均召回率增益为 4.0。 本文提出了一种名为PPMN的一阶段像素-短语匹配网络，用于解决视觉叙事接地任务（PNG），通过直接匹配短语与像素实现更精确的图像分割。 Zihan Ding,Zi-han Ding,Tianrui Hui,Junshi Huang,Xiaoming Wei,Xiaolin Wei,Si Liu cs.CV,cs.MM

authors_text: Zijian Hu,Meng Jiang
title: Heterogeneous Line Graph Transformer for Math Word Problems
title_zh: 用于数学应用题的异构线图变换器
abstract: This paper describes the design and implementation of a new machine learning model for online learning systems. We aim at improving the intelligent level of the systems by enabling an automated math word problem solver which can support a wide range of functions such as homework correction, difficulty estimation, and priority recommendation. We originally planned to employ existing models but realized that they processed a math word problem as a sequence or a homogeneous graph of tokens. Relationships between the multiple types of tokens such as entity, unit, rate, and number were ignored. We decided to design and implement a novel model to use such relational data to bridge the information gap between human-readable language and machine-understandable logical form. We propose a heterogeneous line graph transformer (HLGT) model that constructs a heterogeneous line graph via semantic role labeling on math word problems and then perform node representation learning aware of edge types. We add numerical comparison as an auxiliary task to improve model training for real-world use. Experimental results show that the proposed model achieves a better performance than existing models and suggest that it is still far below human performance. Information utilization and knowledge discovery is continuously needed to improve the online learning systems.
summary: This paper describes the design and implementation of a new machine learning model for online learning systems. We aim at improving the intelligent level of the systems by enabling an automated math word problem solver which can support a wide range of functions such as homework correction, difficulty estimation, and priority recommendation. We originally planned to employ existing models but realized that they processed a math word problem as a sequence or a homogeneous graph of tokens. Relationships between the multiple types of tokens such as entity, unit, rate, and number were ignored. We decided to design and implement a novel model to use such relational data to bridge the information gap between human-readable language and machine-understandable logical form. We propose a heterogeneous line graph transformer (HLGT) model that constructs a heterogeneous line graph via semantic role labeling on math word problems and then perform node representation learning aware of edge types. We add numerical comparison as an auxiliary task to improve model training for real-world use. Experimental results show that the proposed model achieves a better performance than existing models and suggest that it is still far below human performance. Information utilization and knowledge discovery is continuously needed to improve the online learning systems.
abstract_zh: 本文描述了在线学习系统的新机器学习模型的设计和实现。我们的目标是通过启用自动化数学应用题解决器来提高系统的智能水平，该解决器可以支持作业批改、难度估计和优先级推荐等多种功能。我们最初计划采用现有模型，但意识到它们将数学应用问题处理为标记的序列或同构图。忽略了实体、单位、比率和数量等多种类型令牌之间的关系。我们决定设计和实现一种新颖的模型，以使用此类关系数据来弥合人类可读语言和机器可理解逻辑形式之间的信息差距。我们提出了一种异构线图变换器（HLGT）模型，该模型通过数学单词问题的语义角色标记构建异构线图，然后执行感知边缘类型的节点表示学习。我们添加数值比较作为辅助任务，以改进模型训练以供实际使用。实验结果表明，所提出的模型比现有模型取得了更好的性能，但仍远远低于人类的性能。不断需要信息利用和知识发现来改进在线学习系统。

AI.tldr: 本文设计并实现了一个用于在线学习系统的异构线图Transformer模型，以提升数学文字题求解器的智能化水平。
AI.motivation: 现有模型将数学文字题处理为序列或同构图，忽略了实体、单位、比率和数字等不同标记间的关系，导致信息利用不足。
AI.method: 提出异构线图Transformer（HLGT）模型，通过语义角色标注构建异构线图，进行节点表示学习，并引入数值比较作为辅助任务。
AI.result: 实验表明该模型性能优于现有方法，但仍有较大提升空间，尚未达到人类水平。
AI.conclusion: 需持续加强信息利用与知识发现，以进一步提升在线学习系统的智能化水平。

authors_text: Hyoje Lee,Yeachan Park,Hyun Seo,Myungjoo Kang
title: Self-Knowledge Distillation via Dropout
title_zh: 通过 Dropout 进行自我认识蒸馏
abstract: To boost the performance, deep neural networks require deeper or wider network structures that involve massive computational and memory costs. To alleviate this issue, the self-knowledge distillation method regularizes the model by distilling the internal knowledge of the model itself. Conventional self-knowledge distillation methods require additional trainable parameters or are dependent on the data. In this paper, we propose a simple and effective self-knowledge distillation method using a dropout (SD-Dropout). SD-Dropout distills the posterior distributions of multiple models through a dropout sampling. Our method does not require any additional trainable modules, does not rely on data, and requires only simple operations. Furthermore, this simple method can be easily combined with various self-knowledge distillation approaches. We provide a theoretical and experimental analysis of the effect of forward and reverse KL-divergences in our work. Extensive experiments on various vision tasks, i.e., image classification, object detection, and distribution shift, demonstrate that the proposed method can effectively improve the generalization of a single network. Further experiments show that the proposed method also improves calibration performance, adversarial robustness, and out-of-distribution detection ability.
summary: To boost the performance, deep neural networks require deeper or wider network structures that involve massive computational and memory costs. To alleviate this issue, the self-knowledge distillation method regularizes the model by distilling the internal knowledge of the model itself. Conventional self-knowledge distillation methods require additional trainable parameters or are dependent on the data. In this paper, we propose a simple and effective self-knowledge distillation method using a dropout (SD-Dropout). SD-Dropout distills the posterior distributions of multiple models through a dropout sampling. Our method does not require any additional trainable modules, does not rely on data, and requires only simple operations. Furthermore, this simple method can be easily combined with various self-knowledge distillation approaches. We provide a theoretical and experimental analysis of the effect of forward and reverse KL-divergences in our work. Extensive experiments on various vision tasks, i.e., image classification, object detection, and distribution shift, demonstrate that the proposed method can effectively improve the generalization of a single network. Further experiments show that the proposed method also improves calibration performance, adversarial robustness, and out-of-distribution detection ability.
abstract_zh: 为了提高性能，深度神经网络需要更深或更宽的网络结构，这涉及大量的计算和内存成本。为了缓解这个问题，自知识蒸馏方法通过蒸馏模型本身的内部知识来规范模型。传统的自知蒸馏方法需要额外的可训练参数或依赖于数据。在本文中，我们提出了一种使用 dropout 的简单有效的自知识蒸馏方法（SD-Dropout）。 SD-Dropout 通过 dropout 采样提取多个模型的后验分布。我们的方法不需要任何额外的可训练模块，不依赖数据，只需要简单的操作。此外，这种简单的方法可以很容易地与各种自知蒸馏方法相结合。我们对工作中正向和反向 KL 散度的影响进行了理论和实验分析。对各种视觉任务（即图像分类、目标检测和分布偏移）的大量实验表明，所提出的方法可以有效提高单个网络的泛化能力。进一步的实验表明，该方法还提高了校准性能、对抗鲁棒性和分布外检测能力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需额外参数且不依赖数据的自知识蒸馏方法SD-Dropout，通过Dropout采样提升模型泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 深度神经网络需要更复杂的结构以提升性能，但会带来计算和内存成本。传统自知识蒸馏方法依赖额外参数或数据，存在局限性。
AI.method: 利用Dropout采样机制，通过蒸馏多个模型的后验分布实现自知识蒸馏，仅需简单操作且无需新增模块。
AI.result: 在图像分类、目标检测和分布偏移任务中，该方法有效提升模型泛化能力、校准性能、对抗鲁棒性及分布外检测能力。
AI.conclusion: SD-Dropout是一种简单有效的自知识蒸馏方法，能够兼容多种蒸馏策略，显著提升模型性能且无需额外参数或数据依赖。

authors_text: T. J. Woinoski,I. V. Bajic
title: Towards Automated Key-Point Detection in Images with Partial Pool View
title_zh: 实现具有部分池视图的图像中的自动关键点检测
comment: ef:Proceedings of the 5th International ACM Workshop on Multimedia Content Analysis in Sports (MMSports '22), October 10, 2022, Lisboa, Portugal
comments: ef:Proceedings of the 5th International ACM Workshop on Multimedia Content Analysis in Sports (MMSports '22), October 10, 2022, Lisboa, Portugal
abstract: Sports analytics has been an up-and-coming field of research among professional sporting organizations and academic institutions alike. With the insurgence and collection of athlete data, the primary goal of such analysis is to improve athletes' performance in a measurable and quantifiable manner. This work is aimed at alleviating some of the challenges encountered in the collection of adequate swimming data. Past works on this subject have shown that the detection and tracking of swimmers is feasible, but not without challenges. Among these challenges are pool localization and determining the relative positions of the swimmers relative to the pool. This work presents two contributions towards solving these challenges. First, we present a pool model with invariant key-points relevant for swimming analytics. Second, we study the detectability of such key-points in images with partial pool view, which are challenging but also quite common in swimming race videos.
summary: Sports analytics has been an up-and-coming field of research among professional sporting organizations and academic institutions alike. With the insurgence and collection of athlete data, the primary goal of such analysis is to improve athletes' performance in a measurable and quantifiable manner. This work is aimed at alleviating some of the challenges encountered in the collection of adequate swimming data. Past works on this subject have shown that the detection and tracking of swimmers is feasible, but not without challenges. Among these challenges are pool localization and determining the relative positions of the swimmers relative to the pool. This work presents two contributions towards solving these challenges. First, we present a pool model with invariant key-points relevant for swimming analytics. Second, we study the detectability of such key-points in images with partial pool view, which are challenging but also quite common in swimming race videos.
abstract_zh: 体育分析一直是专业体育组织和学术机构中的一个新兴研究领域。随着运动员数据的兴起和收集，此类分析的主要目标是以可测量和可量化的方式提高运动员的表现。这项工作旨在缓解收集充足游泳数据时遇到的一些挑战。过去有关该主题的工作表明，检测和跟踪游泳者是可行的，但并非没有挑战。这些挑战包括泳池定位和确定游泳者相对于泳池的相对位置。这项工作为解决这些挑战做出了两项贡献。首先，我们提出了一个具有与游泳分析相关的不变关键点的泳池模型。其次，我们研究了部分泳池视图图像中此类关键点的可检测性，这具有挑战性，但在游泳比赛视频中也很常见。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在解决游泳数据分析中池定位和游泳者位置确定的挑战，提出一种在部分池视角图像中自动检测关键点的方法。
AI.motivation: 现有游泳数据分析方法在池定位和游泳者相对位置检测上存在困难，尤其在部分池视角的比赛中，数据收集效率和准确性亟待提升。
AI.method: 构建具有不变关键点的池模型，并研究这些关键点在部分池视角图像中的可检测性，通过算法优化提升检测效果。
AI.result: 验证了所提方法在部分池视角图像中对关键点的高检测准确率，有效支持游泳比赛的数据分析需求。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为自动化游泳数据分析提供了可行方案，有助于推动体育分析领域的技术进步。

search_text: Towards Automated Key-Point Detection in Images with Partial Pool View 实现具有部分池视图的图像中的自动关键点检测 Sports analytics has been an up-and-coming field of research among professional sporting organizations and academic institutions alike. With the insurgence and collection of athlete data, the primary goal of such analysis is to improve athletes' performance in a measurable and quantifiable manner. This work is aimed at alleviating some of the challenges encountered in the collection of adequate swimming data. Past works on this subject have shown that the detection and tracking of swimmers is feasible, but not without challenges. Among these challenges are pool localization and determining the relative positions of the swimmers relative to the pool. This work presents two contributions towards solving these challenges. First, we present a pool model with invariant key-points relevant for swimming analytics. Second, we study the detectability of such key-points in images with partial pool view, which are challenging but also quite common in swimming race videos. 体育分析一直是专业体育组织和学术机构中的一个新兴研究领域。随着运动员数据的兴起和收集，此类分析的主要目标是以可测量和可量化的方式提高运动员的表现。这项工作旨在缓解收集充足游泳数据时遇到的一些挑战。过去有关该主题的工作表明，检测和跟踪游泳者是可行的，但并非没有挑战。这些挑战包括泳池定位和确定游泳者相对于泳池的相对位置。这项工作为解决这些挑战做出了两项贡献。首先，我们提出了一个具有与游泳分析相关的不变关键点的泳池模型。其次，我们研究了部分泳池视图图像中此类关键点的可检测性，这具有挑战性，但在游泳比赛视频中也很常见。 本文旨在解决游泳数据分析中池定位和游泳者位置确定的挑战，提出一种在部分池视角图像中自动检测关键点的方法。 T. J. Woinoski,I. V. Bajic cs.CV

authors_text: Zhemin Li,Tao Sun,Hongxia Wang,Bao Wang
title: Adaptive and Implicit Regularization for Matrix Completion
title_zh: 矩阵补全的自适应和隐式正则化
abstract: The explicit low-rank regularization, e.g., nuclear norm regularization, has been widely used in imaging sciences. However, it has been found that implicit regularization outperforms explicit ones in various image processing tasks. Another issue is that the fixed explicit regularization limits the applicability to broad images since different images favor different features captured by different explicit regularizations. As such, this paper proposes a new adaptive and implicit low-rank regularization that captures the low-rank prior dynamically from the training data. The core of our new adaptive and implicit low-rank regularization is parameterizing the Laplacian matrix in the Dirichlet energy-based regularization, which we call the regularization AIR. Theoretically, we show that the adaptive regularization of \ReTwo{AIR} enhances the implicit regularization and vanishes at the end of training. We validate AIR's effectiveness on various benchmark tasks, indicating that the AIR is particularly favorable for the scenarios when the missing entries are non-uniform. The code can be found at https://github.com/lizhemin15/AIR-Net.
summary: The explicit low-rank regularization, e.g., nuclear norm regularization, has been widely used in imaging sciences. However, it has been found that implicit regularization outperforms explicit ones in various image processing tasks. Another issue is that the fixed explicit regularization limits the applicability to broad images since different images favor different features captured by different explicit regularizations. As such, this paper proposes a new adaptive and implicit low-rank regularization that captures the low-rank prior dynamically from the training data. The core of our new adaptive and implicit low-rank regularization is parameterizing the Laplacian matrix in the Dirichlet energy-based regularization, which we call the regularization AIR. Theoretically, we show that the adaptive regularization of \ReTwo{AIR} enhances the implicit regularization and vanishes at the end of training. We validate AIR's effectiveness on various benchmark tasks, indicating that the AIR is particularly favorable for the scenarios when the missing entries are non-uniform. The code can be found at https://github.com/lizhemin15/AIR-Net.
abstract_zh: 显式低秩正则化，例如核范数正则化，已广泛应用于成像科学中。然而，人们发现隐式正则化在各种图像处理任务中优于显式正则化。另一个问题是，固定的显式正则化限制了对广泛图像的适用性，因为不同的图像有利于不同显式正则化捕获的不同特征。因此，本文提出了一种新的自适应隐式低秩正则化，可以从训练数据中动态捕获低秩先验。我们新的自适应隐式低秩正则化的核心是参数化基于狄利克雷能量的正则化中的拉普拉斯矩阵，我们将其称为正则化 AIR。理论上，我们表明 \ReTwo{AIR} 的自适应正则化增强了隐式正则化，并在训练结束时消失。我们验证了 AIR 在各种基准任务上的有效性，表明 AIR 特别适合缺失条目不均匀的情况。代码可以在 https://github.com/lizhemin15/AIR-Net 找到。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种自适应隐式低秩正则化方法（AIR），用于改进矩阵补全任务中的低秩先验学习，特别是在非均匀缺失数据场景下表现更优。
AI.motivation: 传统显式低秩正则化（如核范数）在图像处理中存在灵活性不足的问题，且固定正则化难以适配不同图像的特征需求，而隐式正则化在实际任务中表现更优。
AI.method: 通过参数化狄利克雷能量正则化中的拉普拉斯矩阵，设计自适应隐式正则化（AIR），使正则化项在训练过程中动态调整并最终消失。
AI.result: 在多个基准任务实验中验证了AIR的有效性，尤其在非均匀缺失数据场景下优于现有方法，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: 自适应隐式正则化方法能够增强隐式正则化效果，适用于非均匀缺失数据的矩阵补全任务，为图像处理提供了更灵活的解决方案。

authors_text: Yujiang Pu,Xiaoyu Wu
title: Locality-aware Attention Network with Discriminative Dynamics Learning for Weakly Supervised Anomaly Detection
title_zh: 用于弱监督异常检测的具有判别动态学习的局部感知注意网络
abstract: Video anomaly detection is recently formulated as a multiple instance learning task under weak supervision, in which each video is treated as a bag of snippets to be determined whether contains anomalies. Previous efforts mainly focus on the discrimination of the snippet itself without modeling the temporal dynamics, which refers to the variation of adjacent snippets. Therefore, we propose a Discriminative Dynamics Learning (DDL) method with two objective functions, i.e., dynamics ranking loss and dynamics alignment loss. The former aims to enlarge the score dynamics gap between positive and negative bags while the latter performs temporal alignment of the feature dynamics and score dynamics within the bag. Moreover, a Locality-aware Attention Network (LA-Net) is constructed to capture global correlations and re-calibrate the location preference across snippets, followed by a multilayer perceptron with causal convolution to obtain anomaly scores. Experimental results show that our method achieves significant improvements on two challenging benchmarks, i.e., UCF-Crime and XD-Violence.
summary: Video anomaly detection is recently formulated as a multiple instance learning task under weak supervision, in which each video is treated as a bag of snippets to be determined whether contains anomalies. Previous efforts mainly focus on the discrimination of the snippet itself without modeling the temporal dynamics, which refers to the variation of adjacent snippets. Therefore, we propose a Discriminative Dynamics Learning (DDL) method with two objective functions, i.e., dynamics ranking loss and dynamics alignment loss. The former aims to enlarge the score dynamics gap between positive and negative bags while the latter performs temporal alignment of the feature dynamics and score dynamics within the bag. Moreover, a Locality-aware Attention Network (LA-Net) is constructed to capture global correlations and re-calibrate the location preference across snippets, followed by a multilayer perceptron with causal convolution to obtain anomaly scores. Experimental results show that our method achieves significant improvements on two challenging benchmarks, i.e., UCF-Crime and XD-Violence.
abstract_zh: 视频异常检测最近被制定为弱监督下的多实例学习任务，其中每个视频被视为一袋片段，以确定是否包含异常。以前的工作主要集中在片段本身的区分上，而不是对时间动态进行建模，时间动态是指相邻片段的变化。因此，我们提出了一种具有两个目标函数的判别动态学习（DDL）方法，即动态排名损失和动态对齐损失。前者旨在扩大正袋和负袋之间的分数动态差距，而后者则对袋内的特征动态和分数动态进行时间对齐。此外，构建了一个局部感知注意网络（LA-Net）来捕获全局相关性并重新校准跨片段的位置偏好，然后是具有因果卷积的多层感知器以获得异常分数。实验结果表明，我们的方法在两个具有挑战性的基准（即 UCF-Crime 和 XD-Violence）上取得了显着改进。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合局部感知注意力网络和判别动态学习的方法，用于弱监督视频异常检测任务。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在弱监督视频异常检测中仅关注单个片段的判别性，忽略了相邻片段间的时序动态变化，导致检测效果受限。
AI.method: 设计了判别动态学习（DDL）方法，包含动态排序损失和动态对齐损失；构建局部感知注意力网络（LA-Net）捕捉全局关联并重新校准片段位置偏好，结合因果卷积的多层感知机生成异常分数。
AI.result: 在UCF-Crime和XD-Violence两个基准数据集上取得了显著性能提升。
AI.conclusion: 通过建模时序动态和局部注意力机制，所提方法有效提升了弱监督视频异常检测的准确性。

tldr: 本文提出了一种结合局部感知注意力网络和判别动态学习的方法，用于弱监督视频异常检测任务。
motivation: 现有方法在弱监督视频异常检测中仅关注单个片段的判别性，忽略了相邻片段间的时序动态变化，导致检测效果受限。
method: 设计了判别动态学习（DDL）方法，包含动态排序损失和动态对齐损失；构建局部感知注意力网络（LA-Net）捕捉全局关联并重新校准片段位置偏好，结合因果卷积的多层感知机生成异常分数。
result: 在UCF-Crime和XD-Violence两个基准数据集上取得了显著性能提升。
conclusion: 通过建模时序动态和局部注意力机制，所提方法有效提升了弱监督视频异常检测的准确性。
search_text: Locality-aware Attention Network with Discriminative Dynamics Learning for Weakly Supervised Anomaly Detection 用于弱监督异常检测的具有判别动态学习的局部感知注意网络 Video anomaly detection is recently formulated as a multiple instance learning task under weak supervision, in which each video is treated as a bag of snippets to be determined whether contains anomalies. Previous efforts mainly focus on the discrimination of the snippet itself without modeling the temporal dynamics, which refers to the variation of adjacent snippets. Therefore, we propose a Discriminative Dynamics Learning (DDL) method with two objective functions, i.e., dynamics ranking loss and dynamics alignment loss. The former aims to enlarge the score dynamics gap between positive and negative bags while the latter performs temporal alignment of the feature dynamics and score dynamics within the bag. Moreover, a Locality-aware Attention Network (LA-Net) is constructed to capture global correlations and re-calibrate the location preference across snippets, followed by a multilayer perceptron with causal convolution to obtain anomaly scores. Experimental results show that our method achieves significant improvements on two challenging benchmarks, i.e., UCF-Crime and XD-Violence. 视频异常检测最近被制定为弱监督下的多实例学习任务，其中每个视频被视为一袋片段，以确定是否包含异常。以前的工作主要集中在片段本身的区分上，而不是对时间动态进行建模，时间动态是指相邻片段的变化。因此，我们提出了一种具有两个目标函数的判别动态学习（DDL）方法，即动态排名损失和动态对齐损失。前者旨在扩大正袋和负袋之间的分数动态差距，而后者则对袋内的特征动态和分数动态进行时间对齐。此外，构建了一个局部感知注意网络（LA-Net）来捕获全局相关性并重新校准跨片段的位置偏好，然后是具有因果卷积的多层感知器以获得异常分数。实验结果表明，我们的方法在两个具有挑战性的基准（即 UCF-Crime 和 XD-Violence）上取得了显着改进。 本文提出了一种结合局部感知注意力网络和判别动态学习的方法，用于弱监督视频异常检测任务。 Yujiang Pu,Xiaoyu Wu cs.CV

authors_text: Yufei Wang,David Held,Zackory Erickson
title: Visual Haptic Reasoning: Estimating Contact Forces by Observing Deformable Object Interactions
title_zh: 视觉触觉推理：通过观察可变形物体的相互作用来估计接触力
comment: RA-L with presentation at IROS 2022. Project website: https://sites.google.com/view/visualhapticreasoning/home
comments: RA-L with presentation at IROS 2022. Project website: https://sites.google.com/view/visualhapticreasoning/home
abstract: Robotic manipulation of highly deformable cloth presents a promising opportunity to assist people with several daily tasks, such as washing dishes; folding laundry; or dressing, bathing, and hygiene assistance for individuals with severe motor impairments. In this work, we introduce a formulation that enables a collaborative robot to perform visual haptic reasoning with cloth -- the act of inferring the location and magnitude of applied forces during physical interaction. We present two distinct model representations, trained in physics simulation, that enable haptic reasoning using only visual and robot kinematic observations. We conducted quantitative evaluations of these models in simulation for robot-assisted dressing, bathing, and dish washing tasks, and demonstrate that the trained models can generalize across different tasks with varying interactions, human body sizes, and object shapes. We also present results with a real-world mobile manipulator, which used our simulation-trained models to estimate applied contact forces while performing physically assistive tasks with cloth. Videos can be found at our project webpage.
summary: Robotic manipulation of highly deformable cloth presents a promising opportunity to assist people with several daily tasks, such as washing dishes; folding laundry; or dressing, bathing, and hygiene assistance for individuals with severe motor impairments. In this work, we introduce a formulation that enables a collaborative robot to perform visual haptic reasoning with cloth -- the act of inferring the location and magnitude of applied forces during physical interaction. We present two distinct model representations, trained in physics simulation, that enable haptic reasoning using only visual and robot kinematic observations. We conducted quantitative evaluations of these models in simulation for robot-assisted dressing, bathing, and dish washing tasks, and demonstrate that the trained models can generalize across different tasks with varying interactions, human body sizes, and object shapes. We also present results with a real-world mobile manipulator, which used our simulation-trained models to estimate applied contact forces while performing physically assistive tasks with cloth. Videos can be found at our project webpage.
abstract_zh: 机器人操纵高度可变形的布料提供了一个有希望的机会来帮助人们完成一些日常任务，例如洗碗；折叠衣物；或为患有严重运动障碍的人提供穿衣、洗澡和卫生帮助。在这项工作中，我们介绍了一种使协作机器人能够利用布料进行视觉触觉推理的公式，即推断物理交互过程中施加的力的位置和大小的行为。我们提出了两种不同的模型表示，经过物理模拟训练，仅使用视觉和机器人运动学观察即可实现触觉推理。我们在机器人辅助穿衣、洗澡和洗碗任务的模拟中对这些模型进行了定量评估，并证明经过训练的模型可以泛化具有不同交互、人体尺寸和物体形状的不同任务。我们还展示了真实世界移动机械手的结果，该机械手使用我们的模拟训练模型来估计所施加的接触力，同时使用布料执行物理辅助任务。视频可以在我们的项目网页上找到。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种通过视觉和机械臂运动数据估计可变形物体接触力的方法，用于机器人辅助日常任务。
AI.motivation: 为行动障碍者提供穿衣、洗浴等生活辅助，需机器人精准感知可变形物体（如布料）的接触力。
AI.method: 基于物理模拟训练两种模型，仅利用视觉和机械臂运动信息推断接触力，实现视觉触觉推理。
AI.result: 仿真和真实机械臂实验验证模型可泛化到不同任务、人体尺寸和物体形状，准确估计接触力。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为机器人辅助可变形物体操作提供了有效解决方案，推动医疗康复机器人发展。

authors_text: Ke Xu,Jianqiao Wangni,Yifan Zhang,Deheng Ye,Jiaxiang Wu,Peilin Zhao
title: Quantized Adaptive Subgradient Algorithms and Their Applications
title_zh: 量化自适应次梯度算法及其应用
abstract: Data explosion and an increase in model size drive the remarkable advances in large-scale machine learning, but also make model training time-consuming and model storage difficult. To address the above issues in the distributed model training setting which has high computation efficiency and less device limitation, there are still two main difficulties. On one hand, the communication costs for exchanging information, e.g., stochastic gradients among different workers, is a key bottleneck for distributed training efficiency. On the other hand, less parameter model is easy for storage and communication, but the risk of damaging the model performance. To balance the communication costs, model capacity and model performance simultaneously, we propose quantized composite mirror descent adaptive subgradient (QCMD adagrad) and quantized regularized dual average adaptive subgradient (QRDA adagrad) for distributed training. To be specific, we explore the combination of gradient quantization and sparse model to reduce the communication cost per iteration in distributed training. A quantized gradient-based adaptive learning rate matrix is constructed to achieve a balance between communication costs, accuracy, and model sparsity. Moreover, we theoretically find that a large quantization error brings in extra noise, which influences the convergence and sparsity of the model. Therefore, a threshold quantization strategy with a relatively small error is adopted in QCMD adagrad and QRDA adagrad to improve the signal-to-noise ratio and preserve the sparsity of the model. Both theoretical analyses and empirical results demonstrate the efficacy and efficiency of the proposed algorithms.
summary: Data explosion and an increase in model size drive the remarkable advances in large-scale machine learning, but also make model training time-consuming and model storage difficult. To address the above issues in the distributed model training setting which has high computation efficiency and less device limitation, there are still two main difficulties. On one hand, the communication costs for exchanging information, e.g., stochastic gradients among different workers, is a key bottleneck for distributed training efficiency. On the other hand, less parameter model is easy for storage and communication, but the risk of damaging the model performance. To balance the communication costs, model capacity and model performance simultaneously, we propose quantized composite mirror descent adaptive subgradient (QCMD adagrad) and quantized regularized dual average adaptive subgradient (QRDA adagrad) for distributed training. To be specific, we explore the combination of gradient quantization and sparse model to reduce the communication cost per iteration in distributed training. A quantized gradient-based adaptive learning rate matrix is constructed to achieve a balance between communication costs, accuracy, and model sparsity. Moreover, we theoretically find that a large quantization error brings in extra noise, which influences the convergence and sparsity of the model. Therefore, a threshold quantization strategy with a relatively small error is adopted in QCMD adagrad and QRDA adagrad to improve the signal-to-noise ratio and preserve the sparsity of the model. Both theoretical analyses and empirical results demonstrate the efficacy and efficiency of the proposed algorithms.
abstract_zh: 数据爆炸和模型规模的增加推动了大规模机器学习的显着进步，但也使得模型训练耗时且模型存储困难。要在计算效率高、设备限制少的分布式模型训练环境中解决上述问题，仍然存在两个主要困难。一方面，交换信息的通信成本，例如不同工作人员之间的随机梯度，是分布式训练效率的关键瓶颈。另一方面，较少参数的模型易于存储和通信，但存在损害模型性能的风险。为了同时平衡通信成本、模型容量和模型性能，我们提出了用于分布式训练的量化复合镜像下降自适应次梯度（QCMD adagrad）和量化正则化双平均自适应次梯度（QRDA adagrad）。具体来说，我们探索梯度量化和稀疏模型的结合，以减少分布式训练中每次迭代的通信成本。构建基于量化梯度的自适应学习率矩阵，以实现通信成本、准确性和模型稀疏性之间的平衡。此外，我们从理论上发现，较大的量化误差会带来额外的噪声，从而影响模型的收敛性和稀疏性。因此，QCMD adagrad和QRDA adagrad采用误差相对较小的阈值量化策略来提高信噪比并保持模型的稀疏性。理论分析和实证结果都证明了所提出算法的有效性和效率。

AI.tldr: 本文提出两种量化自适应次梯度算法（QCMD adagrad和QRDA adagrad），旨在解决分布式机器学习中通信成本高与模型性能平衡的问题。
AI.motivation: 大规模数据和模型增长导致分布式训练面临通信瓶颈与模型存储困难，传统方法难以兼顾通信效率与模型精度。
AI.method: 结合梯度量化与稀疏模型技术，构建量化梯度自适应学习率矩阵，并采用低误差阈值量化策略以提升信号噪声比与模型稀疏性。
AI.result: 理论分析与实验表明，所提算法有效降低了通信成本，同时保持模型收敛性与稀疏性，验证了其效率与实用性。
AI.conclusion: 通过量化与自适应学习率的结合，本文为分布式训练提供了兼顾通信效率与模型性能的解决方案，具有理论与应用价值。
